papers.title: ConformaDecompose: Explaining Uncertainty via Calibration Localization
papers.abstract: Conformal Prediction provides distribution-free prediction intervals with guaranteed coverage, but its reliance on a single global calibration threshold obscures the sources of uncertainty at the instance level. In particular, it conflates irreducible noise with uncertainty induced by heterogeneous training data (aleatoric), model limitations, or calibration mismatch (epistemic), offering little insight into why an interval is wide or whether it could be reduced. We introduce an uncertainty-aware explainability framework that analyses the reducibility of calibration-induced epistemic conformal uncertainty via progressive calibration localisation for regression tasks. The approach is diagnostic rather than causal: it does not estimate true aleatoric or epistemic uncertainty, but explains how conformal intervals contract and stabilise as calibration support is localised around a test instance. Across benchmarks and real-world data, absolute reducible uncertainty aligns with epistemic proxies, while its relative contribution varies by task, revealing regimes hidden by interval width. This instance-level view complements conformal uncertainty, enhancing interpretability without altering the predictor or coverage.

analysis.tldr: 提出ConformaDecompose框架，通过渐进校准定位解释共形预测中的不确定性来源。
analysis.research_motivation: 共形预测提供分布自由的预测区间，但依赖单一全局校准阈值，无法揭示实例级不确定性来源，混淆了不可约噪声与由异质训练数据、模型限制或校准不匹配引起的不确定性。
analysis.problem: 如何解释共形预测区间宽度背后的不确定性来源，特别是校准引起的认知不确定性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象，但指出绝对可约不确定性随任务变化，与认知代理一致，而相对贡献揭示区间宽度隐藏的机制。
analysis.method: 提出不确定性感知的可解释性框架，通过渐进校准定位分析校准引起的认知共形不确定性的可约性，用于回归任务。
contributions: 提出ConformaDecompose框架，通过渐进校准定位解释共形预测中的不确定性。
提供实例级视角，增强共形不确定性的可解释性，不改变预测器或覆盖度。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅适用于回归任务，分类任务未涉及。
框架是诊断性而非因果性，不估计真实的不确定性类型。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，但实验信息不足，且仅针对回归任务，影响有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ConformaDecompose框架，通过渐进校准定位解释共形预测中的不确定性来源。

papers.title: How to Guide Your Flow: Few-Step Alignment via Flow Map Reward Guidance
papers.abstract: In generative modeling, we often wish to produce samples that maximize a user-specified reward such as aesthetic quality or alignment with human preferences, a problem known as guidance. Despite their widespread use, existing guidance methods either require expensive multi-particle, many-step schemes or rely on poorly understood approximations. We reformulate guidance as a deterministic optimal control problem, yielding a hierarchy of algorithms that subsumes existing approaches at the coarsest level. We show that the flow map, an object of significant recent interest for its role in fast inference, arises naturally in the optimal solution. Based on this observation, we propose Flow Map Reward Guidance (FMRG): a training-free, single-trajectory framework that uses the flow map to both integrate and guide the flow. At text-to-image scale, FMRG matches or surpasses baselines across inverse problems, style transfer, human preferences, and VLM rewards with as few as 3 NFEs, giving at least an order-of-magnitude speedup in comparison to prior state of the art.

analysis.tldr: 提出流图奖励引导（FMRG），一种无需训练、单轨迹的少步生成引导方法，在文本到图像任务中仅需3步即可匹配或超越基线。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有生成引导方法要么需要昂贵的多粒子多步方案，要么依赖理解不足的近似，缺乏高效且理论清晰的框架。
analysis.problem: 如何实现高效、少步且无需训练的生成引导，以最大化用户指定的奖励（如美学质量或人类偏好）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 流图在快速推理中具有重要作用，并在最优控制解中自然出现。
analysis.method: 将引导重新表述为确定性最优控制问题，利用流图进行积分和引导，提出无需训练的单轨迹框架FMRG。
contributions: 将引导问题形式化为确定性最优控制，推导出包含现有方法的算法层次结构。
提出FMRG，一种无需训练、单轨迹的少步引导方法，在文本到图像任务中仅需3步NFE即可匹配或超越基线。
analysis.experiments: 在文本到图像尺度上，针对逆问题、风格迁移、人类偏好和VLM奖励进行实验，FMRG匹配或超越基线，且速度比先前最优方法快至少一个数量级。
limitations: 可能仅适用于基于流的生成模型。
未讨论在视频或3D生成等更复杂模态上的表现。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，理论清晰，实验显示显著加速，与生成模型核心方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出流图奖励引导（FMRG），一种无需训练、单轨迹的少步生成引导方法，在文本到图像任务中仅需3步即可匹配或超越基线。

papers.title: Enhancing Linux Privilege Escalation Attack Capabilities of Local LLM Agents
papers.abstract: Recent research has demonstrated the potential of Large Language Models (LLMs) for autonomous penetration testing, particularly when using cloud-based restricted-weight models. However, reliance on such models introduces security, privacy, and sovereignty concerns, motivating the use of locally hosted open-weight alternatives. Prior work shows that small open-weight models perform poorly on automated Linux privilege escalation, limiting their practical applicability. In this paper, we present a systematic empirical study of whether targeted system-level and prompting interventions can bridge this performance gap. We analyze failure modes of open-weight models in autonomous privilege escalation, map them to established enhancement techniques, and evaluate five concrete interventions (chain-of-thought prompting, retrieval-augmented generation, structured prompts, history compression, and reflective analysis) implemented as extensions to hackingBuddyGPT. Our results show that open-weight models can match or outperform cloud-based baselines such as GPT-4o. With our treatments enabled, Llama3.1 70B exploits 83% of tested vulnerabilities, while smaller models including Llama3.1 8B and Qwen2.5 7B achieve 67% when using guidance. A full-factorial ablation study over all treatment combinations reveals that reflection-based treatments contribute most, while also identifying vulnerability discovery as a remaining bottleneck for local models.

analysis.tldr: 通过系统级和提示工程干预，本地开源LLM在Linux权限提升攻击中可匹配甚至超越GPT-4o等云模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 云模型存在安全、隐私和主权问题，而本地开源模型在自动化权限提升任务中表现不佳，限制了实际应用。
analysis.problem: 如何通过系统级和提示工程干预提升本地开源LLM在Linux权限提升攻击中的能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 开源模型在自主权限提升中存在多种失败模式，通过干预可显著提升性能；反射式分析贡献最大，漏洞发现仍是瓶颈。
analysis.method: 提出五种具体干预措施（链式思考提示、检索增强生成、结构化提示、历史压缩、反射分析），并作为hackingBuddyGPT的扩展实现。
contributions: 系统性地研究了针对本地LLM的权限提升攻击增强技术。
通过全因子消融实验揭示了反射分析是最有效的干预措施。
analysis.experiments: 在Linux权限提升任务上评估，Llama3.1 70B达到83%漏洞利用成功率，小模型在引导下达到67%。
limitations: 漏洞发现仍是本地模型的瓶颈。
实验仅限于Linux权限提升场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法系统且实验充分，但场景较窄，适合安全领域读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过系统级和提示工程干预，本地开源LLM在Linux权限提升攻击中可匹配甚至超越GPT-4o等云模型。

papers.title: Unpacking Vibe Coding: Help-Seeking Processes in Student-AI Interactions While Programming
papers.abstract: Generative AI is reshaping higher education programming through vibe coding, where students collaborate with AI via natural language rather than writing code line-by-line. We conceptualize this practice as help-seeking, analyzing 19,418 interaction turns from 110 undergraduate students. Using inductive coding and Heterogeneous Transition Network Analysis, we examined interaction sequences to compare top- and low-performing students. Results reveal that top performers engaged in instrumental help-seeking -- inquiry and exploration -- eliciting tutor-like AI responses. In contrast, low performers relied on executive help-seeking, frequently delegating tasks and prompting the AI to assume an executor role focused on ready-made solutions. These findings indicate that currently generative AI mirrors student intent (whether productive or passive) rather than optimizing for learning. To evolve from tools to teammates, AI systems must move beyond passive compliance. We argue for pedagogically aligned design that detect unproductive delegation and adaptively steer educational interactions toward inquiry, ensuring student-AI partnerships augment rather than replace cognitive effort.

analysis.tldr: 研究发现，在编程中与AI协作时，高绩效学生倾向于工具性求助（探索与提问），而低绩效学生则依赖执行性求助（任务委托），表明当前AI被动反映学生意图而非优化学习。
analysis.research_motivation: 生成式AI通过自然语言协作（vibe coding）正在重塑编程教育，但学生与AI的交互模式如何影响学习效果尚不明确，需要理解不同表现学生的求助行为差异。
analysis.problem: 揭示学生在编程中与AI交互时的求助过程，并比较高绩效与低绩效学生的行为模式差异。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 高绩效学生进行工具性求助（探索与提问），AI回应类似导师；低绩效学生依赖执行性求助（委托任务），AI扮演执行者角色。AI被动反映学生意图，而非主动优化学习。
analysis.method: 对110名本科生的19,418个交互回合进行归纳编码，并使用异质转移网络分析（HTNA）比较交互序列。
contributions: 将vibe coding概念化为求助过程，并建立分析框架。
通过大规模实证数据揭示高绩效与低绩效学生的求助行为差异。
提出AI系统应检测非生产性委托并自适应引导教育交互，以增强而非替代认知努力。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及分析了19,418个交互回合和110名学生数据。
limitations: 可能未考虑不同编程任务难度的影响。
样本仅限于本科生，可能不适用于其他教育水平。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 研究视角新颖，实证数据丰富，对AI教育设计有指导意义，但技术方法相对常规。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 研究发现，在编程中与AI协作时，高绩效学生倾向于工具性求助（探索与提问），而低绩效学生则依赖执行性求助（任务委托），表明当前AI被动反映学生意图而非优化学习。

papers.title: TRUST: A Framework for Decentralized AI Service v.0.1
papers.abstract: Large Reasoning Models (LRMs) and Multi-Agent Systems (MAS) in high-stakes domains demand reliable verification, yet centralized approaches suffer four limitations: (1) Robustness, with single points of failure vulnerable to attacks and bias; (2) Scalability, as reasoning complexity creates bottlenecks; (3) Opacity, as hidden auditing erodes trust; and (4) Privacy, as exposed reasoning traces risk model theft. We introduce TRUST (Transparent, Robust, and Unified Services for Trustworthy AI), a decentralized framework with three innovations: (i) Hierarchical Directed Acyclic Graphs (HDAGs) that decompose Chain-of-Thought reasoning into five abstraction levels for parallel distributed auditing; (ii) the DAAN protocol, which projects multi-agent interactions into Causal Interaction Graphs (CIGs) for deterministic root-cause attribution; and (iii) a multi-tier consensus mechanism among computational checkers, LLM evaluators, and human experts with stake-weighted voting that guarantees correctness under 30% adversarial participation. We prove a Safety-Profitability Theorem ensuring honest auditors profit while malicious actors incur losses. All decisions are recorded on-chain, while privacy-by-design segmentation prevents reconstruction of proprietary logic. Across multiple LLMs and benchmarks, TRUST attains 72.4% accuracy (4-18% above baselines) and remains resilient against 20% corruption. DAAN reaches 70% root-cause attribution (vs. 54-63% for standard methods) with 60% token savings. Human studies validate the design (F1 = 0.89, Brier = 0.074). The framework supports (A1) decentralized auditing, (A2) tamper-proof leaderboards, (A3) trustless data annotation, and (A4) governed autonomous agents, pioneering decentralized AI auditing for safe, accountable deployment of reasoning-capable systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个去中心化AI审计框架TRUST，通过HDAG分解推理、DAAN因果归因和多层共识机制，在30%恶意节点下保证正确性。
analysis.research_motivation: 高风险领域的大推理模型和多智能体系统需要可靠验证，但中心化方法存在鲁棒性差、可扩展性瓶颈、不透明和隐私泄露问题。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个去中心化、可审计、隐私保护的AI服务框架，以验证LRM和MAS的推理过程并保证正确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出TRUST框架，包含三个创新：1) 层次化有向无环图(HDAG)将思维链推理分解为五个抽象层次进行并行分布式审计；2) DAAN协议将多智能体交互投影为因果交互图(CIG)进行确定性根因归因；3) 多层共识机制（计算检查器、LLM评估器、人类专家）结合权益加权投票，在30%恶意参与下保证正确性。同时证明安全-盈利定理，确保诚实审计者获利而恶意者亏损。
contributions: 提出TRUST去中心化AI审计框架，解决中心化验证的鲁棒性、可扩展性、透明性和隐私问题。
设计HDAG、DAAN协议和多层共识机制，实验表明准确率72.4%（比基线高4-18%），根因归因达70%（比标准方法高7-16%），节省60% token。
analysis.experiments: 在多个LLM和基准上，TRUST达到72.4%准确率（比基线高4-18%），在20%腐败下保持鲁棒；DAAN根因归因70%（vs 54-63%），节省60% token；人类研究验证设计（F1=0.89，Brier=0.074）。
limitations: 实验仅在有限基准和LLM上进行，泛化性待验证。
框架复杂度高，实际部署可能面临工程挑战。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 提出去中心化AI审计框架，方法新颖且实验充分，但属于安全对齐方向，与核心关注点中等相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个去中心化AI审计框架TRUST，通过HDAG分解推理、DAAN因果归因和多层共识机制，在30%恶意节点下保证正确性。

papers.title: Lightweight Distillation of SAM 3 and DINOv3 for Edge-Deployable Individual-Level Livestock Monitoring and Longitudinal Visual Analytics
papers.abstract: Foundation-model pipelines for individual-level livestock monitoring -- combining open-vocabulary detection, promptable video segmentation, and self-supervised visual embeddings -- have raised the accuracy ceiling of precision livestock farming (PLF), but their GPU memory budgets exceed the envelope of commodity edge accelerators. To close this gap, the 446M-parameter Perception Encoder (PE-ViT-L+) backbone of SAM 3 is distilled into a 40.66M-parameter multi-scale student through three mechanisms: a Feature Pyramid Network student encoder built on TinyViT-21M-512, a four-term direction-then-scale distillation loss, and backbone-substitution inference with sliding-window session pruning that bounds streaming GPU memory growth. The DINOv3 family includes a pre-distilled ViT-S/16 variant (21.6M parameters) released alongside a 6716M-parameter ViT-7B teacher; the ViT-S (21M) variant is adopted as the per-individual embedder. On the Edinburgh Pig dataset, the compressed pipeline reaches 92.29% MOTA and 96.15% IDF1 against the SAM 3 teacher (1.68- and 0.84-percentage-point losses), achieves a 7.77-fold reduction in system-level parameters and a 3.01-fold reduction in peak VRAM (19.52GB -> 6.49GB), and reaches 97.34% top-1 accuracy with 91.67% macro-F1 on nine-class pig behaviour classification. The pipeline fits inside an NVIDIA Jetson Orin NX 16GB envelope with 4.9GB of headroom, supporting a proposed -- but not yet empirically validated -- on-device embedding-pool re-identification mechanism whose per-individual footprint of approximately 94MB per animal per year produces a longitudinal visual record amenable to retrospective association with disease, lameness, reproductive, and growth outcome labels.

analysis.tldr: 将SAM 3和DINOv3蒸馏为轻量级模型，实现边缘设备上的个体级牲畜监控与纵向分析。
analysis.research_motivation: 基础模型在个体级牲畜监控中精度高，但GPU内存需求超出边缘加速器能力，限制了实际部署。
analysis.problem: 如何将446M参数的SAM 3骨干网络蒸馏为适合边缘设备（如Jetson Orin NX）的轻量级模型，同时保持高精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用基于TinyViT-21M-512的特征金字塔网络学生编码器、四项方向-尺度蒸馏损失和滑动窗口会话剪枝的骨干替换推理，将SAM 3的PE-ViT-L+蒸馏为40.66M参数的多尺度学生模型；并采用DINOv3的ViT-S/16作为个体嵌入器。
contributions: 提出一种轻量级蒸馏方法，将SAM 3和DINOv3压缩至边缘可部署规模。
在猪行为分类任务上达到97.34% top-1准确率，系统参数减少7.77倍，峰值VRAM降低3.01倍。

papers.title: Unsupervised Electrofacies Classification and Porosity Characterization in the Offshore Keta Basin Using Wireline Logs
papers.abstract: This study presents an unsupervised machine learning workflow for electrofacies analysis in the offshore Keta Basin, Ghana, where core data are scarce. Six standard wireline logs from Well~C were analysed over a depth interval comprising approximately $11{,}195$ samples. K-means clustering was applied in multivariate log space, with the clustering structure evaluated using inertia and silhouette diagnostics. Four clusters were identified, supported by an average silhouette coefficient of approximately $0.50$, indicating moderate but meaningful separation. The resulting electrofacies exhibit systematic, depth-continuous patterns associated with variations in clay content, porosity, and rock framework properties, forming a geological continuum from shale-dominated to cleaner sandstone-dominated units. The results demonstrate that log-only, unsupervised clustering supported by quantitative metrics provides a robust and reproducible framework for subsurface characterisation. The proposed workflow offers a practical tool for early-stage formation evaluation in frontier offshore basins and a foundation for future integrated studies.

analysis.tldr: 利用无监督K-means聚类对加纳Keta盆地海上井日志进行电相分类和孔隙度表征。
analysis.research_motivation: 海上Keta盆地岩心数据稀缺，传统有监督方法难以应用，需要一种仅依赖测井数据的无监督方法进行地下表征。
analysis.problem: 在缺乏岩心数据的情况下，如何利用标准测井数据自动识别电相并评估储层孔隙度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用K-means聚类对六种标准测井数据（多变量对数空间）进行聚类，通过惯量和轮廓诊断确定最佳聚类数（4类），从而划分电相。
contributions: 提出了一种仅依赖测井数据的无监督电相分析工作流，适用于岩心稀缺的前沿盆地。
通过定量指标（轮廓系数约0.50）验证了聚类结果的合理性和可重复性。

papers.title: InterPartAbility: Text-Guided Part Matching for Interpretable Person Re-Identification
papers.abstract: Text-to-image person re-identification (TI-ReID) relies on natural-language text description to retrieve top matching individuals from a large gallery of images. While recent large vision-language models (VLMs) achieve strong retrieval performance, their decisions remain largely uninterpretable. Existing interpretability approaches in TI-ReID rely solely on slot-attention to highlight attended regions, but fail to reliably bind visual regions to semantically meaningful concepts, limiting explanations to qualitative visualizations over a restricted vocabulary. This paper introduces InterPartAbility, an interpretable TI-ReID method that performs explicit part-wise matching and enables phrase-region grounding. A new open-vocabulary, lightweight supervision, patch-phrase interaction module (PPIM) is proposed to train a standard TI-ReID model with concept-level guidance. Concept-based part phrases provide evidence that encourages the model to attend to corresponding image regions. InterPartAbility further constrains CLIP ViT self-attention to produce spatially concentrated patch activations aligned with each part-level phrase, yielding grounded explanation maps. A quantitative interpretability protocol for TI-ReID is introduced by adapting perturbation-based evaluation metrics, including counterfactual region masking that measures retrieval degradation when top-ranked explanatory regions are removed. Empirical results\footnote{Our code is included in the supplementary materials and will be made public.} on challenging benchmarks like CUHK-PEDES and ICFG-PEDES show that InterPartAbility achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) interpretability performance under these metrics, while sustaining competitive retrieval accuracy.

analysis.tldr: 提出InterPartAbility，通过文本引导的部件匹配实现可解释的行人重识别。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有文本-图像行人重识别方法虽性能强但缺乏可解释性，已有可解释方法仅依赖槽注意力，无法可靠地将视觉区域与语义概念绑定，解释局限于定性可视化且词汇受限。
analysis.problem: 如何实现文本-图像行人重识别中的显式部件匹配和短语-区域定位，同时保持竞争性的检索性能。

papers.title: PALCAS: A Priority-Aware Intelligent Lane Change Advisory System for Autonomous Vehicles using Federated Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: We present a priority-aware intelligent lane change advisory system based on multi-agent federated reinforcement learning, namely PALCAS, for autonomous vehicles (AVs). While existing lane-change approaches typically focus on single-agent systems or centralized multi-agent systems, we introduce a federated reinforcement learning-based multi-agent lane change system prioritizing lane changing based on vehicle destination urgency. PALCAS incorporates a novel priority-aware safe lane-change reward function to enable judicious lane-change decisions in both mandatory and discretionary scenarios. PALCAS leverages the parameterized deep Q-network (PDQN) algorithm to facilitate effective cooperation among agents, enabling both lateral and longitudinal motion controls of AVs. Extensive simulations conducted using the SUMO traffic simulator and Mosaic V2X communication framework demonstrate that PALCAS significantly improves traffic efficiency, driving safety, comfort, destination arrival rates, and merging success rates compared to baseline methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于联邦强化学习的优先级感知车道变换系统PALCAS，通过参数化深度Q网络和优先级奖励函数提升自动驾驶车辆在强制与自由变道场景下的交通效率与安全性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有车道变换方法多基于单智能体或集中式多智能体系统，缺乏对车辆目的地紧迫性的优先级感知，难以在复杂交通场景下实现高效、安全的协同变道决策。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个分布式、优先级感知的多智能体车道变换系统，使自动驾驶车辆在强制和自由变道场景中做出安全、高效且考虑目的地紧迫性的决策。

analysis.method: 提出PALCAS系统，采用多智能体联邦强化学习框架，每个智能体使用参数化深度Q网络（PDQN）进行横向和纵向运动控制，并设计优先级感知的安全车道变换奖励函数，根据车辆目的地紧迫性调整变道优先级。

papers.title: A Gated Hybrid Contrastive Collaborative Filtering Recommendation
papers.abstract: Recommender systems increasingly incorporate textual reviews to enrich user and item representations. However, most review-aware models remain optimized for rating prediction rather than ranking quality. This misalignment limits their effectiveness in top-N recommendation scenarios, where discriminative ranking is essential. To address this gap, we propose a Gated Hybrid Collaborative Filtering framework that integrates review-derived representations into an autoencoder-based collaborative model. The architecture injects semantic signals layer-wise through an adaptive gating mechanism that dynamically balances collaborative embeddings and topic-based features during encoding. To further refine the latent space, we introduce a contrastive learning module that aligns semantic and collaborative signals. We evaluate the framework across five distinct configurations: Pure collaborative; Topic and Gated; Text and Gated; and the addition of contrastive objectives (Contrastive and Topic, and Contrastive and Text). To explicitly optimize ranking behavior, the model is trained with a pairwise Bayesian personalized ranking objective, which promotes separation between relevant and non-relevant items in the latent space. Experiments on Amazon Movies & TV, IMDb, and Rotten Tomatoes demonstrate consistent improvements in hit rate @10 and normalized discounted cumulative gain @10 over state-of-the-art review-aware baselines. Results highlight the importance of controlled semantic fusion for ranking-driven recommendation.

analysis.tldr: 提出门控混合对比协同过滤框架，通过自适应门控机制和对比学习融合评论文本语义与协同信号，优化Top-N推荐排序性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于评论文本的推荐模型多针对评分预测优化，忽略了排序质量，导致在Top-N推荐场景中效果不佳。

papers.title: Reconstruction by Generation: 3D Multi-Object Scene Reconstruction from Sparse Observations
papers.abstract: Accurately reconstructing complex full multi-object scenes from sparse observations remains a core challenge in computer vision and a key step toward scalable and reliable simulation for robotics. In this work, we introduce RecGen, a generative framework for probabilistic joint estimation of object and part shapes, as well as their pose under occlusion and partial visibility from one or multiple RGB-D images. By leveraging compositional synthetic scene generation and strong 3D shape priors, RecGen generalizes across diverse object types and real-world environments. RecGen achieves state-of-the-art performance on complex, heavily occluded datasets, robustly handling severe occlusions, symmetric objects, object parts, and intricate geometry and texture. Despite using nearly 80% fewer training meshes than the previous state of the art SAM3D, RecGen outperforms it by 30.1% in geometric shape quality, 9.1% in texture reconstruction, and 33.9% in pose estimation.

analysis.tldr: RecGen通过生成式框架从稀疏观测中联合估计物体形状与位姿，在严重遮挡场景下超越SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 从稀疏观测中准确重建复杂多物体场景是计算机视觉的核心挑战，也是实现可扩展、可靠机器人仿真的关键步骤。现有方法在严重遮挡、对称物体和复杂几何纹理下表现不足。

analysis.experiments: 在复杂、严重遮挡的数据集上评估，几何形状质量提升30.1%，纹理重建提升9.1%，位姿估计提升33.9%。

papers.title: Automated Detection of Mutual Gaze and Joint Attention in Dual-Camera Settings via Dual-Stream Transformers
papers.abstract: Analyzing mutual gaze (MG) and joint attention (JA) is critical in developmental psychology but traditionally relies on labor-intensive manual coding. Automating this process in multi-camera laboratory settings is computationally challenging due to complex cross-camera relational dynamics. In this paper, we propose a highly efficient dual-stream Transformer architecture for detecting MG and JA from synchronized dual-camera recordings. Our approach leverages frozen gaze-aware backbones (GazeLLE) to extract rich visual priors, combined with a custom token fusion mechanism to map the spatial and semantic relationships between interacting dyads. Evaluated on an ecologically valid dataset of caregiver-infant interactions, our model exhibits good performance, significantly outperforming both a convolutional baseline and a state-of-the-art multimodal Large Language Model (LLM). By open-sourcing our model and pre-trained weights, we provide behavioral scientists with a scalable tool that can be fine-tuned to diverse laboratory environments, effectively bridging the gap between computational modeling and applied interaction research.

analysis.tldr: 提出双流Transformer架构，利用冻结的GazeLLE骨干和令牌融合机制，从双摄像头视频中自动检测相互注视和共同注意，性能优于卷积基线和多模态大模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 发展心理学中相互注视和共同注意的分析依赖人工编码，耗时费力，亟需自动化方法。
analysis.problem: 从双摄像头实验室录制视频中自动检测相互注视和共同注意，需处理跨摄像头关系动态。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。

papers.title: Anomaly Detection in Soil Heavy Metal Contamination Using Unsupervised Learning for Environmental Risk Assessment
papers.abstract: Soil contamination by heavy metals poses a persistent environmental and public health concern in rapidly urbanising regions of Ghana, particularly at unregulated waste disposal sites. This study applies an unsupervised machine learning framework to detect and characterise anomalous heavy metal contamination patterns in soils from twelve waste sites and residential controls in the Central Region, of Ghana. Concentrations of eight metals (As, Cd, Cr, Cu, Hg, Ni, Pb, Zn) were analysed alongside standard health risk indices, including the Hazard Index (HI) and Incremental Lifetime Cancer Risk (ILCR). Isolation Forest and PCA reconstruction error each identified $12$ anomalous samples ($15.4\%$ of $78$ samples), while DBSCAN detected no density-isolated noise points. A consensus approach isolated six robust anomalies ($7.7\%)$, all spatially concentrated at a single site (S3). Anomalies exhibited approximately $70$--$80\%$ higher mean HI values than normal samples, with all consensus anomalies exceeding the HI$=1$ threshold. PCA reconstruction error showed a strong positive association with HI ($r \approx 0.8$), indicating consistency between multivariate deviation and health risk. Three distinct anomaly types were identified: extreme Cu enrichment at S3, anomalously low Ni at S4/S5, and moderate multi-metal (Pb--Zn) co-elevation at S9--S12. The results demonstrate that unsupervised machine learning provides granular, objective insight beyond aggregate indices, enabling targeted site prioritisation and risk-informed environmental management.

analysis.tldr: 无监督学习有效检测土壤重金属污染异常，共识方法识别出7.7%的异常样本，与健康风险指数高度相关。
analysis.research_motivation: 加纳快速城市化地区土壤重金属污染严重，传统健康风险指数无法提供细粒度异常检测，需要客观、可解释的机器学习方法辅助环境风险评估。
analysis.problem: 如何利用无监督学习从多金属浓度数据中自动识别异常污染模式，并与健康风险指标关联，以支持污染场地优先排序。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 异常样本的健康风险指数（HI）比正常样本高约70-80%，且共识异常均超过HI=1阈值；PCA重构误差与HI强正相关（r≈0.8），表明多变量偏离与健康风险一致。
analysis.method: 使用Isolation Forest、PCA重构误差和DBSCAN三种无监督方法，结合共识策略筛选稳健异常，并基于金属浓度特征对异常类型进行聚类分析。
contributions: 提出共识无监督框架用于土壤重金属污染异常检测，在78个样本中识别出6个稳健异常（7.7%），全部集中于单一站点。
发现PCA重构误差与健康风险指数（HI）强相关（r≈0.8），验证了无监督异常检测与健康风险评估的一致性。
识别出三种异常类型：极端Cu富集、异常低Ni、中等多金属（Pb-Zn）共升高，为污染源解析提供线索。
analysis.experiments: 在加纳中部地区12个废物站点和居民对照区的78个土壤样本上，分析了8种重金属浓度及健康风险指数，比较了Isolation Forest、PCA重构误差和DBSCAN三种方法，并通过共识策略确定最终异常。
limitations: 样本量较小（78个），可能影响异常检测的统计可靠性。
仅使用无监督方法，未与有监督或半监督方法对比。

analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.reason: 方法组合常规，但应用场景（土壤重金属污染）和共识策略有一定价值，实验规模小，适合环境领域读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 无监督学习有效检测土壤重金属污染异常，共识方法识别出7.7%的异常样本，与健康风险指数高度相关。

papers.title: Think it, Run it: Autonomous ML pipeline generation via self-healing multi-agent AI
papers.abstract: The purpose of our paper is to develop a unified multi-agent architecture that automates end-to-end machine learning (ML) pipeline generation from datasets and natural-language (NL) goals, improving efficiency, robustness and explainability. A five-agent system is proposed to handle profiling, intent parsing, microservice recommendation, Directed Acyclic Graph (DAG) construction and execution. It integrates code-grounded Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) for microservice understanding, an explainable hybrid recommender combining multiple criteria, a self-healing mechanism using Large Language Model (LLM)-based error interpretation and adaptive learning from execution history. The approach is evaluated on 150 ML tasks across diverse scenarios. The system achieves an 84.7% end-to-end pipeline success rate, outperforming baseline methods. It demonstrates improved robustness through self-healing and reduces workflow development time compared to manual construction. The study introduces a novel integration of code-grounded RAG, explainable recommendation, self-healing execution and adaptive learning within a single architecture, showing that tightly coupled intelligent components can outperform isolated solutions.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个五智能体多代理架构，通过自愈机制和代码增强RAG自动生成ML流水线，在150个任务上达到84.7%成功率。
analysis.research_motivation: 手动构建ML流水线耗时且易出错，现有自动化方法缺乏鲁棒性和可解释性，难以应对复杂多变的实际任务。
analysis.problem: 如何从数据集和自然语言目标自动生成端到端ML流水线，并保证高成功率、鲁棒性和可解释性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出五智能体系统（分析、意图解析、微服务推荐、DAG构建、执行），集成代码增强RAG、可解释混合推荐和基于LLM的自愈机制。
contributions: 首次在单一架构中集成代码增强RAG、可解释推荐、自愈执行和自适应学习。
在150个ML任务上验证系统，端到端成功率达84.7%，优于基线方法。
analysis.experiments: 在150个ML任务上评估，系统达到84.7%端到端成功率，优于基线方法，并展示了自愈机制带来的鲁棒性提升和开发时间减少。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量微服务库和LLM的准确性。
自愈机制可能增加执行时间。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分，与Agent方向高度相关，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个五智能体多代理架构，通过自愈机制和代码增强RAG自动生成ML流水线，在150个任务上达到84.7%成功率。

papers.title: Useless but Safe? Benchmarking Utility Recovery with User Intent Clarification in Multi-Turn Conversations
papers.abstract: Current LLM safety alignment techniques improve model robustness against adversarial attacks, but overlook whether and how LLMs can recover helpfulness when benign users clarify their intent. We introduce CarryOnBench, the first interactive benchmark that measures whether LLMs can revise their interpretation of user intent and recover utility, while remaining safe through multi-turn conversations. Starting from 398 seemingly harmful queries with benign underlying intents, we simulate 5,970 conversations by varying user follow-up sequences, evaluating 14 models on both intent-aligned utility and safety. CarryOnBench yields 1,866 different conversation flows of 4--12 turns, totaling 23,880 model responses. We design Ben-Util, a checklist-based metric that evaluates how well each model response fulfills the user's benign information need using atomic items. At turn one, models fulfill only 10.5--37.6% of the user's benign information need. When the same query includes the benign intent upfront, models fulfill 25.1--72.1%, confirming that models withhold information due to intent misinterpretation, not limited knowledge. With benign clarifications in multi-turn conversations, 13 of 14 models approach or exceed this single-turn baseline, yet recovery cost varies across models. We identify three failure modes invisible to single-turn evaluations: utility lock-in, where a model rarely updates despite clarification; unsafe recovery, where a model updates at disproportionate safety cost; and repetitive recovery, where a model recycles prior responses rather than providing new information. Moreover, conversations converge to similar harmfulness levels regardless of how conservative the model starts. These findings expose a gap that single-turn evaluations miss -- whether a model is appropriately cautious or simply unresponsive to clarified user intent.

analysis.tldr: 提出CarryOnBench基准，评估多轮对话中LLM在用户澄清意图后恢复有用性的能力，发现模型存在意图误解和三种失败模式。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有安全对齐技术只关注对抗攻击下的鲁棒性，忽略了良性用户澄清意图时模型能否恢复有用性，导致单轮评估无法捕捉多轮对话中的关键缺陷。
analysis.problem: 如何系统评估LLM在多轮对话中，面对看似有害但实际良性的查询，在用户澄清意图后能否同时保持安全并恢复有用性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型在首轮仅满足10.5-37.6%的良性信息需求；若查询直接包含良性意图，满足率升至25.1-72.1%，证实信息保留源于意图误解而非知识不足。多轮澄清后13/14模型接近或超过单轮基线，但恢复成本各异。识别出三种单轮评估不可见的失败模式：效用锁定、不安全恢复、重复恢复。对话最终收敛到相似有害水平，与模型初始保守程度无关。
analysis.method: 构建CarryOnBench基准，从398个看似有害但意图良性的查询出发，模拟5970条多轮对话，包含1866种4-12轮对话流，共23880条模型回复。设计Ben-Util指标，基于原子检查项评估回复对用户良性信息需求的满足程度。
contributions: 首次提出评估多轮对话中LLM在用户澄清意图后恢复有用性的交互式基准CarryOnBench。
设计细粒度评估指标Ben-Util，量化模型对良性信息需求的满足程度。
揭示单轮评估无法发现的三种失败模式：效用锁定、不安全恢复、重复恢复。
analysis.experiments: 在14个模型上评估，涵盖5970条多轮对话，共23880条模型回复。摘要提供了首轮满足率、单轮基线对比等定量结果，但未提供完整实验设置细节。
limitations: 基准仅基于398个初始查询，可能未覆盖所有良性意图场景。
模拟对话可能无法完全反映真实用户澄清的多样性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 创新性高，首次关注多轮对话中意图澄清后的效用恢复，实验规模大，但技术深度中等，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CarryOnBench基准，评估多轮对话中LLM在用户澄清意图后恢复有用性的能力，发现模型存在意图误解和三种失败模式。

papers.title: End-to-end autonomous scientific discovery on a real optical platform
papers.abstract: Scientific research has long been human-led, driving new knowledge and transformative technologies through the continual revision of questions, methods and claims as evidence accumulates. Although large language model (LLM)-based agents are beginning to move beyond assisting predefined research workflows, none has yet demonstrated end-to-end autonomous discovery in a real physical system that produces a nontrivial result supported by experimental evidence. Here we introduce Qiushi Discovery Engine, an LLM-based agentic system for end-to-end autonomous scientific discovery on a real optical platform. Qiushi Engine combines nonlinear research phases, Meta-Trace memory and a dual-layer architecture to maintain adaptive and stable research trajectories across long-horizon investigations involving thousands of LLM-mediated reasoning, measurement and revision actions. It autonomously reproduces a published transmission-matrix experiment on a non-original platform and converts an abstract coherence-order theory into experimental observables, providing, to our knowledge, the first observation of this class of coherence-order structure. More importantly, in an open-ended study involving 145.9 million tokens, 3,242 LLM calls, 1,242 tool calls, 163 research notes and 44 scripts, Qiushi Engine proposes and experimentally validates optical bilinear interaction, a physical mechanism structurally analogous to a core operation in Transformer attention. This AI-discovered mechanism suggests a route towards high-speed, energy-efficient optical hardware for pairwise computation. To our knowledge, this is the first demonstration of an AI agentic system autonomously identifying and experimentally validating a nontrivial, previously unreported physical mechanism, marking a milestone for research-level autonomous agents.

analysis.tldr: 提出Qiushi Discovery Engine，首个在真实光学平台上实现端到端自主科学发现的LLM智能体系统，自主发现并实验验证了光学双线性相互作用机制。
analysis.research_motivation: 科学研究长期由人类主导，现有LLM智能体仅辅助预定义工作流，尚未有系统能在真实物理系统中实现端到端自主发现并产生实验证据支持的非平凡结果。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个能够在真实光学平台上自主执行长期研究（包括推理、测量、修订）并产生可验证新发现的LLM智能体系统。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Qiushi Discovery Engine，结合非线性研究阶段、Meta-Trace记忆和双层架构，在数千次LLM推理、测量和修订动作中维持自适应且稳定的研究轨迹。
contributions: 首个在真实光学平台上实现端到端自主科学发现的LLM智能体系统。
自主发现并实验验证了光学双线性相互作用这一先前未报道的物理机制。
analysis.experiments: 在真实光学平台上进行实验，包括复现已发表的传输矩阵实验、将抽象相干阶理论转化为实验可观测量，以及一项涉及1.459亿token、3242次LLM调用、1242次工具调用、163份研究笔记和44个脚本的开放式研究。
limitations: 可能依赖特定光学平台，泛化性未验证。
系统复杂性和计算成本较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 首次实现真实物理系统上的端到端自主科学发现，方法创新且实验验证充分，对AI for Science和Agent领域有里程碑意义。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Qiushi Discovery Engine，首个在真实光学平台上实现端到端自主科学发现的LLM智能体系统，自主发现并实验验证了光学双线性相互作用机制。

papers.title: Efficient Training on Multiple Consumer GPUs with RoundPipe
papers.abstract: Fine-tuning Large Language Models (LLMs) on consumer-grade GPUs is highly cost-effective, yet constrained by limited GPU memory and slow PCIe interconnects. Pipeline parallelism combined with CPU offloading mitigates these hardware bottlenecks by reducing communication overhead. However, existing PP schedules suffer from an inherent limitation termed the weight binding issue. Binding uneven model stages (e.g., the LM head is large) to GPUs limits the pipeline's throughput to that of the GPU with the heaviest load, leading to severe pipeline bubbles. In this paper, we propose RoundPipe, a novel pipeline schedule that breaks the weight binding constraint on consumer GPU servers. RoundPipe treats GPUs as a pool of stateless execution workers and dynamically dispatches computation stages across devices in a round-robin manner, achieving a near-zero-bubble pipeline. To ensure training correctness and system efficiency, RoundPipe integrates a priority-aware transfer scheduling engine, a fine-grained distributed event-based synchronization protocol, and an automated layer partitioning algorithm. Evaluations on an 8$\times$ RTX 4090 server demonstrate that RoundPipe achieves 1.48--2.16$\times$ speedups over state-of-the-art baselines when fine-tuning 1.7B to 32B models. Remarkably, RoundPipe enables LoRA fine-tuning of the Qwen3-235B model with 31K sequence length on a single server. RoundPipe is publicly available as an open-source Python library with comprehensive documentation.

analysis.tldr: 提出RoundPipe流水线调度方案，通过打破权重绑定实现多消费级GPU上LLM微调的近零气泡加速。
analysis.research_motivation: 在消费级GPU上微调大语言模型成本低但受限于显存和PCIe带宽，现有流水线并行存在权重绑定导致的负载不均和气泡问题。
analysis.problem: 现有流水线调度中权重绑定导致GPU负载不均，限制吞吐量并产生严重气泡。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出权重绑定问题：将不均匀的模型阶段（如大的LM head）绑定到GPU上，流水线吞吐受限于最重负载GPU，导致严重气泡。
analysis.method: RoundPipe将GPU视为无状态执行工人池，以轮询方式动态分配计算阶段，实现近零气泡；集成优先级感知传输调度、细粒度分布式事件同步和自动层划分算法。
contributions: 提出RoundPipe流水线调度，打破权重绑定约束，实现近零气泡。
设计优先级感知传输调度、分布式事件同步和自动层划分算法，保证训练正确性和系统效率。
在8×RTX 4090服务器上实现1.48-2.16倍加速，并支持单服务器LoRA微调Qwen3-235B模型。
analysis.experiments: 在8×RTX 4090服务器上微调1.7B至32B模型，与最先进基线相比获得1.48-2.16倍加速；支持单服务器LoRA微调Qwen3-235B模型（31K序列长度）。
limitations: 可能仅适用于消费级GPU集群，对高端互连环境效果未知。
动态调度引入的额外开销在极端小模型上可能抵消收益。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分且加速比显著，开源实用，与LLM训练系统方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出RoundPipe流水线调度方案，通过打破权重绑定实现多消费级GPU上LLM微调的近零气泡加速。

papers.title: When Your LLM Reaches End-of-Life: A Framework for Confident Model Migration in Production Systems
papers.abstract: We present a framework for migrating production Large Language Model (LLM) based systems when the underlying model reaches end-of-life or requires replacement. The key contribution is a Bayesian statistical approach that calibrates automated evaluation metrics against human judgments, enabling confident model comparison even with limited manual evaluation data. We demonstrate this framework on a commercial question-answering system serving 5.3M monthly interactions across six global regions; evaluating correctness, refusal behavior, and stylistic adherence to successfully identify suitable replacement models. The framework is broadly applicable to any enterprise deploying LLM-based products, providing a principled, reproducible methodology for model migration that balances quality assurance with evaluation efficiency. This is a capability increasingly essential as the LLM ecosystem continues to evolve rapidly and organizations manage portfolios of AI-powered services across multiple models, regions, and use cases.

analysis.tldr: 提出贝叶斯框架，用少量人工标注校准自动评估指标，实现LLM生产系统模型迁移的可靠决策。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM生态快速迭代，生产系统面临模型停服或替换需求，但现有迁移方法依赖大量人工评估或缺乏统计保证，难以在有限资源下做出可靠决策。
analysis.problem: 如何在生产系统中，利用有限的人工评估数据，可靠地比较候选模型与旧模型，以支持模型迁移决策。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 贝叶斯统计方法，将自动评估指标（如正确性、拒绝行为、风格一致性）与人工判断进行校准，从而在少量人工标注下实现模型间置信比较。
contributions: 提出一个基于贝叶斯统计的模型迁移框架，可校准自动评估指标与人工判断。
在月均530万交互的商业问答系统上验证，成功识别合适替换模型。
analysis.experiments: 在覆盖六个全球区域的商业问答系统上评估，指标包括正确性、拒绝行为和风格一致性。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 框架依赖自动评估指标的选择和定义，可能不适用于所有任务。
贝叶斯校准需要一定量的人工标注数据，极端低资源场景下效果未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法实用但创新中等，实验信息有限，适合关注LLM部署的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出贝叶斯框架，用少量人工标注校准自动评估指标，实现LLM生产系统模型迁移的可靠决策。

papers.title: Learning Rate Transfer in Normalized Transformers
papers.abstract: The Normalized Transformer, or nGPT (arXiv:2410.01131) achieves impressive training speedups and does not require weight decay or learning rate warmup. However, despite having hyperparameters that explicitly scale with model size, we observe that nGPT does not exhibit learning rate transfer across model dimension and token horizon. To rectify this, we combine numerical experiments with a principled use of alignment exponents (arXiv:2407.05872) to revisit and modify the $μ$P approach to hyperparameter transfer (arXiv:2011.14522). The result is a novel nGPT parameterization we call $ν$GPT. Through extensive empirical validation, we find $ν$GPT exhibits learning rate transfer across width, depth, and token horizon.

analysis.tldr: 提出νGPT参数化方法，使归一化Transformer的学习率在模型宽度、深度和序列长度上可迁移。
analysis.research_motivation: 归一化Transformer（nGPT）虽能加速训练且无需权重衰减和预热，但其学习率无法在不同模型尺寸和序列长度间迁移，限制了超参数调优效率。
analysis.problem: nGPT缺乏学习率跨模型维度（宽度、深度）和序列长度的迁移能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验观察到nGPT的学习率不随模型维度和序列长度迁移，尽管其超参数已显式随模型大小缩放。
analysis.method: 结合数值实验和对齐指数原理，修改μP超参数迁移方法，提出νGPT参数化方案。
contributions: 揭示了nGPT学习率不可迁移的问题
提出νGPT参数化，实现学习率在宽度、深度和序列长度上的迁移
analysis.experiments: 通过大量实证验证，νGPT在宽度、深度和序列长度上均表现出学习率迁移能力。
limitations: 可能仅适用于归一化Transformer架构
未讨论其他超参数（如优化器动量）的迁移性
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实验充分，对Transformer训练有实际价值，但仅针对归一化架构。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出νGPT参数化方法，使归一化Transformer的学习率在模型宽度、深度和序列长度上可迁移。

papers.title: Detecting Clinical Discrepancies in Health Coaching Agents: A Dual-Stream Memory and Reconciliation Architecture
papers.abstract: As Large Language Model (LLM) agents transition from single-session tools to persistent systems managing longitudinal healthcare journeys, their memory architectures face a critical challenge: reconciling two imperfect sources of truth. The patient's evolving self-report is current but prone to recall bias, while the Electronic Health Record (EHR) is medically validated but frequently stale. General-purpose agent memory systems optimize for coherence by overwriting older facts with the user's latest statement, a pattern that risks safety failures when applied to clinical data. We introduce a Dual-Stream Memory Architecture that strictly separates the patient narrative from the structured clinical record (FHIR), governed by a dedicated Reconciliation Engine that evaluates every extracted memory against the patient's FHIR profile and classifies discrepancies by type, severity, and the specific FHIR resources involved. We evaluate this architecture on 26 patients across 675 longitudinal wellness coaching sessions, using a hybrid dataset that interleaves real provider-patient transcripts with synthetic, FHIR-grounded clinical scenarios. In isolated testing, the engine detects 84.4% of designed clinical discrepancies with 86.7% safety-critical recall. By coupling extraction and reconciliation evaluation on the same data, we directly quantify a 13.6% error cascade, tracing the degradation to clinical details lost during memory extraction from unstructured conversation rather than to downstream classification errors. These findings establish that validating patient-reported memories against clinical records is both feasible and necessary for safe deployment of longitudinal health agents.

analysis.tldr: 提出双流记忆与协调架构，用于检测健康教练智能体中的临床不一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM智能体从单会话工具转向长期医疗管理时，记忆架构面临患者自述（易有回忆偏差）与电子健康记录（可能过时）两种不完美信息源的协调挑战，通用记忆系统覆盖旧事实的模式在临床场景中可能导致安全风险。
analysis.problem: 如何严格分离患者叙述与结构化临床记录，并检测两者之间的临床不一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 双流记忆架构：严格分离患者叙述流与结构化临床记录（FHIR）流，并由协调引擎评估每条提取的记忆，根据类型、严重程度和涉及的FHIR资源对不一致进行分类。
contributions: 提出双流记忆与协调架构，专门用于健康教练智能体中的临床不一致性检测。
在26名患者、675次纵向健康指导会话上评估，检测到84.4%的设计不一致性，安全关键召回率86.7%。
量化了13.6%的错误级联，发现错误主要源于从非结构化对话中提取记忆时丢失临床细节，而非下游分类错误。
analysis.experiments: 在26名患者、675次纵向健康指导会话上评估，使用混合数据集（真实医患对话与合成FHIR场景）。孤立测试中引擎检测到84.4%的设计不一致性，安全关键召回率86.7%。通过耦合提取与协调评估，量化了13.6%的错误级联。
limitations: 数据集规模有限（26名患者），可能影响泛化性。
仅评估了设计的不一致性，未覆盖所有可能的临床差异。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法创新且针对医疗安全关键问题，实验充分，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出双流记忆与协调架构，用于检测健康教练智能体中的临床不一致性。

papers.title: Turning the TIDE: Cross-Architecture Distillation for Diffusion Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Diffusion large language models (dLLMs) offer parallel decoding and bidirectional context, but state-of-the-art dLLMs require billions of parameters for competitive performance. While existing distillation methods for dLLMs reduce inference steps within a single architecture, none address cross-architecture knowledge transfer, in which the teacher and student differ in architecture, attention mechanism, and tokenizer. We present TIDE, the first framework for cross-architecture dLLM distillation, comprising three modular components: (1) TIDAL, which jointly modulates distillation strength across training progress and diffusion timestep to account for the teacher's noise-dependent reliability; (2) CompDemo, which enriches the teacher's context via complementary mask splitting to improve predictions under heavy masking; and (3) Reverse CALM, a cross-tokenizer objective that inverts chunk-level likelihood matching, yielding bounded gradients and dual-end noise filtering. Distilling 8B dense and 16B MoE teachers into a 0.6B student via two heterogeneous pipelines outperforms the baseline by an average of 1.53 points across eight benchmarks, yielding notable gains in code generation, where HumanEval scores reach 48.78 compared to 32.3 for the AR baseline.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个跨架构扩散LLM蒸馏框架TIDE，通过三种模块将8B/16B教师蒸馏至0.6B学生，在8个基准上平均提升1.53分。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散大语言模型（dLLM）虽支持并行解码和双向上下文，但现有SOTA模型需数十亿参数才能达到竞争性能，且已有蒸馏方法仅限同架构内知识迁移，无法处理教师与学生架构、注意力机制和分词器不同的跨场景。

papers.title: Three-Step Nav: A Hierarchical Global-Local Planner for Zero-Shot Vision-and-Language Navigation
papers.abstract: Breakthrough progress in vision-based navigation through unknown environments has been achieved by using multimodal large language models (MLLMs). These models can plan a sequence of motions by evaluating the current view at each time step against the task and goal given to the agent. However, current zero-shot Vision-and-Language Navigation (VLN) agents powered by MLLMs still tend to drift off course, halt prematurely, and achieve low overall success rates. We propose Three-Step Nav to counteract these failures with a three-view protocol: First, "look forward" to extract global landmarks and sketch a coarse plan. Then, "look now" to align the current visual observation with the next sub-goal for fine-grained guidance. Finally, "look backward" audits the entire trajectory to correct accumulated drift before stopping. Requiring no gradient updates or task-specific fine-tuning, our planner drops into existing VLN pipelines with minimal overhead. Three-Step Nav achieves state-of-the-art zero-shot performance on the R2R-CE and RxR-CE dataset. Our code is available at https://github.com/ZoeyZheng0/3-step-Nav.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种三视角分层规划方法，无需微调即可显著提升零样本视觉语言导航的成功率。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前基于多模态大模型的零样本视觉语言导航代理容易偏离路线、过早停止，成功率低，需要一种无需额外训练即可提升导航鲁棒性的方法。
analysis.problem: 零样本视觉语言导航中代理的路径漂移、过早停止和低成功率问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出现有MLLM驱动的零样本VLN代理存在漂移、过早停止和低成功率等失败模式。
analysis.method: 提出Three-Step Nav，包含三个视角的规划协议：前瞻提取全局地标并规划粗路径，当前视角对齐子目标进行细粒度引导，后视审计整个轨迹以纠正累积漂移。无需梯度更新或任务微调。
contributions: 提出一种三视角分层规划方法，有效缓解零样本VLN中的漂移和过早停止问题。
在R2R-CE和RxR-CE数据集上取得零样本SOTA性能，且无需微调。

papers.title: ProcFunc: Function-Oriented Abstractions for Procedural 3D Generation in Python
papers.abstract: We introduce ProcFunc, a library for Blender-based procedural 3D generation in Python. ProcFunc provides a library of easy-to-use Python functions, which streamline creating, combining, analyzing, and executing procedural generation code. ProcFunc makes it easy to create large-scale diverse training data, by combinatorial compositions of semantic components. VLMs can use ProcFunc to edit procedural material and geometry code and can create new procedural code with significantly fewer coding errors. Finally, as an example use case, we use ProcFunc to develop a new procedural generator of indoor rooms, which includes a collection of new compositional procedural materials. We demonstrate the detail, runtime efficiency, and diversity of this room generator, as well as its use for 3D synthetic data generation. Please visit https://github.com/princeton-vl/procfunc for source code.

analysis.tldr: ProcFunc 是一个基于 Blender 的 Python 库，通过函数式抽象简化程序化 3D 生成，支持 VLM 编辑和创建程序化代码，并用于室内场景生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 程序化 3D 生成在创建大规模多样化训练数据方面具有潜力，但现有方法缺乏易用的抽象和组合能力，导致代码编写复杂且易出错。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个易于使用的函数库，以简化程序化 3D 生成代码的创建、组合、分析和执行，并支持 VLM 辅助编辑。

contributions: 提出了 ProcFunc 库，提供易用的函数式抽象用于程序化 3D 生成。
展示了 ProcFunc 在 VLM 辅助编辑和创建程序化代码中的应用。
开发了一个新的室内房间程序化生成器，并验证了其细节、效率和多样性。

papers.title: World2VLM: Distilling World Model Imagination into VLMs for Dynamic Spatial Reasoning
papers.abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) have shown strong performance on static visual understanding, yet they still struggle with dynamic spatial reasoning that requires imagining how scenes evolve under egocentric motion. Recent efforts address this limitation either by scaling spatial supervision with synthetic data or by coupling VLMs with world models at inference time. However, the former often lacks explicit modeling of motion-conditioned state transitions, while the latter incurs substantial computational overhead. In this work, we propose World2VLM, a training framework that distills spatial imagination from a generative world model into a vision-language model. Given an initial observation and a parameterized camera trajectory, we use a view-consistent world model to synthesize geometrically aligned future views and derive structured supervision for both forward (action-to-outcome) and inverse (outcome-to-action) spatial reasoning. We post-train the VLM with a two-stage recipe on a compact dataset generated by this pipeline and evaluate it on multiple spatial reasoning benchmarks. World2VLM delivers consistent improvements over the base model across diverse benchmarks, including SAT-Real, SAT-Synthesized, VSI-Bench, and MindCube. It also outperforms the test-time world-model-coupled methods while eliminating the need for expensive inference-time generation. Our results suggest that world models can serve not only as inference-time tools, but also as effective training-time teachers, enabling VLMs to internalize spatial imagination in a scalable and efficient manner.

analysis.tldr: World2VLM通过从生成式世界模型蒸馏空间想象力到VLM中，提升动态空间推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: VLM在静态视觉理解上表现良好，但在动态空间推理（如想象自我运动下场景如何演变）上仍存在困难。现有方法要么缺乏对运动条件状态转换的显式建模，要么在推理时耦合世界模型带来巨大计算开销。
analysis.problem: 如何让VLM高效地获得动态空间推理能力，而无需在推理时依赖昂贵的世界模型生成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出World2VLM训练框架，利用视图一致的世界模型合成几何对齐的未来视图，生成前向（动作到结果）和逆向（结果到动作）空间推理的结构化监督，并通过两阶段后训练将知识蒸馏到VLM中。
contributions: 提出World2VLM框架，将世界模型的空间想象力蒸馏到VLM中，提升动态空间推理能力。
在多个空间推理基准（SAT-Real, SAT-Synthesized, VSI-Bench, MindCube）上取得一致改进，且无需推理时生成。
analysis.experiments: 在SAT-Real、SAT-Synthesized、VSI-Bench和MindCube等多个空间推理基准上评估，World2VLM相比基础模型持续改进，并优于测试时耦合世界模型的方法。
limitations: 依赖生成式世界模型的质量和多样性。
可能仅适用于特定类型的空间推理任务。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，将世界模型作为训练时教师，实验充分且效果显著，与VLM方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: World2VLM通过从生成式世界模型蒸馏空间想象力到VLM中，提升动态空间推理能力。

papers.title: Two-View Accumulation as the Primary Training Lever for Hybrid-Capture Gaussian Splatting: A Variance-Decomposition View of When Gradient Surgery Helps
papers.abstract: Hybrid-capture novel view synthesis combines images at substantially different camera distances (e.g., aerial drone and ground-level views). Standard 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS), trained for 30K iterations with one rendered view per optimizer step, under-fits the minority regime by 1-3 dB on five hybrid-capture benchmarks. We isolate the lever that closes this gap. Among compute-matched alternatives -- vanilla 60K iterations, magnitude corrections (GradNorm), direction-aware near/far gradient surgery, projective preconditioning, confidence-gated sample-level surgery, and a random two-view-per-step control -- the simplest structural change wins: rendering two views per optimizer step. The pairing rule (geometry-defined near/far, random, or active loss-disparity) does not change PSNR beyond seed variance on any of the five scenes; the structural change of having two views per step does. We propose a variance-decomposition framework that predicts and explains this finding: under bimodal camera regimes, between-regime gradient variance turns out to be small relative to within-regime variance in 3DGS, so structured and random pairings are variance-equivalent in expectation, and the variance halving from two-view accumulation itself is the dominant effect. We verify the framework on five scenes whose camera-altitude bimodality coefficients span [0.55, 1.00], and we report the negative result that direction-aware projection, magnitude correction, confidence gating, and an active loss-disparity pairing all fall within seed variance of random two-view pairing. The two-view structural lever transfers cleanly to the Scaffold-GS and Pixel-GS backbones. We position this work as an honest characterization of which training-side axes do and do not move PSNR for hybrid-capture 3DGS, together with the framework that explains why.

analysis.tldr: 混合捕获新视角合成中，每步渲染两个视图比任何梯度手术技巧都更有效，方差分解框架解释了原因。
analysis.research_motivation: 混合捕获新视角合成（如无人机与地面视角）中，标准3DGS因训练视图单一而欠拟合少数视角，性能损失1-3 dB，亟需高效训练策略。
analysis.problem: 如何通过训练策略提升混合捕获场景下3DGS的新视角合成质量，并解释不同策略的有效性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出在双峰相机分布下，区间间梯度方差远小于区间内方差，因此结构化配对与随机配对在期望上方差等价，双视图累积的方差减半是主导效应。
analysis.method: 提出每步渲染两个视图的简单结构变化，并构建方差分解框架解释其有效性。
contributions: 发现每步两个视图的简单结构变化优于所有梯度手术技巧，是提升混合捕获3DGS性能的关键杠杆。
提出方差分解框架，预测并解释双视图累积的方差减半效应，验证了结构化与随机配对在期望上的等价性。
analysis.experiments: 在五个混合捕获基准场景上验证，相机高度双峰系数范围[0.55, 1.00]，报告了负结果：方向感知投影、幅度校正、置信门控和主动损失差异配对均未超越随机双视图配对。
limitations: 仅针对混合捕获场景，可能不适用于单峰或均匀相机分布。
未探索更多视图（如三视图）的潜在收益。

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 混合捕获新视角合成中，每步渲染两个视图比任何梯度手术技巧都更有效，方差分解框架解释了原因。

papers.title: Color-Encoded Illumination for High-Speed Volumetric Scene Reconstruction
papers.abstract: The task of capturing and rendering 3D dynamic scenes from 2D images has become increasingly popular in recent years. However, most conventional cameras are bandwidth-limited to 30-60 FPS, restricting these methods to static or slowly evolving scenes. While overcoming bandwidth limitations is difficult for general scenes, recent years have seen a flurry of computational imaging methods that yield high-speed videos using conventional cameras for specific applications (e.g., motion capture and particle image velocimetry). However, most of these methods require modifications to a camera's optics or the addition of mechanically moving components, limiting them to a single-view high-speed capture. Consequently, these methods cannot be readily used to capture a 3D representation of rapid scene motion. In this paper, we propose a novel method to capture and reconstruct a volumetric representation of a high-speed scene using only unaugmented low-speed cameras. Instead of modifying the hardware or optics of each individual camera, we encode high-speed scene dynamics by illuminating the scene with a rapid, sequential color-coded sequence. This results in simultaneous multi-view capture of the scene, where high-speed temporal information is encoded in the spatial intensity and color variations of the captured images. To construct a high-speed volumetric representation of the dynamic scene, we develop a novel dynamic Gaussian Splatting-based approach that decodes the temporal information from the images. We evaluate our approach on simulated scenes and real-world experiments using a multi-camera imaging setup, showing first-of-a-kind high-speed volumetric scene reconstructions.

analysis.tldr: 通过颜色编码照明实现低速相机对高速动态场景的3D体积重建。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统相机帧率有限（30-60 FPS），难以捕捉高速动态场景的3D表示；现有计算成像方法多需修改相机硬件或增加运动部件，且局限于单视角高速捕捉。
analysis.problem: 如何仅使用未改装的低速相机，从多视角2D图像中重建高速动态场景的3D体积表示。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 用快速顺序的颜色编码序列照明场景，将高速时间信息编码到捕获图像的空间强度和颜色变化中；然后基于动态高斯泼溅（Gaussian Splatting）方法解码时间信息，重建高速体积表示。
contributions: 提出一种仅用低速相机实现高速3D体积场景重建的方法，无需修改相机硬件或添加运动部件。
开发了基于动态高斯泼溅的解码方法，从颜色编码图像中恢复高速时间信息。
analysis.experiments: 在模拟场景和真实多相机实验上评估，展示了首次的高速体积场景重建。
limitations: 可能依赖特定的颜色编码序列和照明条件，泛化性需验证。
真实场景中颜色编码可能受环境光干扰，鲁棒性待评估。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，结合颜色编码与高斯泼溅实现高速3D重建，但实验信息有限，影响中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过颜色编码照明实现低速相机对高速动态场景的3D体积重建。

papers.title: Causal Learning with Neural Assemblies
papers.abstract: Can Neural Assemblies -- groups of neurons that fire together and strengthen through co-activation -- learn the direction of causal influence between variables? While established as a computationally general substrate for classification, parsing, and planning, neural assemblies have not yet been shown to internalize causal directionality. We demonstrate that the inherent operations of neural assemblies -- projection, local plasticity control, and sparse winner selection -- are sufficient for directional learning. We introduce DIRECT (DIRectional Edge Coupling/Training), a mechanism that co-activates source and target assemblies under an adaptive gain schedule to internalize directed relations. Unlike backpropagation-based methods, DIRECT relies solely on local plasticity, making the resulting causal claims auditable at the mechanism level. Our findings are verified through a dual-readout validation strategy: (i) synaptic-strength asymmetry, measuring the emergent weight gap between forward and reverse links, and (ii) functional propagation overlap, quantifying the reliability of directional signal flow. Across multiple domains, the framework achieves perfect structural recovery under a supervised, known-structure setting. These results establish neural assemblies as an auditable bridge between biologically plausible dynamics and formal causal models, offering an "explainable by design" framework where causal claims are traceable to specific neural winners and synaptic asymmetries.

analysis.tldr: 提出DIRECT机制，利用神经集群的局部可塑性学习因果方向，实现可审计的因果结构恢复。
analysis.research_motivation: 神经集群已被证明在分类、解析和规划中具有计算通用性，但尚未展示其内化因果方向的能力。现有因果学习方法多依赖反向传播，缺乏机制层面的可审计性。
analysis.problem: 如何让神经集群通过局部可塑性学习变量间的因果方向，并实现因果声明的机制级可审计性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。

contributions: 首次证明神经集群可通过其固有操作学习因果方向性。
提出DIRECT机制，实现基于局部可塑性的因果方向学习，无需反向传播。
设计双读出验证策略（突触强度不对称性和功能传播重叠），用于评估因果方向学习。
analysis.experiments: 在多个领域的有监督已知结构设置下，框架实现了完美的结构恢复。
limitations: 当前仅在有监督已知结构设置下验证，未知结构或噪声场景下的表现未知。
双读出验证策略可能对大规模网络的计算开销较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: causal reasoning
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，结合神经科学与因果推理，但实验设置较理想化，影响和相关性中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出DIRECT机制，利用神经集群的局部可塑性学习因果方向，实现可审计的因果结构恢复。

papers.title: AnimateAnyMesh++: A Flexible 4D Foundation Model for High-Fidelity Text-Driven Mesh Animation
papers.abstract: Recent advances in 4D content generation have attracted increasing attention, yet creating high-quality animated 3D models remains challenging due to the complexity of modeling spatio-temporal distributions and the scarcity of 4D training data. We present AnimateAnyMesh++, a feed-forward framework for text-driven animation of arbitrary 3D meshes with substantial upgrades in data, architecture, and generative capability. First, we expand the DyMesh-XL dataset by mining dynamic content from Objaverse-XL, increasing the number of unique identities from 60K to 300K and substantially broadening category and motion diversity. Second, we redesign DyMeshVAE-Flex with power-law topology-aware attention and vertex-normal enhanced features, which significantly improves trajectory reconstruction, local geometry preservation, and mitigates trajectory-sticking artifacts. Third, we introduce architectural changes to both DyMeshVAE-Flex and the rectified-flow (RF) generator to support variable-length sequence training and generation, enabling longer animations while preserving reconstruction fidelity. Extensive experiments demonstrate that AnimateAnyMesh++ generates semantically accurate and temporally coherent mesh animations within seconds, surpassing prior approaches in quality and efficiency. The enlarged DyMesh-XL, the upgraded DyMeshVAE-Flex, and variable-length RF together deliver consistent gains across benchmarks and in-the-wild meshes. We will release code, models, and the expanded DyMesh-XL upon acceptance of this manuscript to facilitate research in 4D content creation.

analysis.tldr: 提出AnimateAnyMesh++，一种前馈式4D基础模型，通过大规模数据、拓扑感知VAE和变长流生成实现高质量文本驱动网格动画。
analysis.research_motivation: 4D内容生成中，高质量动画3D模型因时空分布建模复杂和4D训练数据稀缺而面临挑战。
analysis.problem: 如何实现任意3D网格的高保真文本驱动动画，克服数据不足、轨迹伪影和固定长度限制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。

papers.title: ClawGym: A Scalable Framework for Building Effective Claw Agents
papers.abstract: Claw-style environments support multi-step workflows over local files, tools, and persistent workspace states. However, scalable development around these environments remains constrained by the absence of a systematic framework, especially one for synthesizing verifiable training data and integrating it with agent training and diagnostic evaluation. To address this challenge, we present ClawGym, a scalable framework that supports the full lifecycle of Claw-style personal agent development. Concretely, we construct ClawGym-SynData, a diverse dataset of 13.5K filtered tasks synthesized from persona-driven intents and skill-grounded operations, paired with realistic mock workspaces and hybrid verification mechanisms. We then train a family of capable Claw-style models, termed ClawGym-Agents, through supervised fine-tuning on black-box rollout trajectories, and further explore reinforcement learning via a lightweight pipeline that parallelizes rollouts across per-task sandboxes.To support reliable evaluation, we further construct ClawGym-Bench, a benchmark of 200 instances calibrated through automated filtering and human-LLM review. Relevant resources will be soon released at https://github.com/ClawGym.

analysis.tldr: 提出ClawGym框架，覆盖Claw风格智能体从数据合成、训练到评测的全生命周期。
analysis.research_motivation: Claw风格环境支持多步工作流，但缺乏系统化的框架来合成可验证训练数据并集成智能体训练与诊断评估。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个可扩展的框架，支持Claw风格个人智能体的数据合成、训练和评测全流程。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建ClawGym框架，包括：1) ClawGym-SynData数据集（13.5K过滤任务，基于人物驱动意图和技能操作合成，配以模拟工作空间和混合验证机制）；2) ClawGym-Agents模型族，通过监督微调黑盒轨迹训练，并探索轻量级强化学习管线；3) ClawGym-Bench基准（200实例，经自动过滤和人-LLM审核校准）。

papers.title: Recent Advances in mm-Wave and Sub-THz/THz Oscillators for FutureG Technologies
papers.abstract: This paper provides a concise yet comprehensive review of recent advancements in millimeter-wave (mm-wave) oscillators below 100 GHz and sub-terahertz (sub-THz/THz) oscillators above 100 GHz for next-generation computing and communication systems, including 5G, 6G, and beyond. Various design approaches, including CMOS, SiGe, and III-V semiconductor technologies, are explored in terms of performance metrics such as phase noise, output power, efficiency, frequency tunability, and stability. The review highlights key challenges in achieving high-performance and reliable oscillator designs while discussing emerging techniques for performance enhancement. By evaluating recent design trends, this work aims to offer valuable insights and design guidelines that facilitate the development of robust mm-wave and sub-THz/THz oscillators for future communication, computing, and sensing applications.

analysis.tldr: 综述毫米波和亚太赫兹振荡器在5G/6G中的最新进展、设计挑战与性能增强技术。
analysis.research_motivation: 下一代通信和计算系统（如5G/6G）对高频振荡器的性能要求极高，而现有设计在相位噪声、输出功率、效率、调谐范围和稳定性等方面面临严峻挑战，亟需系统性的综述来指导设计。

papers.title: Graph-based Semantic Calibration Network for Unaligned UAV RGBT Image Semantic Segmentation and A Large-scale Benchmark
papers.abstract: Fine-grained RGBT image semantic segmentation is crucial for all-weather unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) scene understanding. However, UAV RGBT image semantic segmentation faces two coupled challenges: cross-modal spatial misalignment caused by sensor parallax and platform vibration, and severe semantic confusion among fine-grained ground objects under top-down aerial views. To address these issues, we propose a Graph-based Semantic Calibration Network (GSCNet) for unaligned UAV RGBT image semantic segmentation. Specifically, we design a Feature Decoupling and Alignment Module (FDAM) that decouples each modality into shared structural and private perceptual components and performs deformable alignment in the shared subspace, enabling robust spatial correction with reduced modality appearance interference. Moreover, we propose a Semantic Graph Calibration Module (SGCM) that explicitly encodes the hierarchical taxonomy and co-occurrence regularities among ground-object categories in UAV scenes into a structured category graph, and incorporates these priors into graph-attention reasoning to calibrate predictions of visually similar and rare categories. In addition, we construct the Unaligned RGB-Thermal Fine-grained (URTF) benchmark, to the best of our knowledge, the largest and most fine-grained benchmark for unaligned UAV RGBT image semantic segmentation, containing over 25,000 image pairs across 61 semantic categories with realistic cross-modal misalignment. Extensive experiments on URTF demonstrate that GSCNet significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods, with notable gains on fine-grained categories. The dataset is available at https://github.com/mmic-lcl/Datasets-and-benchmark-code.

analysis.tldr: 提出图语义校准网络GSCNet和最大规模未对齐无人机RGBT语义分割基准URTF，解决跨模态空间错位和细粒度语义混淆问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 无人机全天候场景理解需要细粒度RGBT语义分割，但传感器视差和平台振动导致跨模态空间错位，且俯视视角下细粒度地物语义混淆严重，现有方法难以同时应对这两个耦合挑战。
analysis.problem: 未对齐无人机RGBT图像中跨模态空间错位和细粒度地物语义混淆问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出图语义校准网络GSCNet，包含特征解耦对齐模块（FDAM）和语义图校准模块（SGCM）。FDAM将各模态解耦为共享结构成分和私有感知成分，在共享子空间进行可变形对齐；SGCM将地物类别层次结构和共现规律编码为结构化类别图，通过图注意力推理校准预测。
contributions: 提出GSCNet，通过特征解耦对齐和语义图校准有效处理未对齐RGBT分割中的空间错位和语义混淆。
构建URTF基准，包含超过25000对图像、61个语义类别，是最大最细粒度的未对齐无人机RGBT语义分割基准。
analysis.experiments: 在URTF基准上进行了大量实验，GSCNet显著优于现有方法，尤其在细粒度类别上提升明显。

可变形对齐的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强（图语义校准+特征解耦对齐），构建了大规模基准，实验充分，与视觉理解方向高度相关。

papers.title: AdvDMD: Adversarial Reward Meets DMD For High-Quality Few-Step Generation
papers.abstract: Diffusion models offer superior generation quality at the expense of extensive sampling steps. Distillation methods, with Distribution Matching Distillation (DMD) as a popular example, can mitigate this issue, but performance degradation remains pronounced when sampling steps are limited. Reinforcement learning (RL) has been leveraged to improve the few-step generation quality during distillation, with the potential to even surpass the performance of the teacher model. However, existing approaches are combinatorial in nature, merely integrating an RL process with the distillation process, which introduces unnecessary complexities. To address this gap, we propose AdvDMD, a method that seamlessly unifies DMD distillation and RL. Specifically, AdvDMD employs the adversarially trained discriminator from DMD2 as the reward model, which assigns low scores to generated images and high scores to real ones. It is trained on both intermediate and final states of the denoising process and updated online with the distilled model, enabling a holistic supervision of the sampling trajectories and mitigating reward hacking. We adopt a unified SDE backward simulation and a different training schedule for DMD and RL to enable a more stable and efficient training. Experimental results demonstrate that the 4-step AdvDMD outperforms the original 40-step model for SD3.5 on DPG-Bench, while achieving significant performance gains for SD3 on the GenEval. On Qwen-Image, our 2-step AdvDMD achieves superior performance over TwinFlow.

analysis.tldr: AdvDMD 将 DMD 蒸馏与对抗性奖励统一，实现少步高质量生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散模型采样步数多，蒸馏方法在少步时性能下降，现有 RL 增强方法组合复杂且引入不必要的复杂性。
analysis.problem: 如何无缝统一 DMD 蒸馏和 RL 以提升少步生成质量并避免奖励破解。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: AdvDMD 使用 DMD2 的对抗训练判别器作为奖励模型，对中间和最终状态打分，在线更新，并采用统一的 SDE 反向模拟和不同的训练调度。
contributions: 提出 AdvDMD，将 DMD 蒸馏与对抗性奖励统一，简化了 RL 增强的蒸馏流程。
在多个模型上实现少步生成超越教师模型性能，如 4 步 SD3.5 优于 40 步模型。
analysis.experiments: 在 SD3.5、SD3 和 Qwen-Image 上评估，使用 DPG-Bench 和 GenEval 基准，4 步 AdvDMD 优于 40 步 SD3.5，2 步 AdvDMD 优于 TwinFlow。
limitations: 可能依赖特定判别器架构，泛化性需验证。
训练调度复杂度可能影响可复现性。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实验效果好，与扩散模型少步生成方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AdvDMD 将 DMD 蒸馏与对抗性奖励统一，实现少步高质量生成。

papers.title: SEAL: Semantic-aware Single-image Sticker Personalization with a Large-scale Sticker-tag Dataset
papers.abstract: Synthesizing a target concept from a single reference image is challenging in diffusion-based personalized text-to-image generation, particularly for sticker personalization where prompts often require explicit attribute edits. With only one reference, test-time fine-tuning (TTF) methods tend to overfit, producing \textit{visual entanglement}, where background artifacts are absorbed into the learned concept, and \textit{structural rigidity}, where the model memorizes reference-specific spatial configurations and loses contextual controllability. To address these issues, we introduce \textbf{SE}mantic-aware single-image sticker person\textbf{AL}ization (\textbf{SEAL}), a plug-and-play, architecture-agnostic adaptation module that integrates into existing personalization pipelines without modifying their U-Net-based diffusion backbones. SEAL applies three components during embedding adaptation: (1) a Semantic-guided Spatial Attention Loss, (2) a Split-merge Token Strategy, and (3) Structure-aware Layer Restriction. To support sticker-domain personalization with attribute-level control, we present StickerBench, a large-scale sticker image dataset with structured tags under a six-attribute schema (Appearance, Emotion, Action, Camera Composition, Style, Background). These annotations provide a consistent interface for varying context while keeping target identity fixed, enabling systematic evaluation of identity disentanglement and contextual controllability. Experiments show that SEAL consistently improves identity preservation while maintaining contextual controllability, highlighting the importance of explicit spatial and structural constraints during test-time adaptation. The code, StickerBench, and project page will be publicly released.

analysis.tldr: 提出SEAL模块和StickerBench数据集，解决单图贴纸个性化中的视觉纠缠和结构僵化问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散模型在单图个性化生成中，测试时微调方法容易过拟合，导致背景伪影被吸收（视觉纠缠）和空间结构固化（结构僵化），尤其在贴纸个性化中需要显式属性编辑时问题更突出。
analysis.problem: 单参考图像贴纸个性化中的视觉纠缠和结构僵化问题，以及缺乏支持属性级控制的贴纸数据集。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出测试时微调方法存在两种失败模式：视觉纠缠（背景伪影融入学习概念）和结构僵化（模型记忆参考图空间配置，失去上下文可控性）。
analysis.method: 提出SEAL，一个即插即用、架构无关的适配模块，包含三个组件：语义引导的空间注意力损失、分割-合并令牌策略、结构感知层限制。同时构建StickerBench数据集，包含六属性标签（外观、情感、动作、相机构图、风格、背景）。
contributions: 提出SEAL模块，有效缓解单图贴纸个性化中的视觉纠缠和结构僵化。
构建StickerBench大规模贴纸数据集，包含六属性结构化标签，支持属性级控制评估。
analysis.experiments: 实验表明SEAL在保持身份一致性和上下文可控性上均有提升，但摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖StickerBench数据集，泛化到其他领域需验证。
SEAL作为插件模块，可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且针对贴纸个性化痛点，数据集有实用价值，但实验细节不足。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SEAL模块和StickerBench数据集，解决单图贴纸个性化中的视觉纠缠和结构僵化问题。

papers.title: Uncertainty-Aware Pedestrian Attribute Recognition via Evidential Deep Learning
papers.abstract: We propose UAPAR, an Uncertainty-Aware Pedestrian Attribute Recognition framework. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first EDL-based uncertainty-aware framework for pedestrian attribute recognition (PAR). Unlike conventional deterministic methods, which fail to assess prediction reliability on low-quality samples, UAPAR effectively identifies unreliable predictions and thus enhances system robustness in complex real-world scenarios. To achieve this, UAPAR incorporates Evidential Deep Learning (EDL) into a CLIP-based architecture. Specifically, a Region-Aware Evidence Reasoning module employs cross-attention and spatial prior masks to capture fine-grained local features, which are further processed by an evidence head to estimate attribute-wise epistemic uncertainty. To further enhance training robustness, we develop an uncertainty-guided dual-stage curriculum learning strategy to alleviate the adverse effects of severe label noise during training. Extensive experiments on the PA100K, PETA, RAPv1, and RAPv2 datasets demonstrate that UAPAR achieves competitive or superior performance. Furthermore, qualitative results confirm that the proposed framework generates uncertainty estimates that are predictive of challenging or erroneous samples.

analysis.tldr: 首个基于证据深度学习的不确定性感知行人属性识别框架，通过CLIP架构和区域感知证据推理模块提升鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统行人属性识别方法无法评估低质量样本的预测可靠性，在复杂真实场景中鲁棒性不足。
analysis.problem: 如何让行人属性识别模型具备不确定性感知能力，以识别不可靠预测并提升系统鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将证据深度学习（EDL）融入CLIP架构，设计区域感知证据推理模块（使用交叉注意力和空间先验掩码提取细粒度局部特征），并通过证据头估计属性级认知不确定性；同时提出不确定性引导的双阶段课程学习策略缓解标签噪声。
contributions: 首次将证据深度学习应用于行人属性识别，提出不确定性感知框架UAPAR。
设计区域感知证据推理模块和不确定性引导的课程学习策略，提升模型在复杂场景下的鲁棒性和性能。
analysis.experiments: 在PA100K、PETA、RAPv1和RAPv2四个数据集上进行了实验，UAPAR取得了有竞争力或更优的性能，定性结果验证了不确定性估计能预测困难或错误样本。
limitations: 可能依赖CLIP预训练模型，计算资源需求较高。
课程学习策略的阈值设定可能需要针对不同数据集调整。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 首次将EDL引入行人属性识别，方法有创新性且实验充分，但属于特定应用方向，与核心关注点中等相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个基于证据深度学习的不确定性感知行人属性识别框架，通过CLIP架构和区域感知证据推理模块提升鲁棒性。

papers.title: KAYRA: A Microservice Architecture for AI-Assisted Karyotyping with Cloud and On-Premise Deployment
papers.abstract: We present KAYRA, an end-to-end karyotyping system that operates inside the operational constraints of a clinical cytogenetic laboratory. KAYRA is architected as a containerized microservice pipeline whose ML stack combines an EfficientNet-B5 + U-Net semantic segmenter, a Mask R-CNN (ResNet-50 + FPN) instance detector, and a ResNet-18 classifier, orchestrated through a cascaded ROI-narrowing strategy that focuses each downstream model on the chromosome-bearing region. The same container images are deployed both as a cloud service and as an on-premise installation, supporting clinical environments where patient-data egress is not permitted as well as those where it is. A pilot clinical evaluation against two commercial reference karyotyping systems on 459 chromosomes from 10 metaphase spreads shows segmentation accuracy of 98.91 % (vs. 78.21 % / 40.52 %), classification accuracy of 89.1 % (vs. 86.9 % / 54.5 %), and rotation accuracy of 89.76 % (vs. 94.55 % / 78.43 %). KAYRA improves over the older density-thresholding reference on all three axes (p < 0.0001 for segmentation and classification by Fisher's exact test on chromosome-level counts), and on segmentation also against the modern AI- supported reference (p < 0.0001); on classification the difference vs. the modern AI reference is not statistically significant at the present test-set size (p = 0.34). The system reaches TRL 6 maturity and integrates the human-in-the-loop expert-review workflow that diagnostic cytogenetic practice requires. The thesis of this paper is that a multi-model cytogenetic AI service can be packaged as a microservice architecture supporting flexible deployment - cloud-hosted or on-premise - while delivering strong empirical performance on a pilot clinical evaluation.

analysis.tldr: KAYRA是一个基于微服务架构的核型分析系统，支持云端和本地部署，在临床评估中分割准确率达98.91%。
analysis.research_motivation: 临床细胞遗传学实验室需要高效、准确的核型分析系统，但现有商业系统性能有限，且临床环境对数据隐私和部署灵活性有严格要求。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个端到端的核型分析系统，在满足临床操作约束（如数据不出院）的同时，实现高精度分割、分类和旋转校正。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用容器化微服务架构，ML栈包括EfficientNet-B5+U-Net语义分割器、Mask R-CNN实例检测器和ResNet-18分类器，通过级联ROI缩小策略聚焦染色体区域，支持云端和本地部署。
contributions: 提出KAYRA，一个端到端的核型分析系统，采用微服务架构支持灵活部署。
在459条染色体的临床评估中，分割准确率98.91%，分类准确率89.1%，旋转准确率89.76%，显著优于传统方法。
analysis.experiments: 在459条染色体（来自10个中期分裂相）上进行临床评估，与两个商业参考系统对比，报告了分割、分类和旋转准确率及统计显著性。
limitations: 分类准确率与现代化AI参考系统无显著差异（p=0.34），可能受限于测试集大小。
旋转准确率低于其中一个商业系统（89.76% vs 94.55%）。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
