papers.title: $\text{PKS}^4$:Parallel Kinematic Selective State Space Scanners for Efficient Video Understanding
papers.abstract: Temporal modeling remains a fundamental challenge in video understanding, particularly as sequence lengths scale. Traditional video models relying on dense spatiotemporal attention suffer from quadratic computational costs for long videos. To circumvent these costs, recent approaches adapt image models for videos via Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning (PEFT) methods such as adapters. However, deeply inserting these modules incurs prohibitive activation memory overhead during back-propagation. While recent efficient State Space Models (SSMs) introduce linear complexity, they disrupt 2D spatial relationships and rely on extensive masked pre-training to recover spatial awareness. To overcome these limitations, we propose Parallel Kinematic Selective State Space Scanners (PKS$^4$). We retain a standard 2D vision backbone for spatial semantics and insert a single plug-and-play PKS$^4$ module with linear-complexity temporal scanning, avoiding temporal attention and multi-layer adapters. We first extract kinematic priors via a Kinematic Prior Encoder, which captures local displacements and motion boundaries through inter-frame correlations and differences. These priors drive linear-complexity SSMs to track underlying kinematic states, adaptively modulating update speeds and read-write strategies at each time step. Instead of global scanning, we deploy parallel scanners along the temporal dimension for each spatial location, preserving spatial structures while reducing overhead. Experiments on spatial-heavy and temporal-heavy action recognition benchmarks show that PKS$^4$ achieves state-of-the-art performance. Remarkably, our method converges in merely $20$ epochs, achieving approximately $10\times$ lower training compute than pure video SSMs, establishing a new paradigm for efficient video understanding.

analysis.tldr: 提出PKS⁴模块，用线性复杂度的并行运动先验SSM扫描替代视频理解中的时空注意力，实现高效训练与SOTA性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 视频理解中长序列的时间建模是关键挑战，传统密集时空注意力计算成本高，而现有高效方法（如适配器）在反向传播时激活内存开销大，纯SSM会破坏2D空间结构且依赖大规模掩码预训练。
analysis.problem: 如何在不破坏空间结构、不增加训练内存开销的前提下，实现线性复杂度的视频时间建模。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 保留标准2D视觉骨干，插入单个PKS⁴模块：先通过运动先验编码器提取局部位移和运动边界，驱动线性复杂度SSM跟踪运动状态，并在每个空间位置沿时间维度部署并行扫描器，避免全局扫描。
contributions: 提出PKS⁴模块，结合运动先验与并行SSM扫描，实现线性复杂度时间建模。
在空间和时间密集型动作识别基准上达到SOTA，仅需20轮训练，训练计算量比纯视频SSM低约10倍。
analysis.experiments: 在空间密集和时间密集的动作识别基准上评估，达到SOTA性能，训练仅需20轮，计算量降低约10倍。
limitations: 可能对极长视频或复杂场景的泛化性需进一步验证。
运动先验编码器可能依赖特定帧间差异假设。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新（运动先验+并行SSM）且实验显示显著效率提升，与视频理解方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出PKS⁴模块，用线性复杂度的并行运动先验SSM扫描替代视频理解中的时空注意力，实现高效训练与SOTA性能。

papers.title: Naamah: A Large Scale Synthetic Sanskrit NER Corpus via DBpedia Seeding and LLM Generation
papers.abstract: The digitisation of classical Sanskrit literature is impeded by a scarcity of annotated resources, particularly for Named Entity Recognition. While recent methodologies utilise generic Large Language Models (LLMs) for data augmentation, these approaches remain prone to error and often lack the reasoning depth required for classical grammar. In this work, we introduce Naamah, a high quality silver standard Sanskrit NER dataset comprising 102,942 sentences. We propose a methodology that combines entity extraction from DBpedia with the generative capabilities of a 24B parameter hybrid reasoning model to create grammatically natural and synthetically diverse training data. We utilize this dataset to benchmark two transformer architectures: the massive multilingual XLM RoBERTa and the parameter efficient IndicBERTv2.

analysis.tldr: 提出结合DBpedia实体抽取和LLM生成的大规模梵语NER数据集Naamah，并评测两种Transformer模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 梵语古典文献数字化受限于标注资源稀缺，现有LLM数据增强方法易出错且缺乏古典语法推理深度。
analysis.problem: 构建高质量、大规模、语法自然的梵语命名实体识别（NER）训练数据集。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 从DBpedia抽取实体，利用24B参数混合推理模型生成语法自然且多样化的合成句子，构建102,942句银标准数据集。
contributions: 提出Naamah，首个大规模高质量梵语NER数据集（102,942句）。
提出结合知识库实体抽取与LLM生成的数据构建方法论。
在Naamah上评测XLM-RoBERTa和IndicBERTv2两种Transformer架构。

papers.title: Last-Layer-Centric Feature Recombination: Unleashing 3D Geometric Knowledge in DINOv3 for Monocular Depth Estimation
papers.abstract: Monocular depth estimation (MDE) is a fundamental yet inherently ill-posed task. Recent vision foundation models (VFMs), particularly DINO-based transformers, have significantly improved accuracy and generalization for dense prediction. Prior works generally follow a unified paradigm: sampling a fixed set of intermediate transformer layers at uniform intervals to build multi-scale features. This common practice implicitly assumes that geometric information is uniformly distributed across layers, which may underutilize the structural 3D cues encoded in VFMs. In this study, we present a systematic layer-wise analysis of DINOv3, revealing that 3D information is distributed non-uniformly: deeper layers exhibit stronger depth predictability and better capture inter-sample geometric variation. Motivated by this, we introduce a Last-Layer-Centric Feature Recombination (LFR) module to enhance geometric expressiveness. LFR treats the final layer as a geometric anchor and adaptively selects complementary intermediate layers according to a minimal-similarity criterion. Selected features are fused with the last-layer representation via compact linear adapters.Extensive experiments show that LFR module consistently improves MDE accuracy and achieves state-of-the-art performance. Our analysis sheds light on how geometric knowledge is organized within VFMs and offers an efficient strategy for unlocking their potential in dense 3D tasks.

analysis.tldr: 通过系统分析DINOv3各层深度预测能力，发现深层编码更强3D信息，提出以最后一层为锚点、按最小相似度选择互补中间层的特征重组模块，提升单目深度估计性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法通常均匀采样中间层特征构建多尺度表示，假设几何信息在各层均匀分布，可能未充分利用视觉基础模型中编码的结构性3D线索。
analysis.problem: 如何有效利用DINOv3中非均匀分布的3D几何知识来提升单目深度估计的准确性和泛化能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 对DINOv3进行逐层分析发现：3D信息分布非均匀，深层具有更强的深度可预测性，且能更好捕捉样本间几何变化。
analysis.method: 提出最后一层为中心的特征重组（LFR）模块：将最后一层视为几何锚点，根据最小相似度准则自适应选择互补的中间层，通过紧凑线性适配器将所选特征与最后一层表示融合。
contributions: 系统分析了DINOv3中3D几何知识的逐层分布规律，揭示了深层编码更强深度信息。
提出LFR模块，以最后一层为锚点自适应重组中间层特征，有效提升单目深度估计精度。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集上实验表明LFR模块持续提升MDE精度并达到最先进性能。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 仅针对DINOv3进行分析，可能不直接适用于其他视觉基础模型。
LFR模块的适应性选择机制可能增加计算开销，需进一步评估效率。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过系统分析DINOv3各层深度预测能力，发现深层编码更强3D信息，提出以最后一层为锚点、按最小相似度选择互补中间层的特征重组模块，提升单目深度估计性能。

papers.title: Attribution-Guided Multimodal Deepfake Detection via Cross-Modal Forensic Fingerprints
papers.abstract: Audio-visual deepfakes have reached a level of realism that makes perceptual detection unreliable, threatening media integrity and biometric security. While multimodal detection has shown promise, most approaches are binary classification tasks that often latch onto dataset-specific artifacts rather than genuine generative traces. We argue that a detector incapable of identifying how a video was forged is likely learning the wrong signal. Unlike binary detection, attribution-guided learning imposes a stronger geometric constraint on the shared embedding space, forcing the model to encode generator-specific forensic content rather than shortcuts. We propose the Attribution-Guided Multimodal Deepfake Detection (AMDD) framework, which jointly learns to detect and attribute manipulation. AMDD treats generator attribution as a structured regularization that constrains representation geometry toward forensically meaningful features. We introduce a Cross-Modal Forensic Fingerprint Consistency (CMFFC) loss to enforce alignment between generator-induced artifacts in visual and audio streams. This exploits the fact that coherent manipulation leaves correlated traces across modalities, grounded in the physical coupling between speech and facial articulation that synthetic pipelines routinely disrupt. Architecturally, we pair a ResNet50 with temporal attention for visual encoding against a pretrained ResNet18 for mel spectrograms, closing the encoder capacity gap found in prior models. On FakeAVCeleb, AMDD achieves 99.7% balanced accuracy and 99.8% AUC with 95.9% attribution accuracy. Cross-dataset evaluation on DeepfakeTIMIT, DFDM, and LAV-DF confirms that real video detection generalizes robustly, while fake detection on unseen generators remains an open challenge that we analyze in depth.

analysis.tldr: 提出AMDD框架，通过跨模态法医指纹一致性损失实现音视频深度伪造的检测与归因联合学习。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有音视频深度伪造检测方法多为二分类，容易学习数据集特定伪影而非真实生成痕迹，且无法识别伪造来源，导致泛化性差。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个既能检测伪造又能归因生成器、且避免学习捷径特征的音视频深度伪造检测方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，无法识别伪造方式的检测器很可能学习了错误信号；跨模态伪造会留下相关痕迹，而合成管道通常会破坏语音与面部运动之间的物理耦合。
analysis.method: 提出AMDD框架，将生成器归因作为结构化正则化约束表示几何，并引入跨模态法医指纹一致性（CMFFC）损失对齐视觉和音频流中的生成器伪影。
contributions: 提出归因引导的多模态深度伪造检测框架，联合学习检测与归因。
设计跨模态法医指纹一致性损失，利用模态间伪造痕迹的相关性。
在FakeAVCeleb上达到99.7%平衡准确率和99.8% AUC，归因准确率95.9%。
analysis.experiments: 在FakeAVCeleb上评估，并在DeepfakeTIMIT、DFDM、LAV-DF上进行跨数据集测试，真实视频检测泛化良好，但未见生成器的伪造检测仍是开放挑战。
limitations: 跨数据集评估中，对未见生成器的伪造检测泛化性不足。
方法依赖预训练编码器，可能受限于特征提取能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验效果好，但跨数据集泛化仍有挑战，适合精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出AMDD框架，通过跨模态法医指纹一致性损失实现音视频深度伪造的检测与归因联合学习。

papers.title: Binary Spiking Neural Networks as Causal Models
papers.abstract: We provide a causal analysis of Binary Spiking Neural Networks (BSNNs) to explain their behavior. We formally define a BSNN and represent its spiking activity as a binary causal model. Thanks to this causal representation, we are able to explain the output of the network by leveraging logic-based methods. In particular, we show that we can successfully use a SAT as well as a SMT solver to compute abductive explanations from this binary causal model. To illustrate our approach, we trained the BSNN on the standard MNIST dataset and applied our SAT-based and SMT-based methods to finding abductive explanations of the network's classifications based on pixel-level features. We also compared the found explanations against SHAP, a popular method used in the area of explainable AI. We show that, unlike SHAP, our approach guarantees that a found explanation does not contain completely irrelevant features.

analysis.tldr: 将二值脉冲神经网络建模为因果模型，利用SAT/SMT求解器生成保证无冗余特征的因果解释。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有可解释AI方法（如SHAP）可能包含无关特征，缺乏因果保证，而脉冲神经网络作为生物启发模型缺乏严格的因果解释框架。
analysis.problem: 如何为二值脉冲神经网络（BSNN）提供基于因果模型的、保证无冗余特征的解释。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将BSNN的脉冲活动形式化为二值因果模型，利用SAT或SMT求解器计算溯因解释（abductive explanations）。
contributions: 首次对BSNN进行因果分析，将其脉冲活动表示为二值因果模型。
提出基于SAT/SMT的溯因解释方法，保证解释中不包含完全无关的特征。
analysis.experiments: 在MNIST数据集上训练BSNN，使用SAT和SMT方法生成基于像素级特征的溯因解释，并与SHAP对比。摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于二值脉冲神经网络，泛化性有限。
SAT/SMT求解器在大规模网络上的计算效率可能成为瓶颈。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，将因果模型与SNN结合，但实验规模较小，应用范围有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将二值脉冲神经网络建模为因果模型，利用SAT/SMT求解器生成保证无冗余特征的因果解释。

papers.title: Beyond Accuracy: LLM Variability in Evidence Screening for Software Engineering SLRs
papers.abstract: Context: Study screening in systematic literature reviews is costly, inconsistency-prone, and risk-asymmetric, since false negatives can compromise validity. Despite rapid uptake of Large Language Models (LLMs), there is limited evidence on how such models behave during the study screening phase, particularly regarding the choice of specific LLMs and their comparison with classical models. Objective: To assess LLM performance and variability in screening, quantify the impact of input metadata (abstract, title, keywords), and compare LLMs with classical classifiers under a shared protocol. Methods: We analyzed 12 LLMs from 4 providers (OpenAI, Google Gemini, Anthropic, Llama) and 4 classical models (Logistic Regression, Support Vector Classification, Random Forest, and Naive Bayes) on 2 real Systematic Literature Reviews (SLRs), totaling 518 papers. The experimental design investigated 3 critical dimensions: (i) LLMs performance variability, (ii) the impact of input feature composition (abstract, title, and keywords) on LLM performance, and (iii) the real gain of using LLMs instead of more traditional classification models. Results: LLMs exhibited substantial heterogeneity and residual non-determinism even at temperature zero. Abstract availability was decisive: removing it consistently degraded performance, while adding title and/or keywords to the abstract yielded no robust gains. Compared to classical models, performance differences were not consistent enough to support generalizable LLM superiority. Discussion: LLM adoption should be justified by operational and governance constraints (reproducibility, cost, metadata availability), supported by pilot validation and explicit reporting of variability and input configuration.

analysis.tldr: LLM在软件工程系统文献综述的筛选阶段表现不稳定，且并不总是优于传统分类器。
analysis.research_motivation: 系统文献综述中的研究筛选成本高、易出错，且假阴性会损害有效性，尽管LLM被广泛使用，但对其在筛选阶段的行为和变异性缺乏系统评估。
analysis.problem: 评估LLM在软件工程系统文献综述筛选中的性能、变异性，并与传统分类器进行比较。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM表现出显著的异质性和残余非确定性（即使温度为零）；摘要的可用性对性能至关重要，而添加标题和/或关键词没有稳健的提升；LLM与传统模型相比性能差异不一致，无法支持LLM的普遍优越性。
analysis.method: 在2个真实系统文献综述（共518篇论文）上，分析来自4个提供商的12个LLM和4个经典模型，考察三个维度：LLM性能变异性、输入特征组成的影响、LLM相对于传统模型的真实增益。
contributions: 系统评估了LLM在软件工程SLR筛选中的性能变异性和输入特征影响。
揭示了LLM并不总是优于传统分类器，建议采用LLM需基于操作和治理约束。
analysis.experiments: 在2个真实SLR数据集（共518篇论文）上，测试了12个LLM和4个经典模型，比较了不同输入特征组合下的性能。
limitations: 仅基于两个SLR数据集，可能不具广泛代表性。
未深入分析LLM变异的根本原因。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法系统但实验规模有限，贡献在于揭示LLM变异性而非提出新方法。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM在软件工程系统文献综述的筛选阶段表现不稳定，且并不总是优于传统分类器。

papers.title: Are Data Augmentation and Segmentation Always Necessary? Insights from COVID-19 X-Rays and a Methodology Thereof
papers.abstract: Purpose: Rapid and reliable diagnostic tools are crucial for managing respiratory diseases like COVID-19, where chest X-ray analysis coupled with artificial intelligence techniques has proven invaluable. However, most existing works on X-ray images have not considered lung segmentation, raising concerns about their reliability. Additionally, some have employed disproportionate and impractical augmentation techniques, making models less generalized and prone to overfitting. This study presents a critical analysis of both issues and proposes a methodology (SDL-COVID) for more reliable classification of chest X-rays for COVID-19 detection. Methods: We use class activation mapping to obtain a visual understanding of the predictions made by Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs), validating the necessity of lung segmentation. To analyze the effect of data augmentation, deep learning models are implemented on two levels: one for an augmented dataset and another for a non-augmented dataset. Results: Careful analysis of X-ray images and their corresponding heat maps under expert medical supervision reveals that lung segmentation is necessary for accurate COVID-19 prediction. Regarding data augmentation, test accuracy significantly drops beyond a certain threshold with additional augmented images, indicating model overfitting. Conclusion: Our proposed methodology, SDL-COVID, achieves a precision of 95.21% and a lower false negative rate, ensuring its reliability for COVID-19 detection using chest X-rays.

analysis.tldr: 质疑数据增强和分割的必要性，提出SDL-COVID方法用于COVID-19 X光分类。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有COVID-19 X光分类工作常忽略肺部分割或使用不切实际的数据增强，导致模型泛化性差、易过拟合，需要系统分析这些预处理步骤的必要性。
analysis.problem: 验证肺部分割和数据增强在COVID-19 X光分类中的必要性，并提出更可靠的分类方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过类激活映射和专家监督发现肺部分割对准确预测至关重要；数据增强超过一定阈值后测试准确率显著下降，表明过拟合。
analysis.method: 提出SDL-COVID方法，结合类激活映射分析CNN预测，并在增强和非增强数据集上对比实验。
contributions: 系统分析了肺部分割和数据增强在COVID-19 X光分类中的必要性，发现分割必要而过度增强有害。
提出了SDL-COVID方法，在COVID-19检测中达到95.21%的精确率和较低的假阴性率。
analysis.experiments: 在COVID-19 X光数据集上进行了实验，对比了增强和非增强数据集，并使用了类激活映射进行可视化分析。
limitations: 仅针对COVID-19 X光图像，可能不适用于其他疾病或模态。
未详细说明数据集规模和来源，泛化性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性一般，但分析视角有实用价值，适合相关领域读者参考。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 质疑数据增强和分割的必要性，提出SDL-COVID方法用于COVID-19 X光分类。

papers.title: QYOLO: Lightweight Object Detection via Quantum Inspired Shared Channel Mixing
papers.abstract: The rapid advancement of object detection architectures has positioned single stage detectors as the dominant solution for real-time visual perception. A primary source of computational overhead in these models lies in the deep backbone stages, where C2f bottleneck modules at high stride levels accumulate a disproportionate share of parameters due to quadratic scaling with channel width. This work introduces QYOLO, a quantum-inspired channel mixing framework that achieves genuine architectural compression by replacing the two deepest backbone C2f modules at P4/16 (512 channels) and P5/32 (1024 channels) with a compact QMixBlock. The proposed block performs global channel recalibration through a sinusoidal mixing mechanism with shared learnable parameters across both backbone stages, enforcing consistent channel importance without requiring independent per-stage parameter sets. The neck and detection head remain fully classical and unchanged. Evaluation on the VisDrone2019 benchmark demonstrates that QYOLOv8n achieves a 20.2% reduction in parameter count (3.01M to 2.40M) and 12.3% GFLOPs reduction with only 0.4 pp mAP@50 degradation. QYOLOv8s achieves 21.8% reduction with 0.1 pp degradation. When combined with knowledge distillation, full accuracy parity is recovered at no cost to compression. An expanded backbone plus neck variant achieved 38 to 41% reduction at the cost of greater accuracy degradation, motivating the backbone-only final design.

analysis.tldr: QYOLO 通过量子启发的共享通道混合模块替换深层 C2f 瓶颈，实现轻量化目标检测，在 VisDrone 上参数量减少 20% 以上，精度几乎无损。
analysis.research_motivation: 单阶段目标检测器中深层 C2f 瓶颈模块因通道宽度二次缩放导致参数过多，成为计算开销的主要来源，亟需高效的架构压缩方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在不显著降低检测精度的前提下，大幅减少单阶段检测器深层骨干网络的参数量和计算量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 深层 C2f 模块在高步长下参数占比过高，且独立参数集导致冗余；共享参数的正弦混合机制可保持通道重要性一致性。
analysis.method: 提出 QMixBlock，通过正弦混合机制实现全局通道重校准，并在两个最深骨干阶段共享可学习参数，替换原 C2f 模块。
contributions: 提出量子启发的共享通道混合框架 QYOLO，实现真实架构压缩。
在 VisDrone2019 上验证，QYOLOv8n 参数量减少 20.2%，GFLOPs 减少 12.3%，mAP@50 仅下降 0.4 pp。
结合知识蒸馏可完全恢复精度，且不增加压缩成本。
analysis.experiments: 在 VisDrone2019 基准上评估，报告了 QYOLOv8n 和 QYOLOv8s 的参数量、GFLOPs 和 mAP@50 变化，以及知识蒸馏恢复效果。
limitations: 仅在 VisDrone 数据集上验证，泛化性未知。
扩展骨干加颈部变体精度下降较大，设计选择需进一步分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法有一定创新性，实验充分但仅限单一数据集，适合关注轻量化检测的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: QYOLO 通过量子启发的共享通道混合模块替换深层 C2f 瓶颈，实现轻量化目标检测，在 VisDrone 上参数量减少 20% 以上，精度几乎无损。

papers.title: STLGT: A Scalable Trace-Based Linear Graph Transformer for Tail Latency Prediction in Microservices
papers.abstract: Accurate end-to-end tail-latency forecasting is critical for proactive SLO management in microservice systems. However, modeling long-range dependency propagation and non-stationary, bursty workloads while maintaining inference efficiency at scale remains challenging. We present STLGT (Scalable Trace-based Linear Graph Transformer), a per-API predictor that encodes traces as span graphs for multi-step p95 tail-latency forecasting. STLGT uses a structure-aware linear graph Transformer to propagate cross-service dependencies with inference time linear in span graph size, and a decoupled temporal module to capture workload dynamics. Across a personalized education microservice application, DeathStarBench, and Alibaba traces, STLGT improves forecasting accuracy over PERT-GNN by 8.5% MAPE on average and achieves up to 12x faster CPU inference at N=32, matching the maximum span graph size after preprocessing the Alibaba traces. Ablation studies further demonstrate the effectiveness of each component, especially under bursty traffic.

analysis.tldr: 提出可扩展的线性图Transformer STLGT，用于微服务尾延迟预测，在精度和推理速度上超越基线。
analysis.research_motivation: 微服务系统中端到端尾延迟预测对主动SLO管理至关重要，但现有方法难以同时建模长程依赖传播、非平稳突发负载并保持大规模推理效率。
analysis.problem: 如何高效且准确地预测微服务系统的多步p95尾延迟。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: STLGT：基于trace的线性图Transformer，将trace编码为span图，使用结构感知线性图Transformer传播跨服务依赖（推理时间与span图大小呈线性），并采用解耦时间模块捕获工作负载动态。
contributions: 提出STLGT，一种可扩展的基于trace的线性图Transformer，用于微服务尾延迟预测。
在三个数据集上验证，相比PERT-GNN平均MAPE降低8.5%，CPU推理速度提升12倍（N=32）。
analysis.experiments: 在个性化教育微服务应用、DeathStarBench和Alibaba trace上评估，与PERT-GNN对比，并进行了消融研究。
limitations: 可能仅适用于基于trace的微服务系统。
未提及对极端突发负载的鲁棒性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法有创新且实验充分，但属于特定应用领域，与核心方向关联一般。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出可扩展的线性图Transformer STLGT，用于微服务尾延迟预测，在精度和推理速度上超越基线。

papers.title: Delineating Knowledge Boundaries for Honest Large Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: Large Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have achieved remarkable multimodal performance yet remain prone to factual hallucinations, particularly in long-tail or specialized domains. Moreover, current models exhibit a weak capacity to refuse queries that exceed their parametric knowledge. In this paper, we propose a systematic framework to enhance the refusal capability of VLMs when facing such unknown questions. We first curate a model-specific "Visual-Idk" (Visual-I don't know) dataset, leveraging multi-sample consistency probing to distinguish between known and unknown facts. We then align the model using supervised fine-tuning followed by preference-aware optimization (e.g., DPO, ORPO) to effectively delineate its knowledge boundaries. Results on the Visual-Idk dataset show our method improves the Truthful Rate from 57.9\% to 67.3\%. Additionally, internal probing also demonstrates that the model genuinely recognizes its boundaries instead of just memorizing refusal patterns. Our framework further generalizes to out-of-distribution medical and perceptual domains, providing a robust path toward more trustworthy and prudent visual assistants.

analysis.tldr: 通过构建模型专属的Visual-Idk数据集并采用偏好优化，提升VLM在面对未知问题时的拒绝能力，减少事实性幻觉。
analysis.research_motivation: 大型视觉语言模型（VLM）在长尾或专业领域容易产生事实性幻觉，且缺乏对超出参数知识范围问题的拒绝能力，影响其可信度和安全性。
analysis.problem: 如何让VLM准确识别并拒绝超出其知识边界的问题，从而减少事实性幻觉。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 首先通过多样本一致性探测构建模型专属的Visual-Idk数据集，区分已知和未知事实；然后使用监督微调结合偏好优化（如DPO、ORPO）对齐模型，明确其知识边界。
contributions: 提出系统性框架增强VLM对未知问题的拒绝能力。
构建模型专属的Visual-Idk数据集，利用多样本一致性探测区分已知与未知。
通过偏好优化有效划定知识边界，并在内部探测中验证模型真正识别边界而非记忆拒绝模式。
analysis.experiments: 在Visual-Idk数据集上，Truthful Rate从57.9%提升至67.3%；在医疗和感知领域的分布外场景中验证了泛化性。
limitations: 可能依赖模型自身的一致性探测，对初始模型质量敏感。
未提及对已知问题回答准确性的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 针对VLM幻觉问题提出系统性框架，方法新颖且实验有效，与安全对齐方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过构建模型专属的Visual-Idk数据集并采用偏好优化，提升VLM在面对未知问题时的拒绝能力，减少事实性幻觉。

papers.title: Quantum Gatekeeper: Multi-Factor Context-Bound Image Steganography with VQC Based Key Derivation on Quantum Hardware
papers.abstract: This paper presents Quantum Gatekeeper, a context-bound image steganography framework where successful payload recovery depends on both cryptographic decryption and the reconstruction of a precise extraction path. The system integrates lossless least significant bit (LSB) embedding with a deterministic variational quantum circuit (VQC)-derived gate key, multi-factor contextual binding, and authenticated encryption. Payload extraction is contingent upon four requisite factors: a password, a shared secret, a user-supplied context string, and a reference image signature. Any deviation in these factors causes the system to read from an incorrect pixel sequence or fail authentication, resulting in silent rejection rather than partial disclosure. The proposed method derives a gatecontrolled extraction key from a seed-conditioned variational circuit, with parameters generated via cryptographic hash expansion and context-dependent image features. To ensure encode/decode consistency, the cryptographic key path is generated via exact statevector simulation; concurrently, IBM superconducting quantum hardware is utilized to evaluate the statistical behavior of the circuit family under physical noise. We introduce a dual-region image layout to resolve the nonce bootstrapping dependency, separating header recovery from payload recovery through independently derived keys. Experimental results confirm successful end-to-end message embedding and recovery on PNG images, demonstrating deterministic success under correct conditions and failure otherwise. The framework supports both text and image payloads; in the image-in-image configuration, a secret image is resized to a fixed resolution prior to embedding, enabling exact pixel-level recovery under correct contextual reconstruction.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种结合变分量子电路密钥派生与多因素上下文绑定的图像隐写框架，实现条件依赖的载荷恢复。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统图像隐写方法通常仅依赖单一密钥或简单嵌入模式，缺乏对提取路径的多因素上下文绑定，导致安全性不足；量子计算为密钥派生提供了新的可能性，但现有量子隐写方案多停留在理论或模拟阶段，缺乏实际硬件验证。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种图像隐写系统，使得载荷恢复必须同时满足密码解密和精确提取路径重建，且任何因素偏差都导致静默拒绝而非部分泄露。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 结合无损LSB嵌入、确定性变分量子电路（VQC）派生门控密钥、多因素上下文绑定（密码、共享秘密、用户上下文串、参考图像签名）以及认证加密；采用双区域图像布局分离头部恢复与载荷恢复，密钥路径通过精确态矢量模拟生成，并在IBM超导量子硬件上评估电路族在物理噪声下的统计行为。
contributions: 提出一种多因素上下文绑定的图像隐写框架，载荷恢复依赖四个独立因素，任何偏差导致静默拒绝。
引入基于变分量子电路的密钥派生方法，结合密码学哈希扩展与上下文相关图像特征。
设计双区域图像布局解决随机数引导依赖问题，实现头部与载荷的独立密钥派生。
在真实量子硬件上评估电路族统计行为，并在PNG图像上验证端到端嵌入与恢复的确定性成功。
analysis.experiments: 在PNG图像上验证了端到端消息嵌入与恢复，在正确条件下确定性成功，错误条件下失败；支持文本和图像载荷，图像-图像配置中秘密图像被调整至固定分辨率后嵌入，实现精确像素级恢复。
limitations: 仅针对PNG图像验证，其他格式或压缩图像未测试。
量子硬件部分仅评估统计行为，未在真实噪声量子设备上运行完整隐写流程。
多因素绑定可能增加用户使用复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法结合量子密钥派生与多因素绑定有一定新颖性，但应用场景较窄（隐写），且实验规模有限，推荐保存以供后续参考。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种结合变分量子电路密钥派生与多因素上下文绑定的图像隐写框架，实现条件依赖的载荷恢复。

papers.title: Sparsity as a Key: Unlocking New Insights from Latent Structures for Out-of-Distribution Detection
papers.abstract: Sparse Autoencoders (SAEs) have demonstrated significant success in interpreting Large Language Models (LLMs) by decomposing dense representations into sparse, semantic components. However, their potential for analyzing Vision Transformers (ViTs) remains largely under-explored. In this work, we present the first application of SAEs to the ViT [CLS] token for out-of-distribution (OOD) detection, addressing the limitation of existing methods that rely on entangled feature representations. We propose a novel framework utilizing a Top-k SAE to disentangle the dense [CLS] features into a structured latent space. Through this analysis, we reveal that in-distribution (ID) data exhibits consistent, class-specific activation patterns, which we formalize as Class Activation Profiles (CAPs). Our study uncovers a key structural invariant: while ID samples preserve a stable pattern within CAPs, OOD samples systematically disrupt this structure. Leveraging this insight, we introduce a scoring function based on the divergence of core energy profiles to quantify the deviation from ideal activation profiles. Our method achieves strong results on the FPR95 metric, critical for safety-sensitive applications across multiple benchmarks, while also achieving competitive AUROC. Overall, our findings demonstrate that the sparse, disentangled features revealed by SAEs can serve as a powerful, interpretable tool for robust OOD detection in vision models.

analysis.tldr: 首次将稀疏自编码器应用于ViT的[CLS]令牌进行OOD检测，通过解耦特征和类激活模式实现鲁棒检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有OOD检测方法依赖纠缠的特征表示，难以区分分布内与分布外样本，且缺乏可解释性。稀疏自编码器在LLM中成功解耦语义，但在视觉模型中的应用尚属空白。
analysis.problem: 如何利用稀疏自编码器解耦ViT的[CLS]特征，并基于解耦后的结构不变性进行OOD检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 分布内数据在稀疏潜空间中表现出一致的、类别特定的激活模式（类激活剖面CAP），而OOD样本会系统性破坏该结构。
analysis.method: 使用Top-k稀疏自编码器解耦ViT的[CLS]特征，构建类激活剖面（CAP），并基于核心能量剖面的散度设计评分函数。
contributions: 首次将SAE应用于ViT的[CLS]令牌进行OOD检测。
发现并形式化了类激活剖面（CAP）作为分布内数据的结构不变性。
提出基于核心能量剖面散度的OOD评分函数，在FPR95指标上表现优异。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上评估FPR95和AUROC，FPR95指标表现强，AUROC具有竞争力。
limitations: 可能依赖Top-k超参数的选择。
未讨论对大规模或高分辨率图像的扩展性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，首次将SAE用于ViT的OOD检测，实验指标强，但技术细节和局限性需进一步阅读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首次将稀疏自编码器应用于ViT的[CLS]令牌进行OOD检测，通过解耦特征和类激活模式实现鲁棒检测。

papers.title: Comparative Evaluation of Convolutional and Transformer-Based Detectors for Automated Weed Detection in Precision Agriculture
papers.abstract: This paper presents a comparative evaluation of convolutional and transformer-based object detection architectures for early weed detection in realistic scenarios. Representative models from each paradigm are considered, including YOLOv26-nano, a recent variant of the YOLO family, and transformer-based approaches such as RTDETR and RF-DETR. Experiments were conducted on the GROUNDBASED_ WEED dataset, allowing performance to be evaluated in terms of detection accuracy and computational efficiency using metrics such as precision, recall, average precision, and inference speed. The results highlight a clear trade-off between efficiency and contextual modeling: CNN-based detectors achieve high performance at a lower computational cost, while transformer-based approaches offer better global context capture at the expense of higher resource demands. These results provide practical criteria for model selection in precision agriculture applications.

analysis.tldr: 对比CNN和Transformer检测器在精准农业杂草检测中的性能，发现CNN效率高而Transformer全局建模强。
analysis.research_motivation: 精准农业中早期杂草检测对减少除草剂使用至关重要，但现有研究缺乏对最新CNN和Transformer检测器在真实场景下的系统对比，无法为实际部署提供选型依据。
analysis.problem: 评估卷积和Transformer目标检测架构在杂草检测任务中的准确性与计算效率，揭示其权衡关系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: CNN检测器（如YOLOv26-nano）在较低计算成本下实现高精度，而Transformer检测器（如RTDETR、RF-DETR）能更好捕捉全局上下文但资源需求更高。
analysis.method: 在GROUNDBASED_WEED数据集上，使用精度、召回率、平均精度和推理速度等指标，对比YOLOv26-nano、RTDETR和RF-DETR等代表性模型。
contributions: 系统对比了最新CNN和Transformer检测器在杂草检测中的性能，揭示了效率与全局建模的权衡。
为精准农业中的模型选择提供了基于实验的实用准则。
analysis.experiments: 在GROUNDBASED_WEED数据集上评估了检测精度和计算效率，使用精度、召回率、平均精度和推理速度等指标。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 仅在一个数据集上评估，泛化性未知。
未考虑模型在边缘设备上的实际部署细节（如内存占用、功耗）。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法对比常规，实验规模有限，创新性和影响力一般。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 对比CNN和Transformer检测器在精准农业杂草检测中的性能，发现CNN效率高而Transformer全局建模强。

papers.title: Decoupled Prototype Matching with Vision Foundation Models for Few-Shot Industrial Object Detection
papers.abstract: Industrial object detection systems typically rely on large annotated datasets, which are expensive to collect and challenging to maintain in industrial scenarios where the inventory of objects changes frequently. This work addresses the challenge of few-shot object detection in such industrial scenarios, where only a limited number of labeled samples are available for newly introduced objects. We present a detection framework that leverages vision foundation models to recognize objects with minimal supervision. The method constructs class prototypes from a small set of reference samples by extracting feature representations. For a given query scene during inference, object regions are generated using a segmentation model, and feature embeddings are extracted and matched with class prototypes using similarity matching. We evaluate the detection method on three established industrial datasets from the Benchmark for 6D Object Pose Estimation benchmark following the official 2D object detection evaluation protocol. We demonstrate competitive detection performance, improving AP by 6.9% compared to the state-of-the-art training-free detection methods. Furthermore, the presented method is able to onboard new objects using only a few reference images, without requiring any CAD models or large annotated datasets. These properties make the approach well-suited for real-world industrial applications.

analysis.tldr: 利用视觉基础模型通过解耦原型匹配实现工业场景下的少样本目标检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 工业目标检测依赖大量标注数据，但工业场景中物体种类频繁变化，收集和维护标注数据成本高昂。
analysis.problem: 在仅有少量标注样本的情况下，实现工业场景中新增物体的少样本目标检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 利用视觉基础模型从少量参考样本中提取特征构建类原型，推理时用分割模型生成候选区域，提取特征并与原型进行相似度匹配。
contributions: 提出一种无需训练的少样本工业目标检测框架，利用视觉基础模型和原型匹配。
在三个工业数据集上相比现有无训练方法AP提升6.9%，且无需CAD模型或大量标注数据。
analysis.experiments: 在Benchmark for 6D Object Pose Estimation的三个工业数据集上，遵循官方2D目标检测评估协议，与现有无训练方法相比AP提升6.9%。
limitations: 可能依赖分割模型的准确性。
原型匹配在类别间相似度高时可能失效。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法简洁有效，实验提升明显，但创新性中等，适合工业应用场景。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用视觉基础模型通过解耦原型匹配实现工业场景下的少样本目标检测。

papers.title: SecMate: Multi-Agent Adaptive Cybersecurity Troubleshooting with Tri-Context Personalization
papers.abstract: Recent advances in large language models and agentic frameworks have enabled virtual customer assistants (VCAs) for complex support. We present SecMate, a multi-agent VCA for cybersecurity troubleshooting that integrates device, user, and service specificity from conversational and device-level signals. Device specificity is provided by a lightweight local diagnostic utility, while user specificity relies on implicit proficiency inference and profile-aware troubleshooting. Service specificity is achieved through a proactive, context-aware recommender. We evaluate SecMate in a controlled study with 144 participants and 711 conversations. Device-level evidence increased correct resolutions from about 50% to over 90% relative to an LLM-only baseline, while step-by-step guidance improved pleasantness and reduced user burden. The recommender achieved high relevance (MRR@1=0.75), and participants showed strong willingness to substitute human IT support at costs well below human benchmarks. We release the full code base and a richly annotated dataset to support reproducible research on adaptive VCAs.

analysis.tldr: SecMate 是一个多智能体网络安全故障排除助手，通过设备、用户和服务三重上下文个性化显著提升解决率。
analysis.research_motivation: 大型语言模型和智能体框架已能支持复杂客服，但网络安全故障排除需要结合设备、用户和服务等多维上下文信息，现有方法缺乏这种个性化整合。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个能自适应整合设备、用户和服务特定上下文的网络安全故障排除虚拟客服助手。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 SecMate 多智能体框架，包含轻量级本地诊断工具提供设备特异性、隐式熟练度推断和用户画像实现用户特异性、主动上下文感知推荐器实现服务特异性。
contributions: 提出整合三重上下文（设备、用户、服务）的多智能体网络安全故障排除框架 SecMate
通过 144 名参与者、711 次对话的受控实验验证了设备级证据将正确解决率从约 50% 提升至 90% 以上
开源完整代码库和丰富标注数据集以支持可重复研究
analysis.experiments: 在 144 名参与者、711 次对话的受控研究中评估，设备级证据使正确解决率从约 50% 提升至 90% 以上，推荐器 MRR@1=0.75，参与者愿意以低于人类基准的成本替代人工 IT 支持。
limitations: 受控实验可能无法完全反映真实场景的复杂性
用户特异性推断依赖隐式信号，可能对某些用户不准确
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较高，实验充分且结果显著，但属于特定应用领域，与核心方向中等相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SecMate 是一个多智能体网络安全故障排除助手，通过设备、用户和服务三重上下文个性化显著提升解决率。

papers.title: Benchmarking Complex Multimodal Document Processing Pipelines: A Unified Evaluation Framework for Enterprise AI
papers.abstract: Most enterprise document AI today is a pipeline. Parse, index, retrieve, generate. Each of those stages has been studied to death on its own -- what's still hard is evaluating the system as a whole. We built EnterpriseDocBench to take a swing at it: parsing fidelity, indexing efficiency, retrieval relevance, and generation groundedness, all on the same corpus. The corpus is built from public, permissively licensed documents across six enterprise domains (five represented in the current pilot). We ran three pipelines through it -- BM25, dense embedding, and a hybrid -- all with the same GPT-5 generator. The headline numbers: hybrid retrieval narrowly beats BM25 (nDCG@5 of 0.92 vs. 0.91), and both beat dense embedding (0.83). Hallucination doesn't grow monotonically with document length -- short documents and very long ones both hallucinate more than medium ones (28.1% and 23.8% vs. 9.2%). Cross-stage correlations are very weak: parsing->retrieval r=0.14, parsing->generation r=0.17, retrieval->generation 0.02. If quality were cascading the way most of us assume, those numbers would be much higher; they aren't. Design caveats are real (parsing fixed, generator shared, automated proxy metrics) and we don't oversell the result. One result that genuinely surprised us: factual accuracy on stated claims is 85.5%, but answer completeness averages 0.40. The system is right when it answers -- it just leaves things out. That gap matters more for real deployments than the headline accuracy number does. We also describe three reference architectures (ColPali, ColQwen2, agentic complexity-based routing) which are not yet integrated end-to-end. Framework, metrics, baselines, and collection scripts will be released open-source on acceptance.

analysis.tldr: 提出企业文档AI全流程评测框架EnterpriseDocBench，发现混合检索略优于BM25，幻觉率与文档长度呈U型关系，且各阶段质量相关性极弱。
analysis.research_motivation: 企业文档AI通常采用解析、索引、检索、生成的流水线架构，但各阶段独立研究已较充分，整体系统评估仍缺乏统一框架和基准。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个统一的、端到端的评测框架来评估企业文档处理流水线的整体性能，包括解析保真度、索引效率、检索相关性和生成忠实度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 幻觉率不随文档长度单调增长，短文档和超长文档幻觉率高于中等长度文档（28.1%和23.8% vs. 9.2%）；跨阶段相关性极弱（解析→检索r=0.14，解析→生成r=0.17，检索→生成r=0.02），表明质量并非级联传递；事实准确性85.5%但答案完整性仅0.40，系统回答正确但常遗漏信息。
analysis.method: 构建EnterpriseDocBench基准，包含六个企业领域（当前试点五个）的公开许可文档，定义解析保真度、索引效率、检索相关性和生成忠实度四类指标，并评估BM25、稠密嵌入和混合检索三种流水线（使用相同GPT-5生成器）。
contributions: 提出首个面向企业文档AI全流程的统一评测框架EnterpriseDocBench，包含多领域语料和四类指标。
通过实验揭示幻觉率与文档长度的U型关系以及跨阶段质量弱相关性，挑战了级联假设。
开源框架、指标、基线和收集脚本。
analysis.experiments: 在六个企业领域（五个试点）的公开许可文档上，评估BM25、稠密嵌入和混合检索三种流水线，使用GPT-5生成器。混合检索nDCG@5为0.92，BM25为0.91，稠密嵌入为0.83。幻觉率：短文档28.1%，中等9.2%，超长23.8%。事实准确性85.5%，答案完整性0.40。
limitations: 解析阶段固定，生成器共享，使用自动代理指标，可能无法完全反映真实部署场景。
三种参考架构（ColPali、ColQwen2、基于复杂度的路由）尚未端到端集成。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 提出企业文档AI全流程评测框架，实验揭示反直觉现象，开源资源，但方法增量有限，适合精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出企业文档AI全流程评测框架EnterpriseDocBench，发现混合检索略优于BM25，幻觉率与文档长度呈U型关系，且各阶段质量相关性极弱。

papers.title: A Multimodal Pre-trained Network for Integrated EEG-Video Seizure Detection
papers.abstract: Reliable seizure detection in mouse models is essential for preclinical epilepsy research, yet manual review of synchronized video-EEG recordings is labor-intensive and single-modality systems fail for complementary reasons: video-based methods are easily confounded by benign behaviors, whereas EEG-based methods are vulnerable to ictal motion artifacts. We present EEGVFusion, a multimodal framework that combines self-supervised EEG representation learning, spatio-temporal video encoding, optimal-transport alignment, and bidirectional cross-attention to integrate neural and behavioral evidence. We also curate an expert-annotated dataset of synchronized EEG and video recordings comprising 93 sessions from 15 mice for training and evaluation. In the random-session split, EEGVFusion achieved a Balanced Accuracy of 0.9957 with perfect event sensitivity and an Event FAR of 0.6250 FP/h, indicating strong seizure detection performance with a low false-alarm burden. In a single held-out-subject evaluation with Subject 110 reserved for testing, EEGVFusion achieved a Balanced Accuracy of 0.9718 and reduced Event FAR from 2.7250 FP/h for the EEG-only counterpart to 0.4833 FP/h while preserving perfect event sensitivity. Targeted ablations further showed that EEG pre-training and OT alignment help reduce false alarms while preserving event sensitivity.

analysis.tldr: 提出EEGVFusion多模态框架，融合自监督EEG与视频特征，在小鼠癫痫检测中实现高精度低误报。
analysis.research_motivation: 手动审查同步视频-EEG记录耗时费力，单模态方法各有缺陷：视频易被良性行为混淆，EEG易受发作期运动伪影干扰。
analysis.problem: 如何融合EEG和视频两种模态，实现可靠且低误报的小鼠癫痫发作检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 单模态EEG方法在留出受试者评估中误报率高达2.7250 FP/h，而多模态融合可降至0.4833 FP/h，同时保持完美事件灵敏度。
analysis.method: EEGVFusion：自监督EEG表征学习 + 时空视频编码 + 最优传输对齐 + 双向交叉注意力融合。
contributions: 提出首个融合自监督EEG和视频的多模态癫痫检测框架EEGVFusion。
构建专家标注的同步EEG-视频数据集（15只小鼠93个会话）。
在随机分割和留出受试者评估中均实现高平衡精度和极低误报率。
analysis.experiments: 在自建数据集上评估：随机会话分割平衡精度0.9957，事件灵敏度完美，误报率0.6250 FP/h；留出受试者（Subject 110）平衡精度0.9718，误报率从EEG-only的2.7250降至0.4833 FP/h。消融实验证实EEG预训练和最优传输对齐有助于减少误报。
limitations: 数据集规模较小（15只小鼠），泛化性需更多验证。
仅针对小鼠模型，临床转化需进一步研究。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较强，实验充分且结果显著，但数据集较小且仅限小鼠模型，影响范围有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出EEGVFusion多模态框架，融合自监督EEG与视频特征，在小鼠癫痫检测中实现高精度低误报。

papers.title: SG-UniBuc-NLP at SemEval-2026 Task 6: Multi-Head RoBERTa with Chunking for Long-Context Evasion Detection
papers.abstract: We describe our system for SemEval-2026 Task 6 (CLARITY: Unmasking Political Question Evasions), which classifies English political interview responses by coarse-grained clarity (3-way) and fine-grained evasion strategy (9-way). Since responses frequently exceed the 512-token limit of standard Transformer encoders, we apply an overlapping sliding-window chunking strategy with element-wise Max-Pooling aggregation over chunk representations. A shared RoBERTa-large encoder supplies two task-specific heads trained jointly via a multi-task objective, with inference-time ensembling over 7-fold stratified cross-validation. Our system achieves a Macro-F1 of 0.80 on Subtask 1 and 0.51 on Subtask 2, ranking 11th in both subtasks.

analysis.tldr: 针对长文本政治访谈回应，提出重叠滑动窗口分块+多任务RoBERTa模型，在SemEval-2026任务6上取得Macro-F1 0.80/0.51。
analysis.research_motivation: 政治访谈中回答常超出标准Transformer编码器的512 token限制，现有方法难以有效处理长上下文回避检测。
analysis.problem: 如何对超过512 token的政治访谈回应进行粗粒度清晰度（3类）和细粒度回避策略（9类）分类。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用重叠滑动窗口分块策略，对每个块用RoBERTa-large编码，通过元素级最大池化聚合块表示；两个任务共享编码器，使用多任务目标联合训练，推理时对7折交叉验证模型进行集成。
contributions: 提出重叠滑动窗口分块与最大池化聚合方法，解决长文本编码问题。
构建多任务学习框架，同时处理粗粒度与细粒度分类任务。
analysis.experiments: 在SemEval-2026 Task 6数据集上，Subtask 1 Macro-F1为0.80，Subtask 2 Macro-F1为0.51，排名均为第11。
limitations: 仅使用单一RoBERTa-large模型，未探索其他预训练模型。
分块策略可能丢失跨块上下文信息。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法为现有技术的组合应用，创新性一般，实验规模有限，适合对长文本分类感兴趣者参考。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 针对长文本政治访谈回应，提出重叠滑动窗口分块+多任务RoBERTa模型，在SemEval-2026任务6上取得Macro-F1 0.80/0.51。

papers.title: Topology-Aware Representation Alignment for Semi-Supervised Vision-Language Learning
papers.abstract: Vision-language models have shown strong performance, but they often generalize poorly to specialized domains. While semi-supervised vision-language learning mitigates this limitation by leveraging a small set of labeled image-text pairs together with abundant unlabeled images, existing methods remain fundamentally pairwise and fail to model the global structure of multimodal representation manifolds. Existing topology-based alignment methods rely on persistence diagram matching, which neither guarantees geometric alignment nor utilizes the image-text pairing information central to vision-language learning. We propose Topology-Aware Multimodal Representation Alignment (ToMA), a framework that uses persistent homology to identify topologically salient edges and aligns them across modalities through available cross-modal correspondences. ToMA leverages both H_0-death edges and lightweight H_1-birth edges, allowing it to capture both connectivity and cycle structure without constructing 2-simplices. Experiments show that ToMA yields stable gains, with clear improvements on remote sensing and modest but consistent benefits on fashion retrieval. Additional analysis shows that ToMA is more stable than alternative topology-based objectives and that lightweight H_1-birth edges provide useful higher-order structural signals.

analysis.tldr: 提出拓扑感知对齐框架ToMA，利用持续同调对齐多模态流形结构，在半监督视觉-语言学习中提升领域泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 视觉-语言模型在专业领域泛化能力差，现有半监督方法仅考虑成对关系，无法建模多模态表征的全局结构。
analysis.problem: 如何利用未标注图像和少量标注对，在保持全局拓扑结构的同时对齐视觉和语言模态。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有拓扑对齐方法依赖持续图匹配，既不保证几何对齐，也未利用图像-文本配对信息。
analysis.method: 提出ToMA框架，通过持续同调识别拓扑显著边（H_0死亡边和轻量H_1出生边），并利用跨模态对应关系对齐这些边。
contributions: 提出拓扑感知的多模态表征对齐框架ToMA，利用持续同调捕捉全局结构。
引入轻量H_1出生边，在不构造2-单纯形的情况下捕获循环结构。
在遥感数据集上取得显著提升，在时尚检索上获得稳定收益。
analysis.experiments: 在遥感数据集上取得显著提升，在时尚检索上获得稳定且一致的收益；消融实验表明ToMA比替代拓扑目标更稳定，轻量H_1边提供有用高阶信号。
limitations: 仅验证了遥感与时尚检索两个领域，泛化性需更多实验。
H_1边可能增加计算开销，大规模场景下效率待评估。

papers.title: Seamless Indoor-Outdoor Mapping for INGENIOUS First Responders
papers.abstract: In several applications it is desired to have 3D models not only from the outdoor spaces but also from inside the building. In the context of First Responder enhancement in large scale natural and man-made disasters, a method is presented to achieve this goal with a high degree of automation. Therefore an autonomously flying aerial mapping system is combined with a person-carried indoor positioning system. Automatically recognized markers (AprilTags) are geo-referenced by the aerial system and their coordinates are sent to the ground-based system. By looking at the AprilTags before entering the building, the ground-based system is registered to world coordinates. Without the further need of any global positioning, it creates a point cloud from the indoor spaces that fits with the point could from the aerial view. This allows a co-visualization of both point-clouds as a seamless indoor-outdoor 3D model in real time.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种结合无人机与地面系统的自动化方法，实现室内外无缝3D建模，用于应急救援。
analysis.research_motivation: 应急救援中需要同时获取室内外3D模型，但现有方法自动化程度低，难以快速生成无缝融合的模型。
analysis.problem: 如何实现高自动化、实时且无缝的室内外3D地图融合。

papers.title: Beyond Fixed Formulas: Data-Driven Linear Predictor for Efficient Diffusion Models
papers.abstract: To address the high sampling cost of Diffusion Transformers (DiTs), feature caching offers a training-free acceleration method. However, existing methods rely on hand-crafted forecasting formulas that fail under aggressive skipping. We propose L2P (Learnable Linear Predictor), a simple data-driven caching framework that replaces fixed coefficients with learnable per-timestep weights. Rapidly trained in ~20 seconds on a single GPU, L2P accurately reconstructs current features from past trajectories. L2P significantly outperforms existing baselines: it achieves a 4.55x FLOPs reduction and 4.15x latency speedup on FLUX.1-dev, and maintains high visual fidelity under up to 7.18x acceleration on Qwen-Image models, where prior methods show noticeable quality degradation. Our results show learning linear predictors is highly effective for efficient DiT inference. Code is available at https://github.com/Aredstone/L2P-Cache.

analysis.tldr: 提出数据驱动的线性预测器L2P，通过可学习权重替代固定公式，实现扩散模型高效缓存加速。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散Transformer（DiT）采样成本高，现有特征缓存方法依赖手工设计的预测公式，在激进跳过步数时效果不佳。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种数据驱动的缓存策略，在保持视觉质量的同时大幅降低DiT推理的计算和延迟开销。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 手工预测公式在激进跳过步数时性能显著下降，而可学习的线性预测器能更好地适应不同时间步的特征变化。
analysis.method: L2P（Learnable Linear Predictor）：一个简单的数据驱动缓存框架，用可学习的每时间步权重替代固定系数，从过去轨迹中重建当前特征。
contributions: 提出L2P，一种数据驱动的线性预测器，用于扩散模型特征缓存加速。
在FLUX.1-dev和Qwen-Image模型上实现显著加速（4.55x FLOPs减少、4.15x延迟加速），且保持高视觉保真度。
analysis.experiments: 在FLUX.1-dev和Qwen-Image模型上评估，与现有基线对比，报告了FLOPs减少、延迟加速和视觉质量指标。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定架构的扩散模型。
线性预测器在极端加速比下可能仍有质量损失。

papers.title: CO-EVO: Co-evolving Semantic Anchoring and Style Diversification for Federated DG-ReID
papers.abstract: Federated domain generalization for person re-identification (FedDG-ReID) aims to collaboratively train a pedestrian retrieval model across multiple decentralized source domains such that it can generalize to unseen target environments without compromising raw data privacy. However, this task is significantly challenged by the inherent stylistic gaps across decentralized clients. Without global supervision, models easily succumb to shortcut learning where representations overfit to domain specific camera biases rather than universal identity features. We propose CO-EVO, a novel federated framework that resolves this semantic-style conflict through a co-evolutionary mechanism. On the semantic side, Camera-Invariant Semantic Anchoring (CSA) learns identity prompts with cross-camera consistency to establish purified and domain-agnostic anchors that filter out local imaging noise. On the visual side, Global Style Diversification (GSD), powered by a Global Camera-Style Bank (GCSB), synthesizes realistic perturbations to expand the visual boundaries of training data. The core of CO-EVO is its co-evolutionary loop where purified anchors act as gravitational centers to guide the image encoder toward robust anatomical attributes amidst diverse style variations. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CO-EVO achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance, proving that the synergy between semantic purification and style expansion is essential for robust cross-domain generalization. Our code is available at: https://github.com/NanYiyuzurn/ACL-LGPS-2026.

analysis.tldr: 提出CO-EVO框架，通过语义锚定与风格多样化的协同进化解决联邦域泛化行人重识别中的风格差异问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 联邦域泛化行人重识别面临跨客户端风格差异导致的捷径学习问题，现有方法缺乏全局监督，模型易过拟合于领域特定的相机偏差而非通用身份特征。
analysis.problem: 如何在保护数据隐私的前提下，训练一个能泛化到未见目标域的行人重识别模型，同时克服多源域间的风格差异和捷径学习。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，在没有全局监督的情况下，模型容易陷入捷径学习，即表示过拟合于领域特定的相机偏差，而非学习通用的身份特征。
analysis.method: 提出CO-EVO框架，包含两个协同进化模块：相机不变语义锚定（CSA）学习跨相机一致的语义锚点，全局风格多样化（GSD）通过全局相机风格库生成扰动，两者通过协同进化循环相互促进。
contributions: 提出CO-EVO框架，首次将语义锚定与风格多样化协同进化用于联邦域泛化行人重识别。
设计相机不变语义锚定（CSA）和全局风格多样化（GSD）模块，有效缓解风格差异和捷径学习。
在多个基准上达到SOTA性能，验证了语义净化与风格扩展协同的必要性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及在多个基准上达到SOTA性能。
limitations: 可能依赖特定相机风格库的构建，对未见风格泛化能力有待验证。
协同进化机制的计算开销可能较大，未在摘要中讨论效率。

papers.title: Text Style Transfer with Machine Translation for Graphic Designs
papers.abstract: Globalization of graphic designs such as those used in marketing materials and magazines is increasingly important for communication to broad audiences. To accomplish this, the textual content in the graphic designs needs to be accurately translated and have the text styling preserved in order to fit visually into the design. Preserving text styling requires high accuracy word alignment between the original and the translated text. The problem of word alignment between source and translated text is long known. The industry standards for extracting word alignments are defined by Giza++ and attention probabilities from neural machine translation (NMT) models. In this paper, we explore three new methods to tackle the word alignment problem for transferring text styles from the source to the translated text. The proposed methods are developed on top of commercially available NMT and LLM translation technologies. They include: NMT with custom input and output tags for text styling; LLM with custom input and output tags; a hybrid with NMT for translation followed by an LLM with use of unigram mappings. To analyze the performance of these solutions, their alignment results are compared with the results of an attention head approach to gauge their usability in graphic design applications. Interestingly, the attention head strong baseline proves more accurate than the LLM or NMT approach and on par with the hybrid NMT+LLM approach.

analysis.tldr: 提出三种基于NMT和LLM的文本风格迁移方法，用于图形设计中的翻译对齐，发现注意力头基线方法准确率更高。
analysis.research_motivation: 全球化背景下，图形设计中的文本需要准确翻译并保留样式，但现有词对齐方法（如Giza++、NMT注意力）在风格迁移中精度不足，影响视觉适配。
analysis.problem: 解决源文本与翻译文本之间的词对齐问题，以在图形设计中实现文本样式的准确迁移。

contributions: 探索了三种基于NMT和LLM的词对齐新方法用于图形设计文本风格迁移。
与注意力头基线对比，发现混合方法性能相当，但注意力头基线更准确。

papers.title: Uncertainty-Aware Reward Discounting for Mitigating Reward Hacking
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) systems typically optimize scalar reward functions that assume precise and reliable evaluation of outcomes. However, real-world objectives--especially those derived from human preferences--are often uncertain, context-dependent, and internally inconsistent. This mismatch can lead to alignment failures such as reward hacking, over-optimization, and overconfident behavior. We introduce a dual-source uncertainty-aware reward framework that explicitly models both epistemic uncertainty in value estimation and uncertainty in human preferences. Model uncertainty is captured via ensemble disagreement over value predictions, while preference uncertainty is derived from variability in reward annotations. We combine these signals through a confidence-adjusted Reliability Filter that adaptively modulates action selection, encouraging a balance between exploitation and caution. Empirical results across multiple discrete grid configurations (6x6, 8x8, 10x10) and high-dimensional continuous control environments (Hopper-v4, Walker2d-v4) demonstrate that our approach yields more stable training dynamics and reduces exploitative behaviors under reward ambiguity, achieving a 93.7% reduction in reward-hacking behavior as measured by trap visitation frequency. We demonstrate statistical significance of these improvements and robustness under up to 30% supervisory noise, albeit with a trade-off in peak observed reward compared to unconstrained baselines. By treating uncertainty as a first-class component of the reward signal, this work offers a principled approach toward more reliable and aligned reinforcement learning systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出双源不确定性感知奖励框架，通过置信度调节动作选择，在多个环境中减少93.7%的奖励黑客行为。
analysis.research_motivation: 现实世界中的奖励函数（尤其是来自人类偏好的）往往具有不确定性、上下文依赖性和内部不一致性，导致强化学习系统出现奖励黑客、过度优化和过度自信等对齐失败问题。
analysis.problem: 如何显式建模奖励不确定性并利用其缓解奖励黑客行为，实现更稳定和可靠的强化学习。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出双源不确定性感知奖励框架：1）通过集成模型对价值预测的差异捕获认知不确定性；2）从奖励标注的变异性中捕获偏好不确定性；3）结合两者通过置信度调节的可靠性滤波器自适应调整动作选择，平衡利用与谨慎。
contributions: 提出双源不确定性建模方法，分别处理价值估计和人类偏好的不确定性。
设计置信度调节的可靠性滤波器，在动作选择中动态权衡探索与谨慎。
在离散网格和连续控制环境中验证方法有效性，实现93.7%的奖励黑客行为减少。
analysis.experiments: 在多个离散网格配置（6x6、8x8、10x10）和高维连续控制环境（Hopper-v4、Walker2d-v4）上进行实验，测量陷阱访问频率作为奖励黑客指标，并测试了高达30%的监督噪声下的鲁棒性。
limitations: 峰值奖励相比无约束基线有所下降。
方法在更复杂或真实世界任务中的泛化性尚未验证。

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出双源不确定性感知奖励框架，通过置信度调节动作选择，在多个环境中减少93.7%的奖励黑客行为。

papers.title: GateMOT: Q-Gated Attention for Dense Object Tracking
papers.abstract: While large models demonstrate the strong representational power of vanilla attention, this core mechanism cannot be directly applied to Dense Object Tracking: its quadratic all-to-all interactions are computationally prohibitive for dense motion estimation on high-resolution features. This mismatch prevents Dense Object Tracking from fully leveraging attention-based modeling in crowded and occlusion-heavy scenes. To address this challenge, we introduce GateMOT, an online tracking framework centered on Q-Gated Attention (Q-Attention), an efficient and spatially aware attention variant. Our key idea is to repurpose the Query from a similarity-conditioning term into a learnable gating unit. This Gating-Query (Gating-Q) produces a probabilistic gate that modulates Key features in an element-wise manner, enabling explicit relevance selection instead of costly global aggregation. Built on this mechanism, parallel Q-Attention heads transform one shared feature map into task-specific yet consistent representations for detection, motion, and re-identification, yielding a tightly coupled multi-task decoder with linear-complexity gating operations. GateMOT achieves state-of-the-art HOTA of 48.4, MOTA of 67.8, and IDF1 of 64.5 on BEE24, and demonstrates strong performance on additional Dense Object Tracking benchmarks. These results show that Q-Attention is a simple, effective, and transferable building block for attention-based tracking in dense tracking scenarios.

analysis.tldr: 提出Q-Gated Attention，将注意力机制高效应用于密集目标跟踪，实现线性复杂度与SOTA性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准注意力机制的二次复杂度在高分辨率特征上计算代价过高，无法直接用于密集目标跟踪中的稠密运动估计，尤其在拥挤和遮挡场景中限制了注意力建模的潜力。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种高效且具有空间感知能力的注意力变体，使其能够应用于密集目标跟踪任务，同时保持线性计算复杂度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准注意力的全对全交互在密集目标跟踪中计算不可行，导致该领域无法充分利用基于注意力的建模。
analysis.method: 提出Q-Gated Attention (Q-Attention)，将Query重用作可学习的门控单元，生成概率门控以元素方式调制Key特征，实现显式相关性选择而非全局聚合；基于此构建并行多头解码器，统一处理检测、运动和重识别任务。
contributions: 提出Q-Gated Attention，一种高效、线性复杂度的注意力变体，适用于密集目标跟踪。
设计GateMOT框架，通过并行Q-Attention头实现多任务一致表示学习，在BEE24等基准上取得SOTA结果。
analysis.experiments: 在BEE24数据集上达到HOTA 48.4、MOTA 67.8、IDF1 64.5，并在其他密集目标跟踪基准上表现强劲。
limitations: 可能对极端密集场景的泛化性需进一步验证。
门控机制可能引入额外超参数调优成本。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分且SOTA，与视觉理解方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Q-Gated Attention，将注意力机制高效应用于密集目标跟踪，实现线性复杂度与SOTA性能。

papers.title: ACPO: Anchor-Constrained Perceptual Optimization for Diffusion Models with No-Reference Quality Guidance
papers.abstract: Diffusion models have achieved remarkable success in image generation, yet their training is predominantly driven by full-reference objectives that enforce pixel-wise similarity to ground-truth images.Such supervision, while effective for fidelity, may insufficient in terms of subjective visual perception quality and text-image semantic consistency. In this work, we investigate the problem of incorporating no-reference perceptual quality into diffusion training. A key challenge is that directly optimizing perceptual signals, such as those provided by no-reference image quality assessment (NR-IQA) models, introduces a mismatch with the original diffusion objective, leading to training instability and distributional drift during fine-tuning. To address this issue, we propose an anchor-constrained optimization framework that enables stable perceptual adaptation. Specifically, we leverage a learned NR-IQA model as a perceptual guidance signal, while introducing an anchor-based regularization that enforces consistency with the base diffusion model in terms of noise prediction. This design effectively balances perceptual quality improvement and generative fidelity, allowing controlled adaptation toward perceptually favorable outputs without compromising the original generative behavior. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method consistently enhances perceptual quality while preserving generation diversity and training stability, highlighting the effectiveness of anchor-constrained perceptual optimization for diffusion models.

analysis.tldr: 提出锚定约束感知优化框架，在扩散模型训练中引入无参考质量引导，平衡感知质量与生成保真度。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有扩散模型训练依赖全参考目标，虽保证像素级保真度，但主观视觉感知质量和文本-图像语义一致性不足，而直接优化无参考感知信号会导致训练不稳定和分布漂移。

提出锚定约束优化框架，通过锚点正则化平衡感知质量与生成保真度。

papers.title: Which Face and Whose Identity? Solving the Dual Challenge of Deepfake Proactive Forensics in Multi-Face Scenarios
papers.abstract: Unlike single-face forgeries, deepfakes in complex multi-person interaction scenarios (such as group photos and multi-person meetings) more closely reflect real-world threats. Although existing proactive forensics solutions demonstrate good performance, they heavily rely on a "single-face" setting, making it difficult to effectively address the problems of deepfake localization and source tracing in complex multi-person environments. To address this challenge, we propose the Deep Attributable Watermarking Framework (DAWF). This framework adopts a novel multi-face encoder-decoder architecture that bypasses the cumbersome offline pre-processing steps of traditional forensics, facilitating efficient in-network parallel watermark embedding and cross-face collaborative processing. Crucially, we propose a selective regional supervision loss. This innovative mechanism guides the decoder to focus exclusively on the facial regions tampered with by deepfakes. Leveraging this mechanism alongside the embedded identity payloads, DAWF realizes the "which + who" goal, answering the dual questions of which facial region was forged and who was forged. Extensive experiments on challenging multi-face datasets show that DAWF achieves excellent deepfake localization and traceability in complex multi-person scenes.

analysis.tldr: 提出DAWF框架，解决多人场景下深度伪造的定位与溯源双重挑战。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有深度伪造主动取证方法主要针对单脸场景，难以应对多人交互场景（如合影、会议）中的伪造定位与溯源问题，而这类场景更贴近真实威胁。
analysis.problem: 在多人脸场景中同时实现深度伪造区域的精准定位和伪造来源的追溯。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出深度可归属水印框架（DAWF），采用多脸编码器-解码器架构，实现网络内并行水印嵌入和跨脸协同处理；并提出选择性区域监督损失，引导解码器仅关注被伪造的人脸区域，结合身份载荷实现“哪张脸+谁的身份”的双重目标。
contributions: 提出DAWF框架，首次在多人脸场景中同时解决深度伪造定位与溯源问题。
设计多脸编码器-解码器架构和选择性区域监督损失，实现高效、精准的伪造区域定位和身份追溯。

limitations: 可能依赖特定类型的深度伪造方法，泛化性需进一步验证。

papers.title: SpatialFusion: Endowing Unified Image Generation with Intrinsic 3D Geometric Awareness
papers.abstract: Recent unified image generation models have achieved remarkable success by employing MLLMs for semantic understanding and diffusion backbones for image generation. However, these models remain fundamentally limited in spatially-aware tasks due to a lack of intrinsic spatial understanding and the absence of explicit geometric guidance during generation. In this paper, we propose SpatialFusion, a novel framework that internalizes 3D geometric awareness into unified image generation models. Specifically, we first employ a Mixture-of-Transformers (MoT) architecture to augment the MLLM with a parallel spatial transformer to enhance 3D geometric modeling capability. By sharing self-attention with the MLLM, the spatial transformer learns to derive metric-depth maps of target images from rich semantic contexts. These explicit geometric scaffolds are then injected into the diffusion backbone through a specialized depth adapter, providing precise spatial constraints for spatially-coherent image generation. Through a progressive two-stage training strategy, SpatialFusion significantly enhances performance on spatially-aware benchmarks, notably outperforming leading models such as GPT-4o. Additionally, it achieves generalized performance gains across both text-to-image generation and image editing scenarios, all while maintaining negligible inference overhead.

analysis.tldr: 提出 SpatialFusion 框架，通过混合 Transformer 架构和深度适配器将 3D 几何感知注入统一图像生成模型，提升空间感知能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有统一图像生成模型缺乏内在空间理解和显式几何引导，在空间感知任务中表现受限。
analysis.problem: 如何将 3D 几何感知内化到统一图像生成模型中，以提升空间一致性。

papers.title: DSIPA: Detecting LLM-Generated Texts via Sentiment-Invariant Patterns Divergence Analysis
papers.abstract: The rapid advancement of large language models (LLMs) presents new security challenges, particularly in detecting machine-generated text used for misinformation, impersonation, and content forgery. Most existing detection approaches struggle with robustness against adversarial perturbation, paraphrasing attacks, and domain shifts, often requiring restrictive access to model parameters or large labeled datasets. To address this, we propose DSIPA, a novel training-free framework that detects LLM-generated content by quantifying sentiment distributional stability under controlled stylistic variation. It is based on the observation that LLMs typically exhibit more emotionally consistent outputs, while human-written texts display greater affective variation. Our framework operates in a zero-shot, black-box manner, leveraging two unsupervised metrics, sentiment distribution consistency and sentiment distribution preservation, to capture these intrinsic behavioral asymmetries without the need for parameter updates or probability access. Extensive experiments are conducted on state-of-the-art proprietary and open-source models, including GPT-5.2, Gemini-1.5-pro, Claude-3, and LLaMa-3.3. Evaluations on five domains, such as news articles, programming code, student essays, academic papers, and community comments, demonstrate that DSIPA improves F1 detection scores by up to 49.89% over baseline methods. The framework exhibits superior generalizability across domains and strong resilience to adversarial conditions, providing a robust and interpretable behavioral signal for secure content identification in the evolving LLM landscape.

analysis.tldr: 提出无需训练的零样本框架DSIPA，通过情感分布稳定性检测LLM生成文本，在多个领域和攻击下表现鲁棒。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM生成文本检测方法在对抗扰动、释义攻击和领域迁移下鲁棒性不足，且常需访问模型参数或大量标注数据。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖模型参数或标注数据的情况下，鲁棒地检测LLM生成的文本。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM生成的文本情感输出更一致，而人类文本情感变化更大。
analysis.method: 基于情感分布一致性和情感分布保持两个无监督指标，在零样本黑盒设置下量化情感分布稳定性。
contributions: 提出DSIPA，一种无需训练、零样本、黑盒的LLM生成文本检测框架。
引入两个无监督指标（情感分布一致性和情感分布保持）捕捉行为不对称性。
在多个领域和模型上验证了显著优于基线方法的性能，最高F1提升49.89%。
analysis.experiments: 在GPT-5.2、Gemini-1.5-pro、Claude-3、LLaMa-3.3等模型上，覆盖新闻、代码、论文等五个领域，DSIPA在F1分数上最高提升49.89%，并展现出强泛化性和对抗鲁棒性。
limitations: 依赖情感分析工具的质量，可能受情感标注偏差影响。
未讨论对高度风格化或情感中性文本的检测效果。

papers.title: SiriusHelper: An LLM Agent-Based Operations Assistant for Big Data Platforms
papers.abstract: Big data platforms are widely used in modern enterprises, and an in-production intelligent assistant is increasingly important to help users quickly find actionable guidance and reduce operational burden. While recent LLM+RAG assistants provide a natural interface, they face practical challenges in real deployments: limited scenario coverage across both general consultation and domain-specific troubleshooting workflows, inefficient knowledge access due to inadequate multi-hop retrieval and flat knowledge organization, and high maintenance cost because escalated tickets are unstructured and hard to convert into assistant improvements and reusable SOPs. In this paper, we present SiriusHelper, a deployed intelligent assistant for big data platforms. SiriusHelper serves as a unified online assistant that automatically identifies user intent and routes queries to the right handling path, including dedicated expert workflows for specialized scenarios (e.g., SQL execution diagnosis). To support complex troubleshooting, SiriusHelper combines a DeepSearch-driven mechanism with a priority-based hierarchical knowledge base to enable multi-hop retrieval without context overload, thus improving answer reliability and latency. To reduce expert overhead, SiriusHelper further introduces automated ticket understanding and SOP distillation: it diagnoses the assistant failure reason (e.g., missing knowledge or wrong routing) and extracts domain-specific SOPs to continuously enrich the knowledge base. Experiments and online deployment on Tencent Big Data platform show that SiriusHelper outperforms representative alternatives and reduces online ticket volume by 20.8\%.

analysis.tldr: SiriusHelper 是一个基于 LLM Agent 的大数据平台运维助手，通过 DeepSearch 分层检索和自动工单 SOP 蒸馏提升效率，部署后工单量减少 20.8%。
analysis.research_motivation: 大数据平台运维中，现有 LLM+RAG 助手面临场景覆盖有限、多跳检索效率低、维护成本高等挑战，亟需一个统一、可自优化的智能助手。

analysis.experiments: 在腾讯大数据平台进行实验和在线部署，SiriusHelper 优于代表性替代方案，并减少 20.8% 的在线工单量。

papers.title: Federated Medical Image Classification under Class and Domain Imbalance exploiting Synthetic Sample Generation
papers.abstract: Exploiting deep learning in medical imaging faces critical challenges, including strict privacy constraints, heterogeneous imaging devices with varying acquisition properties, and class imbalance due to the uneven prevalence of pathologies. In this work, we propose FedSSG, a novel Federated Learning framework that addresses domain shifts caused by diverse imaging devices while mitigating the under-representation of rare pathologies. The key contribution is a strategy for generating synthetic samples and distributing them across clients to improve coverage of both underrepresented pathologies and imaging devices. Experimental results demonstrate that our approach significantly enhances model performance and generalization across heterogeneous institutions, with minimal computational overhead at the client side.

analysis.tldr: 提出FedSSG框架，通过生成合成样本来解决联邦医学图像分类中的类别和域不平衡问题。

papers.title: Motion-Driven Multi-Object Tracking of Model Organisms in Space Science Experiments
papers.abstract: Automated animal behavior analysis relies on long-term, interpretable individual trajectories; however, multi-animal tracking in space science experimental videos remains highly challenging due to weak appearance cues, low-quality imaging, complex maneuvering behaviors, and frequent interactions. To address this problem, we first construct the SpaceAnimal-MOT dataset to characterize the motion complexity and long-term identity preservation challenges in biological videos acquired under microgravity conditions. We then propose ART-Track (Adaptive Robust Tracking), a motion-driven tracking framework tailored to this setting. Specifically, multi-model motion estimation is introduced to handle abrupt maneuvers and nonlinear motion, motion-state-driven association is designed to reduce identity switches under dense interactions and temporary mismatch, and uncertainty-adaptive fusion is used to dynamically balance spatial and motion cues when prediction reliability varies. Experimental results show that ART-Track significantly reduces identity switches on zebrafish and fruitfly sequences, while maintaining more stable association under occlusion, deformation, and high-density interactions, thereby providing a more reliable tracking foundation for downstream quantitative behavior analysis. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/yyy7777777/ART_TRACK/tree/main.

analysis.tldr: 提出ART-Track运动驱动跟踪框架，结合多模型运动估计与不确定性自适应融合，显著降低微重力条件下多动物跟踪的身份切换。
analysis.research_motivation: 太空科学实验中的多动物跟踪面临弱外观线索、低质量成像、复杂机动行为和频繁交互等挑战，现有方法难以保持长期身份一致性，制约了自动化行为分析。
analysis.problem: 在微重力条件下，如何实现多动物视频中鲁棒的长期身份保持与关联。

papers.title: Point Cloud Registration via Probabilistic Self-Update Local Correspondence and Line Vector Sets
papers.abstract: Point cloud registration (PCR) is a fundamental task for integrating 3D observations in remote sensing applications. This paper proposes a fast and effective PCR algorithm utilizing probabilistic self-updating local correspondence and line vector sets. Our dual RANSAC interaction model comprises a global RANSAC evaluating the global correspondence set and a local RANSAC operating on dynamically updated local sets. Initially, these local sets are constructed using angle histogram statistics and line vector length preservation techniques. To improve accuracy, a probabilistic self-updating strategy refines the local sets after each interaction round. To reduce runtime, we introduce a global early termination condition that optimally balances accuracy and efficiency. Finally, a weighted singular value decomposition estimates the registration solution. Evaluations on public datasets demonstrate our algorithm achieves superior time efficiency and at least a 10% root mean square error improvement over state-of-the-art methods. The C++ source code is publicly available at https://github.com/ivpml84079/Probabilistic-Self-Update-Line-Vector-Set-Based-Point-Cloud-Registration.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于概率自更新局部对应和线向量集的快速点云配准算法，在公开数据集上实现至少10%的RMSE提升。
analysis.research_motivation: 点云配准是遥感等3D应用的基础任务，现有方法在精度和效率之间难以平衡，需要更快速且准确的算法。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种点云配准算法，在保持高精度的同时显著提升时间效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出双RANSAC交互模型，包含全局RANSAC和局部RANSAC；局部集初始通过角度直方图和线向量长度保持构建，并通过概率自更新策略每轮交互后精炼；引入全局提前终止条件平衡精度与效率；最后用加权SVD估计配准解。
contributions: 提出双RANSAC交互模型结合概率自更新局部对应策略，提升配准精度。
引入全局提前终止条件，在保证精度的同时显著降低运行时间。

analysis.experiments: 在公开数据集上评估，算法在时间效率上优于现有方法，且RMSE至少降低10%。
limitations: 可能对噪声或异常值较多的点云鲁棒性有限。

analysis.reason: 方法有明确创新（双RANSAC+概率自更新），实验显示显著提升，但属于增量改进，适合阅读摘要。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于概率自更新局部对应和线向量集的快速点云配准算法，在公开数据集上实现至少10%的RMSE提升。

papers.title: The Unseen Adversaries: Robust and Generalized Defense Against Adversarial Patches
papers.abstract: The vulnerabilities of deep neural networks against singularities have raised serious concerns regarding their deployment in the physical world. One of the most prominent and impactful physical-world adversarial perturbations is the attachment of patches to clean images, known as an adversarial patch attack. Similarly, natural noises such as Gaussian and Salt\&Pepper are highly prevalent in the real world. The current research need arises from the above vulnerabilities and the lack of efforts to tackle these two singularities independently and, especially, in combination. In this research, we have, for the first time, combined these two prominent singularities and proposed a novel dataset. Using this dataset, we have conducted a benchmark study of singularity data-point detection using features from several convolutional neural networks. For classification, rather than the popular neural network-based parameter tuning, we have used traditional yet effective machine learning classifiers. The extensive experiments across various in- and out-of-distribution (OOD) singularities reveal several interesting findings about the effectiveness of classifiers and show that it is hard to defend against adversaries when they are treated independently, and inefficient classifiers are selected.

analysis.tldr: 首次结合对抗性补丁和自然噪声两种奇异性，构建新数据集并评估传统机器学习分类器的检测效果。
analysis.research_motivation: 深度神经网络易受物理世界中的对抗性补丁攻击和自然噪声干扰，现有研究缺乏同时处理这两种奇异性的方法。
analysis.problem: 如何有效检测并防御同时包含对抗性补丁和自然噪声的输入数据。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验发现，独立处理奇异性时难以有效防御，且分类器选择不当会降低检测效率。
analysis.method: 构建包含对抗性补丁和自然噪声的新数据集，使用CNN提取特征，再用传统机器学习分类器进行奇异性检测。
contributions: 首次将对抗性补丁和自然噪声两种奇异性结合，提出新数据集。
基于该数据集对多种CNN特征和传统分类器进行基准测试，揭示独立处理奇异性的不足。
analysis.experiments: 在多种分布内和分布外奇异性上进行了广泛实验，比较了不同分类器的有效性。
limitations: 未涉及更复杂的对抗性攻击或多种噪声组合。
传统分类器可能在大规模数据上效率有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 首次结合两种奇异性，但方法较传统，实验规模有限，适合关注对抗鲁棒性的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首次结合对抗性补丁和自然噪声两种奇异性，构建新数据集并评估传统机器学习分类器的检测效果。

papers.title: DreamProver: Evolving Transferable Lemma Libraries via a Wake-Sleep Theorem-Proving Agent
papers.abstract: We introduce DreamProver, an agentic framework that leverages a "wake-sleep" program induction paradigm to discover reusable lemmas for formal theorem proving. Existing approaches either rely on fixed lemma libraries, which limit adaptability, or synthesize highly specific intermediate lemmas tailored to individual theorems, thereby lacking generality. DreamProver addresses this gap through an iterative two-stage process. In the wake stage, DreamProver attempts to prove theorems from a training set using the current lemma library while proposing new candidate lemmas. In the "sleep" stage, it abstracts, refines, and consolidates these candidates to compress and optimize the library. Through this alternating cycle, DreamProver progressively evolves a compact set of high-level, transferable lemmas that can be effectively used to prove unseen theorems in related domains. Experimental results demonstrate that DreamProver substantially improves proof success rates across a diverse set of mathematical benchmarks, while also producing more concise proofs and reducing computational cost.

analysis.tldr: DreamProver通过“醒-睡”程序归纳范式，自动演化可迁移引理库，提升形式化定理证明的成功率与效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有形式化定理证明方法要么依赖固定引理库导致适应性差，要么为每个定理合成高度特化的中间引理而缺乏通用性，亟需一种能自动发现可迁移引理的方法。
analysis.problem: 如何自动构建并优化一组紧凑、可迁移的引理库，以提升定理证明器在未见定理上的成功率和效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出DreamProver框架，采用“醒-睡”两阶段迭代：醒阶段用当前引理库证明训练集定理并提议新候选引理；睡阶段对候选引理进行抽象、精炼和合并，压缩并优化引理库。
contributions: 提出一种基于“醒-睡”程序归纳的智能体框架，自动演化可迁移引理库。
在多个数学基准上显著提升证明成功率，同时生成更简洁的证明并降低计算成本。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数学基准上评估，证明成功率显著提升，证明更简洁，计算成本降低。
limitations: 可能依赖训练集定理的覆盖范围，对全新领域迁移效果未知。
