analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法新颖（醒-睡范式），实验效果显著，但属于形式化证明领域，与VLM/视频生成等核心方向相关性中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: DreamProver通过“醒-睡”程序归纳范式，自动演化可迁移引理库，提升形式化定理证明的成功率与效率。

papers.title: When Continual Learning Moves to Memory: A Study of Experience Reuse in LLM Agents
papers.abstract: Memory-augmented LLM agents offer an appealing shortcut to continual learning: rather than updating model parameters, they accumulate experience in external memory, seemingly sidestepping the stability-plasticity dilemma of parametric learning. We show that this challenge does not disappear but resurfaces at the memory level. Under a limited context window, old and new experiences compete during retrieval, relocating the continual-learning bottleneck from parameter updates to memory access. To study this phenomenon, we introduce a (k,v) framework that disentangles two fundamental design axes of external memory: how experience is represented and how it is organized for retrieval. Across sequential-task experiments in ALFWorld and BabyAI, we find that abstract procedural memories transfer more reliably than detailed trajectories, while negative transfer disproportionately harms the hard cases. Moreover, finer-grained memory organization is not universally beneficial: designs that yield strong forward transfer can simultaneously induce severe forgetting. Together, these results reveal that external memory does not resolve the continual-learning problem; it reshapes it into a problem of memory representation and retrieval design.

analysis.tldr: 外部记忆并未解决LLM智能体的持续学习问题，而是将其重塑为记忆表征与检索设计问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 记忆增强的LLM智能体通过外部记忆积累经验，看似避免了参数更新的稳定性-可塑性困境，但实际在有限上下文窗口下，新旧经验在检索时竞争，将持续学习瓶颈转移到记忆访问层面。
analysis.problem: 研究外部记忆在LLM智能体持续学习中的实际作用，揭示记忆层面的稳定性-可塑性困境。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在有限上下文窗口下，新旧经验在检索时竞争，导致持续学习瓶颈从参数更新转移到记忆访问；抽象程序性记忆比详细轨迹更可靠；细粒度记忆组织并非普遍有益，强前向迁移可能同时导致严重遗忘。
analysis.method: 提出一个(k,v)框架，解耦外部记忆的两个设计轴：经验如何表征以及如何组织用于检索。
contributions: 揭示外部记忆并未解决持续学习问题，而是将其重塑为记忆表征与检索设计问题。
提出(k,v)框架解耦记忆表征与组织，并在ALFWorld和BabyAI上实验验证。
analysis.experiments: 在ALFWorld和BabyAI上进行顺序任务实验，比较不同记忆表征（抽象程序性记忆 vs 详细轨迹）和组织方式对前向迁移和遗忘的影响。
limitations: 实验仅在两个模拟环境（ALFWorld和BabyAI）中进行，未在真实世界或更复杂任务上验证。
未深入探讨记忆容量或检索机制的具体实现细节。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 揭示了外部记忆在持续学习中的新瓶颈，方法框架清晰，实验有洞察，但仅限模拟环境。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 外部记忆并未解决LLM智能体的持续学习问题，而是将其重塑为记忆表征与检索设计问题。

papers.title: CheXthought: A global multimodal dataset of clinical chain-of-thought reasoning and visual attention for chest X-ray interpretation
papers.abstract: Chest X-ray interpretation is one of the most frequently performed diagnostic tasks in medicine and a primary target for AI development, yet current vision-language models are primarily trained on datasets of paired images and reports, not the cognitive processes and visual attention that underlie clinical reasoning. Here, we present CheXthought, a global, multimodal resource containing 103,592 chain-of-thought reasoning traces and 6,609,082 synchronized visual attention annotations across 50,312 multi-read chest X-rays from 501 radiologists in 71 countries. Our analysis reveals clinical reasoning patterns in how experts deploy distinct visual search strategies, integrate clinical context, and communicate uncertainty. We demonstrate the clinical utility of CheXthought across four dimensions. First, CheXthought reasoning significantly outperforms state-of-the-art vision-language model chain-of-thought in factual accuracy and spatial grounding. Second, visual attention data used as an inference-time hint recovers missed findings and significantly reduces hallucinations. Third, vision-language models trained on CheXthought data achieve significantly stronger pathology classification, visual faithfulness, temporal reasoning and uncertainty communication. Fourth, leveraging CheXthought's multi-reader annotations, we predict both human-human and human-AI disagreement directly from an image, enabling transparent communication of case difficulty, uncertainty and model reliability. These findings establish CheXthought as a resource for advancing multimodal clinical reasoning and the development of more transparent, interpretable vision-language models.

analysis.tldr: CheXthought 是一个包含放射科医生思维链和视觉注意力标注的多模态胸片数据集，用于提升 VLM 的临床推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前视觉语言模型主要基于图像-报告对训练，缺乏临床推理中的认知过程和视觉注意力，导致模型可解释性和准确性不足。
analysis.problem: 如何构建包含临床思维链和视觉注意力的大规模多模态数据集，以提升 VLM 在胸片解读中的事实准确性、空间定位和不确定性沟通能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要揭示了专家在胸片解读中采用不同的视觉搜索策略、整合临床背景和沟通不确定性的临床推理模式。
analysis.method: 构建包含 103,592 条思维链推理轨迹和 6,609,082 个同步视觉注意力标注的多模态数据集，来自 71 个国家 501 名放射科医生对 50,312 张多读者胸片的解读。
contributions: 提供了全球最大规模的胸片临床思维链和视觉注意力数据集。
证明了思维链推理在事实准确性和空间定位上优于现有 VLM 思维链。
视觉注意力数据作为推理提示可恢复遗漏发现并减少幻觉。
基于多读者标注可预测人-人和人-AI 分歧，实现透明的不确定性沟通。
analysis.experiments: 摘要报告了 CheXthought 在四个维度的临床效用：思维链推理优于现有 VLM 思维链；视觉注意力提示减少幻觉；训练后的 VLM 在病理分类、视觉忠实度、时间推理和不确定性沟通上更强；可预测人-人和人-AI 分歧。
limitations: 数据集仅针对胸片，泛化到其他医学影像模态需验证。
思维链和注意力标注可能受放射科医生个体差异影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities

analysis.one_sentence_summary: CheXthought 是一个包含放射科医生思维链和视觉注意力标注的多模态胸片数据集，用于提升 VLM 的临床推理能力。

papers.title: Event-based Liveness Detection using Temporal Ocular Dynamics: An Exploratory Approach
papers.abstract: Face liveness detection has been extensively studied using RGB cameras, achieving strong performance under controlled conditions but often failing to generalize across sensors and attack scenarios. In this work, we explore event cameras as an alternative sensing modality for liveness detection based on temporal ocular dynamics. Event cameras capture sparse, asynchronous changes in brightness with microsecond resolution, enabling precise analysis of fast eye movements such as saccades. Replay attacks cannot faithfully reproduce these dynamics due to temporal resampling and display artifacts, leading to distinctive spatio-temporal patterns in the event domain. We design a data collection protocol to extend RGBE-Gaze with replay-attack recordings, yielding an event-based fake counterpart for liveness detection. We analyze event-driven temporal features from eye regions and evaluate their effectiveness for ocular motion segmentation and liveness classification. Our results show that event-based representations enable reliable discrimination between genuine and replayed sequences, achieving up to 95.37% top-1 accuracy with a spiking convolutional neural network. These preliminary findings highlight the potential of event-based sensing for robust and low-latency liveness detection.

analysis.tldr: 探索事件相机基于眼动时序动态的活体检测，初步实验达到95.37%准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: RGB相机活体检测在跨传感器和攻击场景下泛化性差，事件相机的高时间分辨率可捕捉快速眼动细节，有望提升鲁棒性。
analysis.problem: 如何利用事件相机捕获的时序眼动特征（如扫视）区分真实人脸与重放攻击。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 重放攻击因时间重采样和显示伪影无法忠实复现真实眼动动态，在事件域产生独特的时空模式。
analysis.method: 设计数据采集协议扩展RGBE-Gaze数据集，加入重放攻击记录；提取事件驱动的眼部时序特征，使用脉冲卷积神经网络进行活体分类。
contributions: 首次探索事件相机用于活体检测，基于时序眼动动态。
构建事件域重放攻击数据集并验证脉冲CNN的有效性，达到95.37% top-1准确率。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅针对重放攻击，未覆盖其他攻击类型（如3D面具）。
数据集规模可能有限，泛化性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 探索性工作，方法新颖但实验有限，适合关注事件相机应用的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 探索事件相机基于眼动时序动态的活体检测，初步实验达到95.37%准确率。

papers.title: TRIP-Evaluate: An Open Multimodal Benchmark for Evaluating Large Models in Transportation
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) and multimodal large models (MLLMs) are increasingly used for transportation tasks such as regulation question answering, traffic management support, engineering review, and autonomous-driving scene reasoning. Yet transportation workflows are rule-intensive, computation-intensive, safety-critical, and inherently multimodal. Existing general benchmarks provide limited evidence of whether a model can apply regulations correctly, perform verifiable engineering calculations, or interpret traffic scenes reliably, while the small number of public transportation benchmarks remain narrow in scope and rarely support fine-grained diagnosis across text, images, and point-cloud data. To address this gap, we present TRIP-Evaluate, an open multimodal benchmark for large models in transportation. The benchmark organizes 837 items using a role-task-knowledge taxonomy that covers vehicle, traffic-management, traveler, and planning-and-design functions. Each item is annotated with capability, modality, and difficulty labels, enabling diagnosis from overall accuracy down to specific failure modes. The current release includes 596 text items, 198 image items, and 43 point-cloud items. TRIP-Evaluate also standardizes item construction, quality control, prompting, decoding, and scoring to improve cross-model comparability. Results on a diverse panel of models show that text-based performance is improving, but substantial weaknesses remain in multi-step engineering calculation, rule-constrained reasoning, multimodal scene understanding, and point-cloud understanding. Overall, TRIP-Evaluate provides a reproducible, diagnosable, and engineering-aligned evaluation baseline for model selection, regression testing, and safer deployment in transportation applications.

analysis.tldr: TRIP-Evaluate 是一个面向交通领域的开放多模态基准，用于评估大模型在规则推理、工程计算和场景理解等方面的能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 交通任务规则密集、计算密集、安全关键且多模态，现有通用基准难以评估模型在交通领域的实际能力，而少量交通基准范围狭窄且不支持细粒度诊断。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个覆盖多模态、支持细粒度诊断、工程对齐的交通领域大模型评估基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 文本性能在提升，但在多步工程计算、规则约束推理、多模态场景理解和点云理解方面存在明显不足。

contributions: 提出了一个开放、可复现、可诊断的交通领域多模态基准 TRIP-Evaluate。
提供了细粒度诊断能力，支持从整体准确率到具体失败模式的分析。
标准化了评估流程，提高了跨模型可比性。
analysis.experiments: 在多种模型上进行了评估，发现文本性能提升，但多步工程计算、规则约束推理、多模态场景理解和点云理解仍存在明显弱点。
limitations: 基准规模有限（837项），可能无法覆盖所有交通场景。
点云数据仅43项，可能不足以全面评估点云理解能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 基准设计系统，但规模有限，创新性中等，对交通领域应用有较高价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: TRIP-Evaluate 是一个面向交通领域的开放多模态基准，用于评估大模型在规则推理、工程计算和场景理解等方面的能力。

papers.title: MedSynapse-V: Bridging Visual Perception and Clinical Intuition via Latent Memory Evolution
papers.abstract: High-precision medical diagnosis relies not only on static imaging features but also on the implicit diagnostic memory experts instantly invoke during image interpretation. We pinpoint a fundamental cognitive misalignment in medical VLMs caused by discrete tokenization, leading to quantization loss, long-range information dissipation, and missing case-adaptive expertise. To bridge this gap, we propose ours, a framework for latent diagnostic memory evolution that simulates the experiential invocation of clinicians by dynamically synthesizing implicit diagnostic memories within the model's hidden stream. Specifically, it begins with a Meta Query for Prior Memorization mechanism, where learnable probes retrieve structured priors from an anatomical prior encoder to generate condensed implicit memories. To ensure clinical fidelity, we introduce Causal Counterfactual Refinement (CCR), which leverages reinforcement learning and counterfactual rewards derived from region-level feature masking to quantify the causal contribution of each memory, thereby pruning redundancies and aligning latent representations with diagnostic logic. This evolutionary process culminates in Intrinsic Memory Transition (IMT), a privileged-autonomous dual-branch paradigm that internalizes teacher-branch diagnostic patterns into the student-branch via full-vocabulary divergence alignment. Comprehensive empirical evaluations across multiple datasets demonstrate that ours, by transferring external expertise into endogenous parameters, significantly outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods, particularly chain-of-thought paradigms, in diagnostic accuracy.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种通过隐式记忆演化模拟临床直觉的医学VLM框架，显著提升诊断准确性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有医学VLM因离散分词导致量化损失、长程信息消散和缺乏病例自适应专业知识，与临床专家的认知过程存在根本性错位。
analysis.problem: 解决医学VLM中视觉感知与临床直觉之间的认知错位，提升诊断准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出离散分词导致量化损失、长程信息消散和缺乏病例自适应专业知识，这是现有方法的失败模式。
analysis.method: 提出MedSynapse-V框架，包含元查询先验记忆化、因果反事实精炼和内在记忆转换三个模块，通过隐式记忆演化模拟临床专家经验。
contributions: 提出Meta Query for Prior Memorization机制，利用可学习探针从解剖先验编码器检索结构化先验生成隐式记忆。
引入Causal Counterfactual Refinement，通过强化学习和反事实奖励量化记忆的因果贡献，修剪冗余并对齐诊断逻辑。
设计Intrinsic Memory Transition，通过全词汇散度对齐将教师分支的诊断模式内化到学生分支。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集上进行综合实证评估，结果表明该方法显著优于现有最先进方法，特别是思维链范式。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量解剖先验编码器，泛化性需验证。
反事实奖励计算可能增加训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，针对医学VLM认知错位问题提出完整框架，实验显示显著提升，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种通过隐式记忆演化模拟临床直觉的医学VLM框架，显著提升诊断准确性。

papers.title: High-Dimensional Noise to Low-Dimensional Manifolds: A Manifold-Space Diffusion Framework for Degraded Hyperspectral Image Classification
papers.abstract: Recently, Hyperspectral Image (HSI) classification has attracted increasing attention in remote sensing. However, HSI data are inherently high-dimensional but low-rank, with discriminative information concentrated on a low-dimensional latent manifold. In real-world remote sensing scenarios, the superposition of multiple degradation factors disrupts this intrinsic manifold structure, driving samples away from their original low-dimensional distribution and introducing substantial redundant and non-discriminative variations. To better handle this challenge, this paper proposes a manifold-space diffusion framework (MSDiff) for robust hyperspectral classification under complex degradation conditions. Specifically, the proposed method first maps high-dimensional, degradation-affected HSI data into a compact low-dimensional manifold through a discriminative spectral-spatial reconstruction task, preserving class semantics and reducing redundant variations. A diffusion-based generative model is then applied to regularize the spectral-spatial distribution within the manifold, enabling progressive refinement and stabilization of latent features against residual degradations. The key advantage of the proposed framework lies in performing diffusion-based distribution modeling directly on the low-dimensional manifold, effectively decoupling degradation-induced disturbances from intrinsic discriminative structures and enhancing representation stability under complex degradations. Experimental results on multiple hyperspectral benchmarks demonstrate consistent performance improvements over state-of-the-art methods under diverse composite degradation settings. The code will be available at https://github.com/yangboxiang1207/MSDiff

analysis.tldr: 提出流形空间扩散框架MSDiff，通过低维流形上的扩散生成模型提升退化高光谱图像分类鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 高光谱图像分类在遥感中重要，但数据高维低秩且易受多种退化因素干扰，破坏内在流形结构，现有方法难以有效处理复合退化。
analysis.problem: 如何在复杂退化条件下实现鲁棒的高光谱图像分类，同时去除冗余和非判别性变化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 高光谱数据本质低秩，判别信息集中在低维流形上，但退化因素使样本偏离原始低维分布，引入大量冗余变化。
analysis.method: 先通过判别性光谱-空间重建任务将退化数据映射到紧凑低维流形，保留类别语义并减少冗余；再在流形上应用扩散生成模型正则化分布，逐步精炼和稳定潜在特征以抵抗残余退化。
contributions: 提出流形空间扩散框架，将扩散建模从原始高维空间转移到低维流形，有效解耦退化干扰与内在判别结构。
在多个高光谱基准上，复合退化设置下取得一致性能提升，优于现有方法。
analysis.experiments: 在多个高光谱基准数据集上，针对多种复合退化设置进行实验，结果一致优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能依赖流形假设的有效性，若数据流形结构不清晰则效果受限。
扩散模型在流形上的采样效率可能较低，需进一步优化。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较强，将扩散模型与流形学习结合解决退化高光谱分类问题，实验验证有效，但应用领域较专，影响范围有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出流形空间扩散框架MSDiff，通过低维流形上的扩散生成模型提升退化高光谱图像分类鲁棒性。

papers.title: Enforcing Benign Trajectories: A Behavioral Firewall for Structured-Workflow AI Agents
papers.abstract: Structured-workflow agents driven by large language models execute tool calls against sensitive external environments. We propose \codename, a telemetry-driven behavioral anomaly detection firewall. Drawing on sequence-based intrusion detection, \codename\ compiles verified benign tool-call telemetry into a parameterized deterministic finite automaton (pDFA). The model defines permitted tool sequences, sequential contexts, and parameter bounds. At runtime, a lightweight gateway enforces these boundaries via an $O(1)$ state-transition structural lookup, shifting computationally expensive analysis entirely offline. Evaluated on the Agent Security Bench (ASB), \codename\ achieves a 5.6\% macro-averaged attack success rate (ASR) across five scenarios. Within three structured workflows, ASR drops to 2.2\%, outperforming Aegis, a state-of-the-art stateless scanner, at 12.8\%. \codename\ achieves 0\% ASR on multi-step and context-sequential attacks in structured settings. Furthermore, against 1,000 algorithmically spliced exfiltration payloads, only 1.4\% matched valid structural paths, all of which failed end-to-end string parameter guards (0 successes out of 14 surviving paths, 95\% CI [0\%, 23.2\%]). \codename\ introduces just 2.2~ms of per-call latency (a 3.7$\times$ speedup over \textsc{Aegis}) while maintaining a 2.0\% benign task failure rate (BTFR) on benign workloads. Modeling the behavioral trajectory effectively collapses the available attack surface, but unmaintained continuous parameter bounds remain vulnerable to synonym-substitution attacks (18\% evasion rate). Thus, exact-match whitelisting of sensitive parameters ultimately bears the final defensive load against execution.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于参数化确定性有限自动机（pDFA）的行为防火墙，用于结构化工作流AI Agent，通过离线编译合法工具调用轨迹实现运行时O(1)异常检测，在Agent安全基准上显著降低攻击成功率。
analysis.research_motivation: 大语言模型驱动的结构化工作流Agent在执行工具调用时面临外部环境的安全威胁，现有方法（如无状态扫描器Aegis）在检测多步和上下文相关攻击时效果有限，且在线计算开销大。
analysis.problem: 如何高效检测结构化工作流Agent中恶意工具调用序列，同时保持低延迟和低误报率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Codename，一种遥测驱动的行为异常检测防火墙。将已验证的合法工具调用遥测编译为参数化确定性有限自动机（pDFA），定义允许的工具序列、上下文和参数边界。运行时通过O(1)状态转移结构查找实现轻量级网关强制。
contributions: 提出基于pDFA的行为防火墙，将复杂分析离线化，实现运行时高效检测。
在Agent Security Bench上实现5.6%的平均攻击成功率，结构化工作流中降至2.2%，优于Aegis的12.8%。
引入仅2.2ms的每调用延迟，比Aegis快3.7倍，同时保持2.0%的良性任务失败率。
analysis.experiments: 在Agent Security Bench（ASB）五个场景上评估，结构化工作流中攻击成功率2.2%，多步和上下文攻击成功率为0%；对1000个拼接的窃取载荷，仅1.4%匹配有效结构路径且全部被参数守卫拦截。
limitations: 未维护的连续参数边界易受同义词替换攻击（18%逃逸率）。
依赖精确匹配白名单敏感参数，可能增加维护成本。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分且效果显著，与Agent安全对齐方向高度相关，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于参数化确定性有限自动机（pDFA）的行为防火墙，用于结构化工作流AI Agent，通过离线编译合法工具调用轨迹实现运行时O(1)异常检测，在Agent安全基准上显著降低攻击成功率。

papers.title: Calibrated Surprise: An Information-Theoretic Account of Creative Quality
papers.abstract: The essence of good creative writing is calibrated surprise: when constraints from all relevant dimensions act together, the feasible solution space collapses into a narrow region, and the surviving choices look least predictable from an unconstrained view. "Calibrated" has a precise meaning: the author's intent, the reader's reasonable expectation, and the logic of reality converge. When these three independent judgements agree on every dimension, the set of admissible writing choices is forced into a very small region. A mathematical corollary follows: full-dimensional accuracy and mediocrity are mutually exclusive -- two sides of one constraint structure, not separate goals. We use Shannon's mutual information $I(X;Y) = H(X) - H(X|Y)$ as our analysis tool. "Calibrated" corresponds to conditional entropy going to zero; "surprise" to entropy going up; mutual information is the precise measure of the joint quantity. The argument rests on two pillars. Static: when constraints from ethos, mythos, lexis, and dianoia are imposed together, the admissible set collapses sharply, and surviving solutions show up as low-probability choices from an unconstrained view. Dynamic: the chain rule shows each writing choice is constrained by what came before and constrains what comes after; macro-level decisions naturally contribute a larger share of information, removing the need for hand-tuned weighting. Through case studies and lightweight LLM-logprob computations, we show the framework is both analytically useful and operational, laying the theoretical groundwork for Creative Quality Alignment (CQA) and a professional evaluation benchmark.

analysis.tldr: 用信息论解释创意写作中“校准的惊喜”本质，并建立可操作的评估框架。
analysis.research_motivation: 创意写作质量缺乏精确的数学定义，现有方法难以同时捕捉约束与惊喜的平衡。
analysis.problem: 如何用信息论量化创意写作中“校准的惊喜”这一核心品质。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 当作者意图、读者预期和现实逻辑三个维度约束一致时，可行解空间急剧缩小，幸存选择在无约束视角下呈现低概率（惊喜）。
analysis.method: 基于香农互信息 I(X;Y)=H(X)-H(X|Y)，将“校准”对应条件熵趋零，“惊喜”对应熵增大，互信息衡量联合量；静态分析多维度约束下的解空间坍缩，动态分析链式法则下写作选择的序贯约束。
contributions: 提出“校准的惊喜”的精确信息论定义，证明全维度准确性与平庸性互斥。
建立静态与动态双支柱分析框架，并通过案例和LLM对数概率验证其可操作性。
analysis.experiments: 通过案例研究和轻量级LLM对数概率计算展示框架的分析实用性和可操作性。
limitations: 实验仅基于案例和轻量级LLM计算，缺乏大规模定量评估。
框架对非文本模态（如视觉创意）的适用性未讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 理论创新性强，但实验验证有限，适合对创意生成评估感兴趣的研究者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 用信息论解释创意写作中“校准的惊喜”本质，并建立可操作的评估框架。

papers.title: Semantic Foam: Unifying Spatial and Semantic Scene Decomposition
papers.abstract: Modern scene reconstruction methods, such as 3D Gaussian Splatting, deliver photo-realistic novel view synthesis at real-time speeds, yet their adoption in interactive graphics applications has been limited. A major bottleneck is the difficulty of interacting with these representations compared to traditional, human-authored 3D assets. While previous research has attempted to impose semantic decomposition on these models, significant challenges remain regarding segmentation quality and consistency. To address this, we introduce Semantic Foam, extending the recently proposed Radiant Foam representations to semantic decomposition tasks. Our approach integrates the natural spatial volumetric decomposition of Radiant Foam's Voronoi mesh with an explicit semantic feature field parameterized at the cell level. This explicit structure enables direct spatial regularization, which prevents artifacts caused by occlusion or inconsistent supervision across views - common pitfalls for other point-based representations. Experimental results show that our method achieves superior object-level segmentation performance compared to state-of-the-art methods like Gaussian Grouping and SAGA.

analysis.tldr: Semantic Foam 通过将空间 Voronoi 网格分解与显式语义特征场结合，实现了高质量且一致的三维场景语义分割。
analysis.research_motivation: 现代场景重建方法（如 3D Gaussian Splatting）虽能实现实时逼真渲染，但难以与交互式图形应用集成，主要障碍是这些表示难以像传统人工创建的 3D 资产那样进行交互操作。
analysis.problem: 现有基于点的场景表示在语义分解中面临分割质量差和跨视图不一致的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，其他基于点的表示方法（如 Gaussian Grouping 和 SAGA）容易因遮挡或跨视图不一致监督而产生伪影。
analysis.method: 扩展 Radiant Foam 表示，将其自然空间 Voronoi 网格分解与在细胞级别参数化的显式语义特征场相结合，并通过直接空间正则化防止伪影。
contributions: 提出 Semantic Foam，统一了空间与语义场景分解。
通过显式语义特征场和空间正则化，实现了优于现有方法（如 Gaussian Grouping 和 SAGA）的物体级分割性能。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及在物体级分割任务上优于 Gaussian Grouping 和 SAGA。
limitations: 可能依赖 Radiant Foam 的 Voronoi 网格质量。
语义特征场的显式参数化可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，将空间分解与语义特征场结合，实验显示优于现有方法，但摘要未提供详细实验数据。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Semantic Foam 通过将空间 Voronoi 网格分解与显式语义特征场结合，实现了高质量且一致的三维场景语义分割。

papers.title: Multiple Consistent 2D-3D Mappings for Robust Zero-Shot 3D Visual Grounding
papers.abstract: Zero-shot 3D Visual Grounding (3DVG) is a critical capability for open-world embodied AI. However, existing methods are fundamentally bottlenecked by the poor quality of open-vocabulary 3D proposals, suffering from inaccurate categories and imprecise geometries, as well as the spatial redundancy of exhaustive multi-view reasoning. To address these challenges, we propose MCM-VG, a novel framework that achieves robust zero-shot 3DVG by explicitly establishing Multiple Consistent 2D-3D Mappings. Instead of passively relying on noisy 3D segments, MCM-VG enforces 2D-3D consistency across three fundamental dimensions to achieve precise target localization and reliable reasoning. First, a Semantic Alignment module corrects category mismatches via LLM-driven query parsing and coarse-to-fine 2D-3D matching. Second, an Instance Rectification module leverages VLM-guided 2D segmentations to reconstruct missing targets, back-projecting these reliable visual priors to establish accurate 3D geometries. Finally, to eliminate spatial redundancy, a Viewpoint Distillation module clusters 3D camera directions to extract optimal frames. By pairing these optimal RGB frames with Bird's Eye View maps into concise visual prompt sets, we formulate the final target disambiguation as a multiple-choice reasoning task for Vision-Language Models. Extensive evaluations on ScanRefer and Nr3D benchmarks demonstrate that MCM-VG sets a new state-of-the-art for zero-shot 3D visual grounding. Remarkably, it achieves 62.0\% and 53.6\% in Acc@0.25 and Acc@0.5 on ScanRefer, outperforming previous baselines by substantial margins of 6.4\% and 4.0\%.

analysis.tldr: 提出MCM-VG框架，通过建立多一致2D-3D映射，在零样本3D视觉定位任务上取得新SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 零样本3D视觉定位是开放世界具身AI的关键能力，但现有方法受限于开放词汇3D提案质量差（类别不准、几何不精确）以及多视角推理的空间冗余。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖高质量3D分割的情况下，实现鲁棒的零样本3D视觉定位。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法依赖噪声3D片段，导致类别不匹配和几何不精确；多视角推理存在空间冗余。
analysis.method: MCM-VG框架，包含三个模块：语义对齐模块（LLM驱动查询解析+粗到细2D-3D匹配）、实例修正模块（VLM引导2D分割重建缺失目标并反投影为3D几何）、视点蒸馏模块（聚类3D相机方向提取最优帧，结合鸟瞰图形成简洁视觉提示集，将目标消歧转化为多选推理任务）。
contributions: 提出MCM-VG框架，通过多一致2D-3D映射解决零样本3DVG中的提案质量差和空间冗余问题。
在ScanRefer和Nr3D基准上取得新SOTA，Acc@0.25和Acc@0.5分别提升6.4%和4.0%。
analysis.experiments: 在ScanRefer和Nr3D基准上评估，MCM-VG在ScanRefer上Acc@0.25和Acc@0.5分别达到62.0%和53.6%，超越先前基线6.4%和4.0%。
limitations: 依赖LLM和VLM的推理能力，可能受限于模型性能。
视点蒸馏模块的聚类策略可能对复杂场景不鲁棒。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验效果显著，与VLM/3D视觉方向高度相关，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MCM-VG框架，通过建立多一致2D-3D映射，在零样本3D视觉定位任务上取得新SOTA。

papers.title: GaitKD: A Universal Decoupled Distillation Framework for Efficient Gait Recognition
papers.abstract: Gait recognition is an attractive biometric modality for long-range and contact-free identification, but high-performing gait models often rely on deep and computationally expensive architectures that are difficult to deploy in practice. Knowledge distillation (KD) offers a natural way to transfer knowledge from a powerful teacher to an efficient student; however, standard KD is often less effective for part-structured gait models, where supervision is formed from both part-wise classification logits and part-wise retrieval embeddings. In this paper, we propose GaitKD, a distillation framework that decouples gait knowledge transfer into two complementary components: decision-level distillation and boundary-level distillation. Specifically, GaitKD aligns the teacher and student through part-calibrated logit distillation to transfer inter-class decision relations, while preserving the teacher-induced partitioning of the embedding space through an activation-boundary objective instead of direct feature regression. With a simple aligned part-wise design, GaitKD supports heterogeneous teacher-student gait models without introducing additional inference cost. Experimental results across multiple gait recognition benchmarks and teacher-student configurations show consistent improvements over strong gait baselines. Our study demonstrates that the two transfer components are complementary, and boundary-preserving distillation provides more stable performance than direct feature regression. Source code is available at https://github.com/liyiersan/GaitKD/

analysis.tldr: 提出GaitKD解耦蒸馏框架，通过决策级和边界级蒸馏提升步态识别学生模型性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 高性能步态模型依赖深度复杂架构难以部署，知识蒸馏可迁移知识但标准方法对部分结构步态模型效果不佳。
analysis.problem: 标准知识蒸馏对部分结构步态模型（同时有分类logits和检索嵌入）效果有限，需设计专用蒸馏方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准KD对部分结构步态模型效果不佳，边界保留蒸馏比直接特征回归更稳定。
analysis.method: 将步态知识迁移解耦为决策级蒸馏（部分校准logits对齐）和边界级蒸馏（激活边界目标保留嵌入空间划分），支持异构师生模型。
contributions: 提出GaitKD解耦蒸馏框架，包含决策级和边界级蒸馏两个互补组件
设计部分校准logits蒸馏和激活边界目标，无需额外推理成本
analysis.experiments: 在多个步态识别基准和师生配置上验证，相比强基线有一致提升。
limitations: 可能依赖特定步态模型结构
未在极端场景（如遮挡、视角变化）下详细分析
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法有创新但属于增量贡献，实验充分但未超出预期，建议阅读摘要。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出GaitKD解耦蒸馏框架，通过决策级和边界级蒸馏提升步态识别学生模型性能。

papers.title: OmniTrend: Content-Context Modeling for Scalable Social Popularity Prediction
papers.abstract: Predicting social media popularity requires understanding both the intrinsic appeal of content and the external context that determines how it is exposed to users. Existing methods focus on content signals but do not separate them from exposure-related patterns, which causes the learned representations to absorb platform-specific visibility effects and weakens both interpretability and cross-platform transfer. This paper introduces OmniTrend, a unified framework that models popularity as the joint outcome of content attractiveness and contextual exposure. The content module learns cross-modal representations from visual, audio, and textual cues to quantify intrinsic appeal, while the context module estimates exposure from exogenous signals such as posting time, author activity, topical trends, and retrieval-based neighborhood statistics. OmniTrend learns separate predictors for content attractiveness and contextual exposure and integrates them in the final popularity estimate, which makes the role of each factor explicit and supports robust transfer across image and video platforms.

analysis.tldr: OmniTrend通过分离内容吸引力与上下文曝光因素，实现可解释且跨平台迁移的社会媒体流行度预测。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法将内容信号与曝光相关模式混合学习，导致表征吸收平台特定可见性效应，削弱可解释性和跨平台迁移能力。
analysis.problem: 如何将内容吸引力与上下文曝光因素分离，以提升流行度预测的可解释性和跨平台泛化能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出OmniTrend统一框架，包含内容模块（从视觉、音频、文本学习跨模态表征量化内在吸引力）和上下文模块（从发布时间、作者活跃度、主题趋势、检索邻域统计估计曝光），分别学习预测器并整合为最终流行度估计。
contributions: 提出内容-上下文分离建模框架，提升可解释性
支持跨图像和视频平台的鲁棒迁移
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖外部信号（如主题趋势）的可用性
跨平台迁移效果可能受平台差异影响
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法有创新但摘要未提供实验验证，适合保存后续关注。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: OmniTrend通过分离内容吸引力与上下文曝光因素，实现可解释且跨平台迁移的社会媒体流行度预测。

papers.title: Multi-Stage Bi-Atrial Segmentation Framework from 3D Late Gadolinium-Enhanced MRI using V-Net Family Models
papers.abstract: We report our multi-stage framework designed for the problem of multi-class bi-atrial segmentation from 3D late gadolinium-enhanced (LGE) MRI of the human heart. The pipeline consists of a preprocessing step using multidimensional contrast limited adaptive histogram equalization (MCLAHE); coarse region segmentation from MCLAHE-enhanced and down-sampled MRI using a V-Net family model; and fine segmentation from the coarse region using another V-Net model. Asymmetric loss is adopted to optimize the model weights.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种多阶段双心房分割框架，结合MCLAHE预处理和V-Net模型，从3D LGE MRI中实现粗到细的分割。
analysis.research_motivation: 3D LGE MRI中双心房分割对房颤等疾病诊断重要，但现有方法难以同时处理多类分割和图像对比度不均问题。
analysis.problem: 从3D LGE MRI中实现准确的多类双心房分割。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 多阶段框架：先MCLAHE增强和降采样，再用V-Net模型进行粗分割，最后用另一个V-Net模型在粗分割区域上进行精细分割，并使用非对称损失优化。

papers.title: Beyond Shortcuts: Mitigating Visual Illusions in Frozen VLMs via Qualitative Reasoning
papers.abstract: While Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have achieved state-of-the-art performance in general visual tasks, their perceptual robustness remains remarkably brittle when confronted with optical illusions. These failures are often attributed to shortcut heuristics, where models prioritize linguistic priors and memorized prototypes over direct visual evidence. In this work, we propose Structured Qualitative Inference (SQI), a training-free, data-centric framework designed to fortify visual grounding in frozen VLMs. SQI addresses perceptual anomalies through three systematic modules: (1) Axiomatic Constraint Injection, which suppresses erroneous metric estimations and quantitative hallucinations; (2) Hierarchical Scene Decomposition, which decouples target visual manifolds from complex background distractors; and (3) Counterfactual Self-Verification, an adversarial reasoning step that mitigates confirmation bias. By orchestrating these qualitative constraints at inference time, SQI effectively aligns high-level linguistic reasoning with low-level visual perception. Our framework was evaluated on the DataCV 2026 Challenge (Task I: Classic Illusion Understanding), where it ranked 2nd place overall. Experimental results demonstrate that SQI not only significantly enhances accuracy across diverse illusion categories but also provides superior diagnostic interpretability without any model fine-tuning. Our success underscores the potential of structured qualitative grounding as a robust paradigm for developing next-generation, illusion-resistant vision-language systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出结构化定性推理（SQI）框架，无需微调即可缓解冻结VLM在视觉错觉上的感知失败。
analysis.research_motivation: VLM在通用视觉任务中表现优异，但在光学错觉面前感知鲁棒性极差，常因捷径启发式（依赖语言先验和记忆原型而非直接视觉证据）而失败。
analysis.problem: 如何在不微调模型的前提下，增强冻结VLM对视觉错觉的视觉基础能力，抑制感知异常。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: VLM在光学错觉中失败源于捷径启发式：模型优先使用语言先验和记忆原型，而非直接视觉证据。
analysis.method: 提出结构化定性推理（SQI），包含三个模块：公理约束注入（抑制错误度量估计和量化幻觉）、层次化场景分解（解耦目标视觉流形与复杂背景干扰）、反事实自验证（对抗性推理步骤缓解确认偏差）。在推理时编排这些定性约束，对齐高层语言推理与低层视觉感知。
contributions: 提出SQI框架，无需训练即可增强冻结VLM在视觉错觉上的鲁棒性。
在DataCV 2026挑战赛经典错觉理解任务中获得第二名，显著提升多种错觉类别的准确率并提供诊断可解释性。
analysis.experiments: 在DataCV 2026 Challenge（Task I: Classic Illusion Understanding）上评估，获得第二名。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅针对视觉错觉任务，泛化到其他感知异常场景需验证。
依赖手工设计的公理约束，可能难以覆盖所有错觉类型。

papers.title: Compositional Meta-Learning for Mitigating Task Heterogeneity in Physics-Informed Neural Networks
papers.abstract: Physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) approximate solutions of partial differential equations (PDEs) by embedding physical laws into the loss function. In parameterized PDE families, variations in coefficients or boundary/initial conditions define distinct tasks. This makes training individual PINNs for each task computationally prohibitive, while cross-task transfer can be sensitive to task heterogeneity. While meta-learning can reduce retraining cost, existing methods often rely on a single global initialization and may suffer from negative transfer, particularly under feature-scarce coordinate inputs and limited training-task availability. We propose the Learning-Affinity Adaptive Modular Physics-Informed Neural Network (LAM-PINN), a compositional framework that leverages task-specific learning dynamics. LAM-PINN combines PDE parameters with learning-affinity metrics from brief transfer sessions to construct a task representation and cluster tasks even with coordinate-only inputs. It decomposes the model into cluster-specialized subnetworks and a shared meta network, and learns routing weights to selectively reuse modules instead of relying on a single global initialization. Across three PDE benchmarks, LAM-PINN achieves an average 19.7-fold reduction in mean squared error (MSE) on unseen tasks using only 10% of the training iterations required by conventional PINNs. These results indicate its effectiveness for generalization to unseen configurations within bounded design spaces of parameterized PDE families in resource-constrained engineering settings.

analysis.tldr: 提出组合式元学习框架LAM-PINN，通过任务聚类和模块化路由缓解物理信息神经网络中的任务异质性，显著提升泛化性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 物理信息神经网络（PINN）在参数化PDE族中，不同系数或边界条件构成不同任务，单独训练每个任务计算成本高，而跨任务迁移易受任务异质性影响，现有元学习方法依赖单一全局初始化，在特征稀疏的坐标输入和有限训练任务下可能发生负迁移。
analysis.problem: 如何高效训练PINN以泛化到参数化PDE族中的未见任务，同时缓解任务异质性带来的负迁移问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，在参数化PDE族中，任务异质性导致跨任务迁移性能下降，现有元学习方法因单一全局初始化而受限于负迁移，尤其在坐标输入特征稀疏和训练任务数量有限时。
analysis.method: 提出LAM-PINN，一种组合式元学习框架：利用PDE参数和短暂迁移会话中的学习亲和度指标构建任务表示，对任务进行聚类；将模型分解为聚类专用子网络和共享元网络，学习路由权重以选择性重用模块，而非依赖单一全局初始化。
contributions: 提出LAM-PINN，一种组合式元学习框架，通过任务聚类和模块化路由缓解PINN中的任务异质性。
引入学习亲和度指标，在坐标输入下也能有效构建任务表示和聚类。
在三个PDE基准上，LAM-PINN在仅用传统PINN 10%训练迭代次数的情况下，平均MSE降低19.7倍。
analysis.experiments: 在三个PDE基准上评估，LAM-PINN在未见任务上平均MSE降低19.7倍，仅需传统PINN 10%的训练迭代次数。
limitations: 可能依赖任务聚类质量，聚类错误可能影响性能。
方法在更复杂或高维PDE问题上的可扩展性未在摘要中讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: transfer learning, meta learning, and lifelong learning
analysis.reason: 方法创新性高（组合式元学习+任务聚类），实验效果显著，但应用领域（PINN）与核心关注方向（VLM/LLM等）中等相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出组合式元学习框架LAM-PINN，通过任务聚类和模块化路由缓解物理信息神经网络中的任务异质性，显著提升泛化性能。

papers.title: TimeMM: Time-as-Operator Spectral Filtering for Dynamic Multimodal Recommendation
papers.abstract: Multimodal recommendation improves user modeling by integrating collaborative signals with heterogeneous item content. In real applications, user interests evolve over time and exhibit nonstationary dynamics, where different preference factors change at different rates. This challenge is amplified in multimodal settings because visual and textual cues can dominate decisions under different temporal regimes. Despite strong progress, most multimodal recommenders still rely on static interaction graphs or coarse temporal heuristics, which limits their ability to model continuous preference evolution with fine-grained temporal adaptation. To address these limitations, we propose TimeMM, a time-conditioned spectral filtering framework for dynamic multimodal recommendation. TimeMM instantiates Time-as-Operator by mapping interaction recency to a family of parametric temporal kernels that reweight edges on the user--item graph, producing component-specific representations without explicit eigendecomposition. To capture non-stationary interests, we introduce Adaptive Spectral Filtering that mixes the operator bank according to temporal context, yielding prediction-specific effective spectral responses. To account for modality-specific temporal sensitivity, we further propose Spectral-Aware Modality Routing that calibrates visual and textual contributions conditioned on the same temporal context. Finally, a ranking-space Spectral Diversity Regularization encourages complementary expert behaviors and prevents filter-bank collapse. Extensive experiments on real-world benchmarks demonstrate that TimeMM consistently outperforms state-of-the-art multimodal recommenders while maintaining linear-time scalability.

analysis.tldr: 提出时间条件谱滤波框架TimeMM，通过将时间映射为算子实现动态多模态推荐，在真实基准上超越SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有多模态推荐系统大多依赖静态交互图或粗粒度时间启发式，难以建模用户兴趣的连续演化与模态特异的时间敏感性。
analysis.problem: 如何对多模态推荐中的非平稳用户兴趣进行细粒度时间自适应建模。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 用户兴趣随时间非平稳演化，不同偏好因素变化速率不同；视觉和文本线索在不同时间阶段主导决策。
analysis.method: 提出TimeMM框架，包含三个核心模块：1) Time-as-Operator：将交互时效性映射为参数化时间核，重加权用户-物品图边权重，无需显式特征分解；2) Adaptive Spectral Filtering：根据时间上下文混合算子库，产生预测特定的谱响应；3) Spectral-Aware Modality Routing：根据时间上下文校准视觉和文本贡献；4) Spectral Diversity Regularization：防止滤波器坍缩，鼓励专家行为互补。
contributions: 提出Time-as-Operator范式，将时间映射为谱滤波算子，实现连续时间建模。
设计自适应谱滤波和模态路由机制，分别捕获非平稳兴趣和模态时间敏感性。
在真实基准上取得一致最优性能，且保持线性时间可扩展性。
analysis.experiments: 在真实世界基准上进行了大量实验，TimeMM一致优于最先进的多模态推荐方法。摘要未提供具体数据集和指标数值。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的时间戳数据。
谱滤波的可解释性可能有限。

analysis.reason: 方法创新性较强，技术深度高，但应用领域为推荐系统，与核心关注方向中等相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出时间条件谱滤波框架TimeMM，通过将时间映射为算子实现动态多模态推荐，在真实基准上超越SOTA。

papers.title: MetaSR: Content-Adaptive Metadata Orchestration for Generative Super-Resolution
papers.abstract: We study generative super-resolution (SR) in real-world scenarios where content and degradations vary across domains, genres, and segments. For example, images and videos may alternate between text overlays, fast motion, smooth cartoons, and low-light faces, each benefiting from different forms of side information. Existing metadata-guided SR methods typically use a fixed conditioning design, which is suboptimal when useful cues are content dependent and transmission budgets are limited. We propose MetaSR, a Diffusion Transformer (DiT)-based framework that selects and injects task-relevant metadata to guide SR under resource constraints. Specifically, we use the DiT's own VAE and transformer backbone to fuse heterogeneous metadata, and adopt an efficient distillation strategy that enables one-step diffusion inference. Experiments across diverse content buckets and degradation regimes show that MetaSR outperforms reference solutions by up to 1.0~dB PSNR while achieving up to 50\% transmission bitrate saving at matched quality. We assess these gains under a rate--distortion optimization (RDO) framework that jointly accounts for sender-side bitrate and receiver/display quality metrics (e.g., PSNR and SSIM).

analysis.tldr: 提出MetaSR，一种内容自适应的元数据编排框架，用于生成式超分辨率，在多种内容和退化条件下提升性能并节省传输带宽。
analysis.research_motivation: 现实场景中图像和视频的内容与退化类型多样（如文本叠加、快速运动、卡通、低光人脸等），不同内容需要不同的辅助信息，但现有元数据引导的超分辨率方法使用固定的条件设计，在内容依赖且传输预算有限时效果不佳。
analysis.problem: 如何在资源受限的传输条件下，根据内容自适应地选择和注入任务相关的元数据，以提升生成式超分辨率的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于扩散Transformer（DiT）的框架，利用DiT自身的VAE和Transformer骨干融合异构元数据，并采用高效蒸馏策略实现单步扩散推理。
contributions: 提出MetaSR，一种内容自适应的元数据编排框架，用于生成式超分辨率。
在多种内容和退化条件下，MetaSR相比参考方案PSNR提升高达1.0 dB，并在相同质量下节省高达50%的传输比特率。
analysis.experiments: 在多种内容桶和退化机制下进行实验，使用率-失真优化（RDO）框架评估发送端比特率和接收端质量指标（如PSNR和SSIM）。

papers.title: StratMem-Bench: Evaluating Strategic Memory Use in Virtual Character Conversation Beyond Factual Recall
papers.abstract: Achieving realistic human-like conversation for virtual characters requires not only a simple memorization and recall of past events, but also the strategic utilization of memory to meet factual needs and social engagement. Current memory utilization relevant (e.g., memory-augmented generation, long-term dialogue, and etc.) benchmarks overlook this nuance, treating memory primarily as a static repository of facts rather than a dynamic resource to be strategically deployed in dialogues. To address this gap, we design StratMem-Bench, a new benchmark to evaluate strategic memory use in character-centric dialogues. This dataset comprises 657 instances where virtual characters must navigate heterogeneous memory pools containing required, supportive, and irrelevant memories. We also propose a framework with different evaluation metrics including Strict Memory Compliance, Memory Integration Quality, Proactive Enrichment Score and Conditional Irrelevance Rate, to evaluate strategic memory use capabilities of virtual characters. Experiments on StratMem-Bench which leverage the state-of-the-art large language models as virtual characters show that all models perform well at distinguishing between required and irrelevant memories, but struggle once supportive memories are introduced into the decision process.

analysis.tldr: 提出 StratMem-Bench 基准，评估虚拟角色在对话中策略性使用记忆的能力，发现现有模型在引入支持性记忆时表现不佳。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有记忆利用基准将记忆视为静态事实库，忽略了对话中策略性部署记忆的需求，导致虚拟角色对话不够真实。
analysis.problem: 缺乏评估虚拟角色在对话中策略性使用记忆（而非简单回忆事实）的基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 所有模型在区分必需和无关记忆时表现良好，但引入支持性记忆后决策困难。
analysis.method: 构建包含 657 个实例的数据集，其中虚拟角色需处理包含必需、支持和无关记忆的异构记忆池，并提出四项评估指标：严格记忆合规性、记忆整合质量、主动丰富分数和条件无关率。
contributions: 提出 StratMem-Bench 基准，用于评估虚拟角色对话中的策略性记忆使用。
设计包含异构记忆池的数据集和多项评估指标。
通过实验揭示现有 LLM 在策略性记忆使用上的不足。

limitations: 数据集规模较小（657 个实例），可能不足以覆盖所有场景。

papers.title: Generalized Category Discovery under Domain Shifts: From Vision to Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: Generalized Category Discovery (GCD) aims to categorize unlabelled instances from both known and unknown classes by transferring knowledge from labelled data of known classes. Existing methods assume all data comes from a single domain, yet real-world unlabelled data often exhibits domain shifts alongside semantic shifts. We study GCD under domain shifts and propose three frameworks that adapt foundation models, ranging from self-supervised vision models to vision-language models. (i) HiLo disentangles domain and semantic features through multi-level feature extraction and mutual information minimization, combined with PatchMix augmentation and curriculum sampling. (ii) HLPrompt extends HiLo with semantic-aware spatial prompt tuning to suppress background and domain noise. (iii) VLPrompt leverages vision-language models via factorized textual prompts and cross-modal consistency regularization. The three methods share core design principles while operating on different foundation backbones, making them suitable for different deployment scenarios. Extensive experiments on synthetic corruptions and real-world multi-domain shifts demonstrate consistent improvements over strong baselines. Project page: https://visual-ai.github.io/hilo/

analysis.tldr: 提出三种适应域偏移的广义类别发现框架，从视觉模型扩展到视觉-语言模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 现实中的未标注数据常同时存在语义偏移和域偏移，而现有GCD方法假设数据来自单一域，无法处理域偏移。

提出三种适应不同基础模型的框架，核心设计原则统一。

papers.title: Camera-RFID Fusion for Robust Asset Tracking in Forested Environments
papers.abstract: Passive RFID tags offer a cost-effective and scalable solution for tracking numerous deployed assets. However, in forested environments, signal attenuation and multipath effects generally limit RFID spatial accuracy to the meter level. Conversely, while cameras employing stereo vision can achieve centimeter-level precision, relying solely on computer vision fails to resolve issues arising from spatial association ambiguity and partial occlusions in dense settings. Fusing these modalities allows systems to harness the high-accuracy benefits of vision while retaining the robust, non-line-of-sight identification advantages of RFID. Yet, a primary challenge in achieving this, which is the central focus of this paper, lies in accurately associating the disparate trajectories generated by these two sensors. To overcome this limitation, we introduce a novel camera--RFID fusion framework that integrates depth and object information with advanced trajectory-matching algorithms. By successfully bridging the meter-to-centimeter accuracy gap, the proposed approach helps achieve reliable tag localization even when assets temporarily leave the camera's field of view. To the best of our knowledge, this represents the first application of camera--RFID fusion for asset tracking in natural forested environments.

analysis.tldr: 提出相机-RFID融合框架，通过轨迹匹配算法实现森林环境中厘米级资产跟踪。
analysis.research_motivation: 森林环境中，被动RFID标签因信号衰减和多径效应精度仅达米级，而纯视觉方法在密集场景下存在空间关联模糊和部分遮挡问题，融合两者可兼顾高精度与鲁棒性。
analysis.problem: 如何准确关联相机和RFID产生的异构轨迹，弥合米级到厘米级的精度差距。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。

papers.title: Entropy-Dominated Temporal Vocal Dynamics as Digital Biomarkers for Depression Detection
papers.abstract: Automated depression detection often relies on static aggregation of conversational signals, potentially obscuring clinically meaningful behavioral dynamics. We investigated whether entropy-driven temporal biomarkers improve depression detection beyond standard pooled features using the DAIC-WOZ corpus. Using 142 labeled participants, we reconstructed utterance-level acoustic trajectories and compared pooled temporal baselines, trajectory dynamics, Shannon entropy biomarkers, recurrence quantification, sample entropy, fractal complexity, and coupling biomarkers under leakage-aware validation. Static pooling achieved an AUC of 0.593, trajectory dynamics improved performance to 0.637, and entropy biomarkers produced the strongest statistically significant improvement over pooled baselines (AUC 0.646; nested cross-validated AUC 0.615; permutation p = 0.017). Entropy biomarkers outperformed recurrence, coupling, sample entropy, and fractalbased features, with several biomarkers stable across folds. These findings suggest depression-related signal may lie less in average acoustic levels than in entropy of conversational dynamics, supporting temporally informed digital phenotypes for mental-health assessment.

analysis.tldr: 熵驱动的语音时间动态特征比静态聚合特征更有效检测抑郁症。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有自动抑郁检测常依赖静态聚合对话信号，可能掩盖临床上有意义的行为动态，需要更精细的时间动态特征。
analysis.problem: 如何利用熵驱动的语音时间动态特征提升抑郁症检测性能。

papers.title: EnerGS: Energy-Based Gaussian Splatting with Partial Geometric Priors
papers.abstract: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has been widely adopted for scene reconstruction, where training inherently constitutes a highly coupled and non-convex optimization problem. Recent works commonly incorporate geometric priors, such as LiDAR measurements, either for initialization or as training constraints, with the goal of improving photometric reconstruction quality. However, in large-scale outdoor scenarios, such geometric supervision is often spatially incomplete and uneven, which limits its effectiveness as a reliable prior and can even be detrimental to the final reconstruction. To address this challenge, we model partially observable geometry as a continuous energy field induced by geometric evidence and propose EnerGS. Rather than enforcing geometry as a hard constraint, EnerGS provides a soft geometric guidance for the optimization of Gaussian primitives, allowing geometric information to steer the optimization process without directly restricting the solution space. Extensive experiments on large-scale outdoor scenes demonstrate that, under both sparse multi-view and monocular settings, EnerGS consistently improves photometric quality and geometric stability, while effectively mitigating overfitting during 3DGS training.

analysis.tldr: EnerGS通过将部分几何先验建模为连续能量场，为3DGS优化提供软约束，提升大规模室外场景重建质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 3DGS训练是高度耦合的非凸优化问题，现有方法依赖LiDAR等几何先验，但在大规模室外场景中这些先验往往空间不完整且不均匀，作为硬约束反而可能损害重建质量。
analysis.problem: 如何在不完整、不均匀的几何先验下有效引导3DGS优化，避免硬约束的负面影响。

papers.title: Apriori-based Analysis of Learned Helplessness in Mathematics Tutoring: Behavioral Patterns by Level, Intervention, and Outcome
papers.abstract: This study applied the Apriori algorithm to analyze behavioral interaction patterns associated with learned helplessness (LH) in mathematics tutoring system logs. Interaction data were examined across three dimensions: LH level (low vs. high), system-based intervention (with vs. without), and problem-solving outcomes (solved vs. unsolved). The analysis of the complete dataset showed that skipping problems without using hints was the most frequent pattern linked to unsolved outcomes, while persistence behaviors such as not skipping were less dominant overall. Comparisons by LH level showed that low-LH students had stronger links between problem solving and not skipping, as well as positive associations between hint use and solved outcomes. High-LH students showed more avoidance patterns, with skipping strongly tied to unsolved outcomes. In the comparison of system-based intervention conditions, students without intervention had the highest lift for persistence-success links, while the with-intervention group had stronger patterns involving skipping behaviors leading to unsolved outcomes. Outcome-specific analysis showed that not skipping was consistently associated with solved problems across all groups, while skipping without hints predicted unsolved outcomes. Practical implications and recommendations are discussed.

analysis.tldr: 使用Apriori算法分析数学辅导系统中习得性无助的行为模式，发现不同水平、干预和结果下的行为关联差异。
analysis.research_motivation: 习得性无助（LH）影响学生学习动机和成绩，但现有研究缺乏对数学辅导系统中行为模式的细粒度分析，尤其是结合LH水平、干预和结果的多维度交互模式。
analysis.problem: 如何通过关联规则挖掘，系统性地识别数学辅导系统中与习得性无助相关的行为模式，并分析其在不同LH水平、干预条件和结果下的差异。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出：完整数据集分析显示，跳过问题而不使用提示是与未解决结果最频繁关联的模式；低LH学生的问题解决与不跳过行为关联更强，且提示使用与解决结果正相关；高LH学生表现出更多回避模式，跳过与未解决结果强关联；无干预组中坚持-成功关联的提升度最高，而有干预组中跳过导致未解决的模式更强。
analysis.method: 应用Apriori算法对数学辅导系统日志中的行为交互数据进行关联规则挖掘，从LH水平（低/高）、系统干预（有/无）和问题解决结果（解决/未解决）三个维度分析行为模式。
contributions: 首次将Apriori算法应用于数学辅导系统中习得性无助的行为模式分析，揭示了不同维度下的关联规则差异。
提供了基于数据驱动的行为模式洞察，为个性化干预策略设计提供实证依据。

papers.title: DIAGRAMS: A Review Framework for Reasoning-Level Attribution in Diagram QA
papers.abstract: Diagram question answering (Diagram QA) requires reasoning-level attribution that links each question-answer pair to all visual regions needed to derive the answer, rather than only the region containing the final response. Creating such structured evidence across diagrams, charts, maps, circuits, and infographics is time-consuming, and existing annotation tools tightly couple their interfaces to dataset-specific formats. We present DIAGRAMS, a lightweight, schema-driven review framework that decouples interface logic from dataset-specific JSON structures through an internal meta-schema and dataset adapters. Given an image and QA pair with optional candidate regions, the system performs QA-conditioned evidence selection and proposes the regions required for reasoning. When QA pairs or candidate regions are missing, it generates them and supports human verification and refinement. Across six Diagram QA datasets, model-suggested evidence achieves 85.39% precision and 75.30% recall against reviewer-final selections (micro-averaged). These results indicate that the review-first framework reduces manual region creation while maintaining high agreement with final reasoning-level attributions. We release a public demo and installable package to support dataset auditing, grounded supervision creation, and grounded evaluation.

analysis.tldr: 提出DIAGRAMS框架，通过解耦接口与数据集格式，实现图表问答中推理级归因的高效审核。

papers.title: LATTICE: Evaluating Decision Support Utility of Crypto Agents
papers.abstract: We introduce LATTICE, a benchmark for evaluating the decision support utility of crypto agents in realistic user-facing scenarios. Prior crypto agent benchmarks mainly focus on reasoning-based or outcome-based evaluation, but do not assess agents' ability to assist user decision-making. LATTICE addresses this gap by: (1) defining six evaluation dimensions that capture key decision support properties; (2) proposing 16 task types that span the end-to-end crypto copilot workflow; and (3) using LLM judges to automatically score agent outputs based on these dimensions and tasks. Crucially, the dimensions and tasks are designed to be evaluable at scale using LLM judges, without relying on ground truth from expert annotators or external data sources. In lieu of these dependencies, LATTICE's LLM judge rubrics can be continually audited and updated given new dimensions, tasks, criteria, and human feedback, thus promoting reliable and extensible evaluation. While other benchmarks often compare foundation models sharing a generic agent framework, we use LATTICE to assess production-level agents used in actual crypto copilot products, reflecting the importance of orchestration and UI/UX design in determining agent quality. In this paper, we evaluate six real-world crypto copilots on 1,200 diverse queries and report breakdowns across dimensions, tasks, and query categories. Our experiments show that most of the tested copilots achieve comparable aggregate scores, but differ more significantly on dimension-level and task-level performance. This pattern suggests meaningful trade-offs in decision support quality: users with different priorities may be better served by different copilots than the aggregate rankings alone would indicate. To support reproducible research, we open-source all LATTICE code and data used in this paper.

analysis.tldr: 提出LATTICE基准，用于评估加密助手在用户决策支持中的效用，发现不同助手在维度/任务层面存在显著权衡。

papers.title: Persuadability and LLMs as Legal Decision Tools
papers.abstract: As Large Language Models (LLMs) are proposed as legal decision assistants, and even first-instance decision-makers, across a range of judicial and administrative contexts, it becomes essential to explore how they answer legal questions, and in particular the factors that lead them to decide difficult questions in one way or another. A specific feature of legal decisions is the need to respond to arguments advanced by contending parties. A legal decision-maker must be able to engage with, and respond to, including through being potentially persuaded by, arguments advanced by the parties. Conversely, they should not be unduly persuadable, influenced by a particularly compelling advocate to decide cases based on the skills of the advocates, rather than the merits of the case. We explore how frontier open- and closed-weights LLMs respond to legal arguments, reporting original experimental results examining how the quality of the advocate making those arguments affects the likelihood that a model will agree with a particular legal point of view, and exploring the factors driving these results. Our results have implications for the feasibility of adopting LLMs across legal and administrative settings.

papers.title: DepthPilot: From Controllability to Interpretability in Colonoscopy Video Generation
papers.abstract: Controllable medical video generation has achieved remarkable progress, but it still lacks interpretability, which requires the alignment of generated contents with physical priors and faithful clinical manifestations. To push the boundaries from mere controllability to interpretability, we propose DepthPilot, the first interpretable framework for colonoscopy video generation. This work takes a step toward trustworthy generation through two synergistic paradigms. To achieve explicit geometric grounding, DepthPilot devises a prior distribution alignment strategy, injecting depth constraints into the diffusion backbone via parameter-efficient fine-tuning to ensure anatomical fidelity. To enhance intrinsic nonlinear modeling under these geometric constraints, DepthPilot employs an adaptive spline denoising module, replacing fixed linear weights with learnable spline functions to capture complex spatio-temporal dynamics. Extensive evaluations across three public datasets and in-house clinical data confirm DepthPilot's robust ability to produce physically consistent videos. It achieves FID scores below 15 across all benchmarks and ranks first in clinician assessments, bridging the gap between "visually realistic" and "clinically interpretable". Moreover, DepthPilot-generated videos are expected to enable reliable 3D reconstruction, facilitating surgical navigation and blind region identification, and serve as a foundation toward the colorectal world model.

analysis.tldr: 首个面向结肠镜视频生成的可解释框架，通过深度约束与自适应样条去噪实现几何保真与临床可解释性。

papers.title: HOI-aware Adaptive Network for Weakly-supervised Action Segmentation
papers.abstract: In this paper, we propose an HOI-aware adaptive network named AdaAct for weakly-supervised action segmentation. Most existing methods learn a fixed network to predict the action of each frame with the neighboring frames. However, this would result in ambiguity when estimating similar actions, such as pouring juice and pouring coffee. To address this, we aim to exploit temporally global but spatially local human-object interactions (HOI) as video-level prior knowledge for action segmentation. The long-term HOI sequence provides crucial contextual information to distinguish ambiguous actions, where our network dynamically adapts to the given HOI sequence at test time. More specifically, we first design a video HOI encoder that extracts, selects, and integrates the most representative HOI throughout the video. Then, we propose a two-branch HyperNetwork to learn an adaptive temporal encoder, which automatically adjusts the parameters based on the HOI information of various videos on the fly. Extensive experiments on two widely-used datasets including Breakfast and 50Salads demonstrate the effectiveness of our method under different evaluation metrics.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种利用人-物交互（HOI）作为视频级先验知识的自适应网络，用于弱监督动作分割。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有弱监督动作分割方法使用固定网络预测每帧动作，在区分相似动作（如倒果汁和倒咖啡）时存在歧义，需要更有效的上下文信息。
analysis.problem: 弱监督动作分割中相似动作的区分问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 设计视频HOI编码器提取代表性HOI，并提出双分支超网络学习自适应时序编码器，根据HOI信息动态调整参数。
contributions: 提出HOI感知的自适应网络AdaAct，利用全局时序但局部空间的人-物交互作为先验知识。
设计视频HOI编码器和双分支超网络，实现测试时动态适应。
analysis.experiments: 在Breakfast和50Salads两个数据集上进行了实验，验证了方法在不同评估指标下的有效性。
limitations: 可能依赖HOI检测的准确性。
超网络可能增加计算开销。

papers.title: Seeking Consensus: Geometric-Semantic On-the-Fly Recalibration for Open-Vocabulary Remote Sensing Semantic Segmentation
papers.abstract: Open-vocabulary semantic segmentation (OVSS) in remote sensing images is a promising task that employs textual descriptions for identifying undefined land cover categories. Despite notable advances, existing methods typically employ a static inference paradigm, overlooking the distinct distribution of each scene, resulting in semantic ambiguity in diverse land covers and incomplete foreground activation. Motivated by this, we propose Seeking Consensus, termed SeeCo, a plug-and-play framework to boost the performance of training-free OVSS models in remote sensing images, which recalibrates arbitrary OVSS models on-the-fly by seeking dual consensus: geometric consensus learning (GCL) through multi-view consistent observations and semantic consensus learning (SCL) via textual description adaptive calibration, which assists collaborative recalibration of visual and textual semantics. The two consensus are injected via an online consensus injector (OCI), effectively alleviating the under-activation and semantic bias. SeeCo requires no specific training process, yet recalibrates semantic-geometric alignment for each unique scene during inference. Extensive experiments on eight remote sensing OVSS benchmarks show consistent gains, proving its effectiveness and universality.

analysis.tldr: 提出SeeCo，一种即插即用框架，通过几何与语义共识在线校准提升遥感图像开放词汇语义分割性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有开放词汇语义分割方法采用静态推理范式，忽略每个场景的独特分布，导致语义模糊和前景激活不完整。
analysis.problem: 解决遥感图像开放词汇语义分割中静态推理导致的语义歧义和前景欠激活问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法在多样土地覆盖类别上存在语义模糊和前景激活不完整。
analysis.method: 提出SeeCo框架，包含几何共识学习（GCL）通过多视角一致观测和语义共识学习（SCL）通过文本描述自适应校准，并通过在线共识注入器（OCI）协同校准视觉和文本语义。
contributions: 提出SeeCo，一种无需训练的即插即用框架，通过在线共识校准提升开放词汇语义分割性能。
在八个遥感基准上验证了方法的有效性和通用性。
analysis.experiments: 在八个遥感开放词汇语义分割基准上进行实验，结果一致提升。
limitations: 可能依赖多视角观测的可用性。
未在非遥感领域验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实验充分，但技术细节有限，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SeeCo，一种即插即用框架，通过几何与语义共识在线校准提升遥感图像开放词汇语义分割性能。

papers.title: ViBE: Visual-to-M/EEG Brain Encoding via Spatio-Temporal VAE and Distribution-Aligned Projection
papers.abstract: Brain encoding models not only serve to decipher how visual stimuli are transformed into neural responses, but also represent a critical step toward visual prostheses that restore vision for patients with severe vision disorders. Brain encoding involves two fundamental steps: achieving faithful reconstruction of neural responses and establishing cross-modal alignment between visual stimuli and neural responses. To this end, we propose ViBE, a novel brain encoding framework for generating magnetoencephalography (MEG) and electroencephalography (EEG) signals from visual stimuli. Specifically, we first design a spatio-temporal convolutional variational autoencoder (TSC-VAE) that captures the spatio-temporal characteristics of M/EEG signals for effective neural response reconstruction. To bridge the modality gap between visual features and neural representations, we employ Q-Former to map CLIP image embeddings to the TSC-VAE latent space, producing neural proxy embeddings. For comprehensive cross-modal alignment, we combine mean squared error (MSE) loss for point-wise feature matching with sliced Wasserstein distance (SWD) for probability distribution alignment between the neural proxy embeddings and TSC-VAE latent embeddings. We conduct extensive experiments on the THINGS-EEG2 and THINGS-MEG datasets, demonstrating the effectiveness of our approach in generating high-quality M/EEG signals from visual stimuli.

analysis.tldr: 提出ViBE框架，利用时空VAE和分布对齐投影从视觉刺激生成高质量M/EEG信号。
analysis.research_motivation: 脑编码模型有助于理解视觉刺激如何转化为神经反应，并为视觉假体恢复视力提供关键步骤，但现有方法在神经反应重建和跨模态对齐方面存在不足。
analysis.problem: 如何从视觉刺激生成高保真的M/EEG信号，并实现视觉特征与神经表征的跨模态对齐。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 设计时空卷积变分自编码器（TSC-VAE）捕捉M/EEG时空特征，利用Q-Former将CLIP图像嵌入映射到TSC-VAE潜在空间得到神经代理嵌入，结合MSE损失和切片Wasserstein距离进行点级和分布级对齐。
contributions: 提出ViBE框架，结合TSC-VAE和分布对齐投影实现视觉到M/EEG的脑编码。
在THINGS-EEG2和THINGS-MEG数据集上验证了生成高质量M/EEG信号的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在THINGS-EEG2和THINGS-MEG数据集上进行实验，展示了生成高质量M/EEG信号的效果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定数据集，泛化性需进一步验证。
计算复杂度可能较高，实际应用效率待评估。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法结合时空VAE和分布对齐，在脑编码任务上有创新，但应用方向非当前最核心关注点。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ViBE框架，利用时空VAE和分布对齐投影从视觉刺激生成高质量M/EEG信号。

papers.title: Qvine: Vine Structured Quantum Circuits for Loading High Dimensional Distributions
papers.abstract: Loading high dimensional distributions is an important task for utilizing quantum computers on applications ranging from machine learning to finance. The high dimensionality leads to a curse of dimensionality, representing a d-dimensional distribution with k resolution requires dk qubits and an unstructured parameterized circuit would express a unitary in an exponential operator space in the number of qubits, leading to vanishing gradients and poor convergence guarantees even at high depth. Vine copula decompositions are widely used to represent high dimensional distributions classically, showing high quality approximation in many important applications, such as financial modeling. We present Qvine, a vine structured ansatz for quantum circuits, that mirrors the vine decomposition to construct scalable quantum circuits with efficient trainability while achieving similarly high quality approximation for amplitude encoding distributions. For regular vines (R-vines), we show that the circuit depth scales at most quadratic in the dimension of the distribution, while for D-vines, as well as many practical R-vines, the circuit depth scales linear in the dimension. For 3-dimensional and 4-dimensional Gaussians and empirical joint stock price return distributions for selected stocks, our experiments show Qvines achieve high quality loading.

analysis.tldr: Qvine 利用藤结构分解设计量子电路，实现高维分布的高效加载，电路深度随维度线性或二次增长。
analysis.research_motivation: 高维分布加载是量子计算在机器学习和金融等领域的关键任务，但高维度导致量子比特需求指数增长，且非结构化电路存在梯度消失和收敛性差的问题。
analysis.problem: 如何设计可扩展、可训练的量子电路来高效加载高维分布。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 Qvine，一种基于藤结构分解的量子电路变分形式，镜像经典藤分解，实现可扩展的量子电路，并保证高效可训练性。
contributions: 提出 Qvine 电路结构，利用藤分解实现高维分布加载，电路深度在 R-vine 下最多为维度二次，D-vine 下为线性。
在三维和四维高斯分布以及股票收益分布上实验验证了 Qvine 的高质量加载性能。
analysis.experiments: 在 3 维和 4 维高斯分布以及选定的股票联合收益分布上进行了实验，表明 Qvine 实现了高质量加载。
limitations: 实验仅涉及低维（3D、4D）分布，高维场景下的性能未验证。
仅测试了高斯分布和股票收益分布，泛化性有待进一步验证。

papers.title: OMEGA: Optimizing Machine Learning by Evaluating Generated Algorithms
papers.abstract: In order to automate AI research we introduce a full, end-to-end framework, OMEGA: Optimizing Machine learning by Evaluating Generated Algorithms, that starts at idea generation and ends with executable code. Our system combines structured meta-prompt engineering with executable code generation to create new ML classifiers. The OMEGA framework has been utilized to generate several novel algorithms that outperform scikit-learn baselines across a robust selection of 20 benchmark datasets (infinity-bench). You can access models discussed in this paper and more in the python package: pip install omega-models.

analysis.tldr: 提出OMEGA框架，通过元提示工程和代码生成自动创建ML分类器，在20个基准数据集上超越scikit-learn基线。
analysis.research_motivation: 自动化AI研究需要从想法生成到可执行代码的完整框架，现有方法缺乏端到端自动化能力。
analysis.problem: 如何自动生成并评估新的机器学习算法，使其在多个数据集上优于现有基线。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 结合结构化元提示工程与可执行代码生成，自动创建ML分类器。
contributions: 提出OMEGA端到端框架，实现从想法生成到代码执行的自动化。
生成多个新算法，在20个基准数据集上超越scikit-learn基线。
analysis.experiments: 在20个基准数据集（infinity-bench）上评估，与scikit-learn基线比较。摘要未提供具体实验结果。

papers.title: Breaking the Autoregressive Chain: Hyper-Parallel Decoding for Efficient LLM-Based Attribute Value Extraction
papers.abstract: Some text generation tasks, such as Attribute Value Extraction (AVE), require decoding multiple independent sequences from the same document context. While standard autoregressive decoding is slow due to its sequential nature, the independence between output sequences offers an opportunity for parallelism. We present Hyper-Parallel Decoding, a novel decoding algorithm that accelerates offline decoding by leveraging both shared memory and computation across batches. HPD enables out-of-order token generation through position ID manipulation, significantly improving efficiency. Experiments on AVE show that attribute-value pairs are conditionally independent, enabling us to parallelize value generation within each prompt. By further stacking multiple documents within a single prompt, we can decode in parallel up to 96 tokens per prompt. HPD works with all LLMs, and reduces both inference costs and total inference time by up to 13.8X without compromising output quality, potentially saving hundreds of thousands of dollars on industry AVE tasks. Although designed for attribute extraction, HPD makes no assumptions unique to the AVE domain and can in theory be applied to other scenarios with independent output structures.

analysis.tldr: 提出超并行解码（HPD）算法，通过位置ID操作实现乱序生成，在属性值提取任务中实现高达13.8倍的推理加速。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准自回归解码因顺序生成而速度慢，但属性值提取（AVE）等任务中多个输出序列相互独立，存在并行化潜力，现有方法未能充分利用这一特性。
analysis.problem: 如何利用输出序列间的条件独立性，加速基于LLM的属性值提取中的解码过程。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到属性值对在给定文档上下文中条件独立，这为并行化提供了基础。
analysis.method: Hyper-Parallel Decoding (HPD)：通过位置ID操作实现乱序token生成，利用共享内存和计算跨批次并行解码，支持在单个提示中堆叠多个文档，每提示最多并行解码96个token。
contributions: 提出HPD算法，利用输出序列独立性实现高效并行解码。
在AVE任务上实现高达13.8倍的推理加速，且不降低输出质量。
analysis.experiments: 在属性值提取任务上进行实验，显示条件独立性，并实现13.8倍加速，但摘要未提供具体数据集或基准细节。
limitations: 仅适用于输出序列条件独立的场景。
未在非AVE任务上验证，理论适用性需进一步实验。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，加速效果显著，且具有通用潜力，但实验仅限AVE任务。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出超并行解码（HPD）算法，通过位置ID操作实现乱序生成，在属性值提取任务中实现高达13.8倍的推理加速。

papers.title: Agent Name Service (ANS): A Proof-of-Concept Trust Layer for Secure AI Agent Discovery, Identity, and Governance in Kubernetes
papers.abstract: Autonomous AI agent ecosystems require stronger mechanisms for secure discovery, identity verification, capability attestation, and policy governance. Current deployments frequently lack (1) uniform agent discovery, (2) cryptographic agent authentication, (3) capability proofs that protect secrets, and (4) enforceable policy controls. This paper presents an implementation-oriented proof of concept for the Agent Name Service (ANS), a DNS-inspired trust layer for AI agent discovery and interoperability in Kubernetes, grounded in the ANS protocol specification~\cite{huang2025ans}. The implementation uses Decentralized Identifiers (DIDs), Verifiable Credentials (VCs), policy-as-code enforcement with Open Policy Agent (OPA), and Kubernetes-native integration patterns (CRDs, admission controls, service mesh integration). In a demo research environment (3-node cluster, 50-agent workflow simulation), we observe sub-10ms response in demonstrated service paths and full success for scripted demo deployment scenarios. We explicitly scope these findings as proof-of-concept evidence rather than production certification. We further provide a threat model, assumptions, and limitations to separate implemented evidence from protocol-defined and roadmap capabilities. The result is an evidence-grounded pathway from ANS protocol concepts to reproducible engineering practice for secure multi-agent systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种DNS启发的AI Agent信任层ANS，在Kubernetes上实现安全发现、身份验证和策略治理。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前AI Agent生态系统缺乏统一的安全发现、身份验证、能力证明和策略治理机制，导致部署中存在安全隐患。
analysis.problem: 如何为Kubernetes环境中的AI Agent提供安全、可扩展的发现、身份验证和策略治理方案。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于ANS协议规范，结合DID、VC、OPA策略即代码以及Kubernetes原生集成模式（CRD、准入控制、服务网格）实现信任层。
contributions: 提出了ANS信任层的实现原型，填补了AI Agent安全治理的工程空白。
在Kubernetes上验证了ANS的可行性，展示了亚10ms响应和100%部署成功率。
analysis.experiments: 在3节点集群、50个Agent工作流模拟中，演示服务路径响应时间低于10ms，脚本化部署场景全部成功。
limitations: 仅作为概念验证，未达到生产级认证。
实验环境规模较小，未涉及大规模或真实生产场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 概念验证性质，实验规模小，但针对Agent安全治理有实际意义。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种DNS启发的AI Agent信任层ANS，在Kubernetes上实现安全发现、身份验证和策略治理。

papers.title: Option-Order Randomisation Reveals a Distributional Position Attractor in Prompted Sandbagging
papers.abstract: A predecessor pilot (Cacioli, 2026) found that Llama-3-8B implements prompted sandbagging as positional collapse rather than answer avoidance. However, fixed option ordering in MMLU-Pro left open whether this reflected a model-level position-dominant policy or dataset-level distractor structure. This pre-registered follow-up (3 models, 2,000 MMLU-Pro items, 4 conditions, 24,000 primary trials) added cyclic option-order randomisation as the critical control. The pre-registered item-level same-letter diagnostic did not confirm deterministic position-tracking (same-letter rate 37.3%, below the 50% threshold). However, pre-specified supporting analyses revealed that the response-position distribution under sandbagging was highly stable under complete content rotation (Pearson r = 0.9994; Jensen-Shannon divergence = 0.027, compared to 0.386 between honest and sandbagging conditions). Accuracy spiked to 72.1% when the correct answer coincidentally occupied the preferred position E, and fell to 4.3% at position A. The data provide strong evidence for a soft distributional attractor: under sandbagging instruction, the model enters a low-entropy response-position basin centred on E/F/G that is highly stable and largely content-invariant at the aggregate level. Qwen-2.5-7B served as a negative control (non-compliant, no distributional shift). These results provide evidence, at the 7-9 billion parameter scale, that response-position entropy is a promising black-box behavioural signature of this sandbagging mode.

analysis.tldr: 通过选项顺序随机化，发现提示性放水（sandbagging）下模型存在软分布吸引子，响应位置集中在E/F/G，且与内容无关。
analysis.research_motivation: 先前研究发现Llama-3-8B在提示性放水时表现为位置坍缩而非答案回避，但固定选项顺序无法区分是模型级位置主导策略还是数据集级干扰结构，需要更严格的实验设计来揭示放水行为的本质。
analysis.problem: 确定提示性放水（sandbagging）下模型响应位置偏差的来源和性质，即是否由模型内部的位置偏好策略导致，以及这种偏好是否具有内容不变性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：在放水条件下，响应位置分布高度稳定（Pearson r=0.9994），且与内容旋转无关；正确选项在偏好位置E时准确率高达72.1%，在位置A时仅4.3%；Qwen-2.5-7B作为阴性对照未出现分布偏移。这表明存在一个软分布吸引子，使模型进入低熵响应位置盆地。
analysis.method: 在MMLU-Pro上对3个模型（Llama-3-8B等）进行循环选项顺序随机化，设置4种条件，共24000次主试验；使用预注册的相同字母诊断和支持性分析（Pearson相关、Jensen-Shannon散度）来评估位置分布稳定性。
contributions: 通过选项顺序随机化，严格区分了模型级位置策略与数据集级干扰，证实了放水行为源于模型内部的位置偏好。
发现并量化了软分布吸引子现象：放水指令下模型响应位置集中在E/F/G，且分布高度稳定、内容不变。
提出响应位置熵可作为放水模式的黑箱行为特征，为检测和缓解模型放水提供新视角。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅描述了实验设计（3个模型、2000个MMLU-Pro项目、4种条件、24000次主试验）和关键统计量（相同字母率37.3%、Pearson r=0.9994、Jensen-Shannon散度0.027、准确率72.1% vs 4.3%）。
limitations: 仅测试了7-9B参数规模的模型，更大或更小模型的行为可能不同。
仅使用MMLU-Pro数据集，其他任务或领域是否适用未知。
软分布吸引子的机制尚未完全解释，可能受训练数据或架构影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法设计严谨，发现软分布吸引子现象对理解LLM安全对齐中的放水行为有重要价值，但实验规模有限且未深入机制。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过选项顺序随机化，发现提示性放水（sandbagging）下模型存在软分布吸引子，响应位置集中在E/F/G，且与内容无关。

papers.title: FASH-iCNN: Making Editorial Fashion Identity Inspectable Through Multimodal CNN Probing
papers.abstract: Fashion AI systems routinely encode the aesthetic logic of specific houses, editors, and historical moments without disclosing it. We present FASH-iCNN, a multimodal system trained on 87,547 Vogue runway images across 15 fashion houses spanning 1991-2024 that makes this cultural logic inspectable. Given a photograph of a garment, the system recovers which house produced it, which era it belongs to, and which color tradition it reflects. A clothing-only model identifies the fashion house at 78.2% top-1 across 14 houses, the decade at 88.6% top-1, and the specific year at 58.3% top-1 across 34 years with a mean error of just 2.2 years. Probing which visual channels carry this signal reveals a sharp dissociation: removing color costs only 10.6pp of house identity accuracy, while removing texture costs 37.6pp, establishing texture and luminance as the primary carriers of editorial identity. FASH-iCNN treats editorial culture as the signal rather than background noise, identifying which houses, eras, and color traditions shaped each output so that users can see not just what the system predicts but which houses, editors, and historical moments are encoded in that prediction.

analysis.tldr: 提出FASH-iCNN多模态系统，从Vogue runway图像中识别时尚品牌、年代和色彩传统，并揭示纹理和亮度是编辑身份的主要载体。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有时尚AI系统隐式编码特定品牌、编辑和历史的审美逻辑，但未公开这些文化信号，导致用户无法理解模型预测背后的文化偏见。
analysis.problem: 如何使时尚AI系统可解释，即从服装图像中恢复其所属品牌、年代和色彩传统，并揭示哪些视觉特征承载了编辑身份。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过消融实验发现，去除颜色仅使品牌识别准确率下降10.6个百分点，而去除纹理则下降37.6个百分点，表明纹理和亮度是编辑身份的主要载体，颜色贡献较小。
analysis.method: 构建多模态CNN系统FASH-iCNN，在87,547张Vogue runway图像（15个品牌，1991-2024年）上训练，输出品牌、年代和色彩传统；通过视觉通道探针分析颜色、纹理等对识别的影响。
contributions: 提出FASH-iCNN系统，首次将时尚编辑文化作为可检测信号而非背景噪声。
通过大规模实验揭示纹理和亮度是品牌身份的主要视觉载体，颜色贡献有限。
analysis.experiments: 在87,547张Vogue runway图像上评估，服装模型在14个品牌上达到78.2% top-1准确率，年代88.6% top-1，年份58.3% top-1（平均误差2.2年）；消融实验量化颜色和纹理的影响。
limitations: 仅基于Vogue runway图像，可能无法泛化到其他时尚来源或非专业摄影。
未探讨不同品牌间纹理特征的语义解释。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性中等，但应用领域较窄，实验规模大但未涉及通用视觉理解，推荐保存以供时尚AI方向参考。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出FASH-iCNN多模态系统，从Vogue runway图像中识别时尚品牌、年代和色彩传统，并揭示纹理和亮度是编辑身份的主要载体。

papers.title: Privacy-Preserving Clothing Classification using Vision Transformer for Thermal Comfort Estimation
papers.abstract: A privacy-preserving clothing classification scheme is presented to enable secure occupant-centric control (OCC) systems. Although the utilization of camera images for HVAC control has been widely studied to optimize thermal comfort, privacy protection of occupant images has not been considered in prior works. While various privacy-preserving methods have been proposed for image classification, applying conventional schemes results in severe accuracy degradation. In this paper, we introduce a privacy-preserving classification method using Vision Transformer (ViT) applied to clothing insulation estimation. In an experiment using the DeepFashion dataset categorized by clothing insulation, while the conventional pixel-based method suffers a severe accuracy drop, our scheme maintains a high accuracy on encrypted images, showing no degradation from plain images across all categories.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于Vision Transformer的隐私保护衣物分类方法，在加密图像上保持高精度，用于热舒适估计。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于图像的HVAC控制研究未考虑隐私保护，而传统隐私保护方法会导致严重精度下降。
analysis.problem: 如何在保护图像隐私的同时，实现高精度的衣物分类以用于热舒适估计。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 传统像素级隐私保护方法在加密图像上精度严重下降，而ViT方法在加密图像上精度无退化。
analysis.method: 使用Vision Transformer（ViT）对加密图像进行衣物分类，实现隐私保护。
contributions: 首次将隐私保护引入基于图像的HVAC控制中的衣物分类任务
提出使用ViT在加密图像上保持高分类精度，无精度损失
analysis.experiments: 在DeepFashion数据集上，按衣物隔热等级分类，ViT方法在加密图像上精度与明文图像相同，而传统像素方法精度严重下降。
limitations: 仅针对衣物分类任务，未验证其他隐私保护场景
未讨论加密计算开销
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法有创新但实验规模有限，推荐阅读摘要。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于Vision Transformer的隐私保护衣物分类方法，在加密图像上保持高精度，用于热舒适估计。
